name: Team Bolding
subject: The right to vote is not partisan

| **IN CASE YOU MISSED IT...all eyes are on AZ this November and your voting rights depend on this election!**
Peter, we want to be clear. **The right to vote isn’t partisan.**

As Trump-Republicans pull out every trick in the book in an attempt to overturn our elections and reverse the voting rights we’ve fought so hard to achieve, Reginald has led the fight in AZ to stop them.

**[Can you chip in $10 to keep us on track to raise $10k before tonight and help elect Reginald as our next AZ Secretary of State?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZrmrJL-9g10cps3dPGchCkhsk7Le55f_BVHj4oNoC-11yUH9ptDiYKPBPEwLOVQohSP0HGelAa0DQdGqJK1mVuclm8T-iri6U3NmycllfARCM6cwkMnPNOurgTvpNTb8F6mTg_-TvyWwSdhZXeinNrOvs6Sm3ECjY8xp_4jlK3HaN_mcGWtBatwtwkniEet3Xmcy3jpM7r6-ii1QfkbuTqfTuPNYT5-2KwmANUQKj3Bnxsc-KLx5lH4PYMzYyvZeA4YyamGlicxulc4BGJPQ2I9PFqQHHchmrwGVupl8i_HMziJ8gUJUIe8bElGMUvFlW8fOhXOUWvvUctwomTOZ7xtO60YN2pkfG2aymOLqW-A/3nd/Vq0huhNORKKDdcq63SDl8w/h0/hU3wEexcIgwckjk3M0BQUTuz-mYswLkFZW1Yc8Fm4qs)** | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZrmrJL-9g10cps3dPGchCk60Mt09wDzKJQjGovwjqXzGLJ4vBitI0Bv1HVuyxDP1-8IJbYIKLQ_psOzJ8VT6_BqseEj97VlmmVL7jMa-LjpMDUlSrdV3SUU74uE6g8cgxI-fjLKqa2Mmsm_ZrogPWb2Z2aO8sMUTR7H0ywT-15Mhr-lC8qoeFiQDptQ63_enKuvfPhqS9t6E9bupqq6u1wTJROevhTD9YbWmpsTHx6tBtKxNnlrFZRQBxPs0aN3D2NmvzIEWNCrYDKbTBlLl5ZskaE7iqO9TKtk6DLPp4Vp_agcoy1qrZN2jat-8m3kP6t0hdqUrpd_ndf0TOM909Ym6bWhok5IqIZlOOKB46lA/3nd/Vq0huhNORKKDdcq63SDl8w/h1/KL7hGp74TWY-7wcbwdtxHOAKd2nlV1ly5WLc7Pe7LGU)

As House Minority Leader, Reginald has watched the far-right’s desperate attempts to remove ALL mail-in voting and propose restrictive voter ID laws — all while planning to overturn any election results they don’t agree with. From day one, Reginald has been there to fight back against these attacks and protect our democracy.

While the far-right wants to do everything they can to turn back time and cheat their way to a win, the people of AZ want to move forward. And Reginald is ready to launch that momentum — by keeping the ballot box out of partisan, **_extremist_** hands.

**[As AZ Secretary of State, Reginald will continue his work to ensure fair and free elections for all Arizonans. If you’re with him, can you chip in $10 today and help us hit our critical 10k goal before tonight?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZrmrJL-9g10cps3dPGchCkhsk7Le55f_BVHj4oNoC-11yUH9ptDiYKPBPEwLOVQohSP0HGelAa0DQdGqJK1mV31wDsHW-pZL0SghawdLR49yBM5WGxQd4-EmquPTbtkF_7w_47jdrL-UhgSbWbC6w854PvFigfn7PU0sD-B3PKU3x_JLgdG6PJ3l1z72PlDhMJKRvWZ5j8Z7iu7MMkJjmYMA1jYo21mF7nIDmkhqLNfZSYcdlyqkgmCrhfe_cV487rg5Ib9smP-ehHnY4BNhWDJ9T8bgMxIxUddhTHTF-YA8dmnLpzwKyopkg39GKmFhP7EORPmQt8lbLCkkCEDScxAvJAEx2_MdI0MXROynnlw/3nd/Vq0huhNORKKDdcq63SDl8w/h2/5qTvLARbsJkIqLJgvE431MLqXwHXYYs35U9qZxGCA9c)** If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We hate to have to share this with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Raphael Warnock and his Democrat dark money allies have been flooding the airways with attacks against me. |
---
Fellow American,

I wish I had better news, but here's the truth: we have been seriously outraised, and now, we're also being outspent.

Senator Raphael Warnock and his Democrat dark money allies have been flooding the airways with attacks against me.

Fellow American, they've already spent $8 million since I won the Republican nomination, flooding Georgians' homes and screens with misleading attacks.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=14951f8ccefd4ac79b5d073251cac184&_e=3qrmQXKJsLJ3Lp6nUL7IE1sSFDMCr0kWPnqHOlhpauM5JdAJ1VUkML_AyqoaXjxqfS1AYnoX61LgqhRPHO81YCurhOYwI2DlW3LYmreba7z4l4ltzywFgaDUB1NMv7yqfgdAvulDgKShWeV1DEyJ94zYLdU4XQxm7Qb5GXsBTrkxoTZI1BJJu1nqIDbpn7TWLnB2IQ5WbjNmh8xFw2a_9Mr8O3HlBLBwoSI__X9qVasor7J1wiMOZU8ANvZQu8hEjnBSzOP5g5fJOb30CHuD3OjdoaMaiE0R2eb6VF_4_3OGXZdoAVS4RwoFnkNAHqjsb36PRLffprG8V2uhDJ2nznq8x_1RqiA50ZPscD7CPORqk8ESaq6sj_08AKjDeMlRzNzE0xbzT8vhdu1E7dCu3IEnHZmnldiVG5EQCsEttnVzTVpffmPPXRW8Im6g2QYMU4kEsLY2a9f3PjGGprm5qKMIw3_PU-yWxDsnXImjfZMNgJUICR0oU3x7GGg4aoo5)
We need to go on the air ASAP to set the record straight and push back against the onslaught of attacks.

**It costs a whopping $2 million A WEEK in Georgia to make sure all voters see an ad, but we don't have enough in our media fund to put our ads on the air yet.**

This may seem like a lot of money - and it is - but your support of few bucks can help sponsor an ad and get us on the air!

clean_body: Raphael Warnock and his Democrat dark money allies have been flooding the airways with attacks against me. | Fellow American, I wish I had better news, but here's the truth: we have been seriously outraised, and now, we're also being outspent. Senator Raphael Warnock and his Democrat dark money allies have been flooding the airways with attacks against me. Fellow American, they've already spent $8 million since I won the Republican nomination, flooding Georgians' homes and screens with misleading attacks. We need to go on the air ASAP to set the record straight and push back against the onslaught of attacks. It costs a whopping $2 million A WEEK in Georgia to make sure all voters see an ad, but we don't have enough in our media fund to put our ads on the air yet. This may seem like a lot of money - and it is - but your support of few bucks can help sponsor an ad and get us on the air! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | | We're going to be making some final decisions on our ad buys this week. If we come up short of our end-of-quarter goal, we'll have to cut our TV budget and delay our ads even longer. Please don't let that happen, Fellow American. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

As of today, the Democratic Governors Association (DGA) has invested over ONE MILLION DOLLARS to prop up my opponent in an attempt to defeat me on July 19th.

**Any ad you see that is paid for by the DGA is an ad meant to trick you. Because they think you can be manipulated and easily fooled. **

These are the same people who spend most of their days claiming to care about saving democracy. But when it comes down to it, all they care about is their own political power. And this proves it.

The national Democrats can’t stand Governor Hogan and the success we have had. They can’t stand the Republican legislators who stood with me today. And frankly, they can’t stand me, because I am a threat. I’m a threat standing in the way of one-party rule in Annapolis.

So, what are we going to do?

**To put it simply, we’re going to fight back.**

_We won’t be fooled by their deceitful and shameless tactics._

Every single day, I am working to move our state in the right direction and will fight to keep changing Maryland for the better.

_As governor, all Marylanders can count on me to fight for them, and to bring real solutions to tackle inflation, taxes, education, and crime._

**Make no mistake about it, with your help, we are going to win.**

[**Can you please make a contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 today? **](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86LkoS2iPIFlSyFaW6mGPUk2Lt0h40f4eWoOyVVysLCo2-2BGPfssgH4ANdaAXkFiwsnwNKy9RXfyVB-2F6p0l-2BlbVXA-3D-3DZGIc_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6p3b9-2Bp49k4J7jPTyAsyr9k9BRlANuZt3qGaRXMsYJLsRfm12LkpIG0-2BBHtwhP6ID2O9Xjkv5gwGuUbhSR2dO4nBL-2BowcNbJyj2DSKF5v8Bi3rXAO6ZXIXFogGwqdFy2N5zf7v5o38XM-2FkMWl0GZ1GjRWHN-2FIMgjm4gEgXJPBFeD50ZNtNFWm92Ji1JpWMSBCvcU5p48AaK1wPhFgaErXdwxK5VPAzBnKDR-2F8MngpqhGbsY1PNt98oqN2AhjwXhdkRa7Sb3h8oPZ4XIZgQmGgPL-2F69Z5YTvHQGBqoEN4jthQpaYY9SCe2-2BjlS0SPzabHipT3et-2F5o-2FJ1A-2BXX5eRBYt-2BEKvejY1-2BoeYBx4IhM9ly8gl2RaBEP6EjZyPhHMVU60SnmgcLVTzZ65QGtuSMZARuTGJI67k9oJZw2yUwZyllAr-2B-2BIA7v8TQX6lR9-2FI9XTjFInkh3XUWClDYrfHRhD9wzWlXB-2BMUS4kcVEXZyq6B0xS-2Fk7q6daRDf-2B-2FAK-2F4vtCXivNRSsNGffRl8dVqkewx-2BIkkOZ1QhL-2B7-2Fis72d-2Bgj-2FICf5SxpGofyvupW9vyQ1Wq-2F0Id9WMy5gJ8HzQcKKTjTe0OLNFBQu-2FdU5HM2zF18i8kVJ0k1mIxRM-2Fj4fuff2EqhsEKzM85BRSK9BJ2z15SH6hK2LKu8gx7JikgJGqfG2cbqVUL7pNFjuZdc4-2B3i1tPA51mz8RzKLSIhq-2FO0jdKIszlQFquu7MHxM-2BMeakXL6SgFyFZre3iVvslYwXldnfdgPmtZroQCKRUdhN0YhaDPW4lZWQOr11ty9eOXsYq1iWxp6pgUOhF5Dm1qaiS5tSB)

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Today I held a press conference with Governor Larry Hogan, Maryland Republican Party Chairman Dirk Haire, and Republican members of the Maryland legislature to condemn Democratic interference in the Maryland Republican Primary. As of today, the Democratic Governors Association (DGA) has invested over ONE MILLION DOLLARS to prop up my opponent in an attempt to defeat me on July 19th. Any ad you see that is paid for by the DGA is an ad meant to trick you. Because they think you can be manipulated and easily fooled. These are the same people who spend most of their days claiming to care about saving democracy. But when it comes down to it, all they care about is their own political power. And this proves it. The national Democrats can’t stand Governor Hogan and the success we have had. They can’t stand the Republican legislators who stood with me today. And frankly, they can’t stand me, because I am a threat. I’m a threat standing in the way of one-party rule in Annapolis. So, what are we going to do? To put it simply, we’re going to fight back. We won’t be fooled by their deceitful and shameless tactics. Every single day, I am working to move our state in the right direction and will fight to keep changing Maryland for the better. As governor, all Marylanders can count on me to fight for them, and to bring real solutions to tackle inflation, taxes, education, and crime. Make no mistake about it, with your help, we are going to win. Together we will show the DGA that Maryland is not for sale. Thank you, Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Roe v. Wade

| _A note from the NDRC team..._

We want to acknowledge that the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ is hitting many people hard. This decision will cause tremendous harm. The NDRC is committed to working for a future in which all human rights are protected.

If you would like to support abortion access directly, **[you can make a donation to more than 80 abortion funds here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47242714/353613595/-1348740862?refcode=20220630r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNWEyMDI0LWYyZjgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=etJFlPT1CUTucORbu6d6sNToS_TXCNmeYDJrJ2SqPGo=)**.
---

Friend, I need your immediate attention.

Trump's Supreme Court just ruled to rip reproductive rights away from every single woman in this country.

I don't say this lightly, friend:

**How we act TODAY will decide the future of reproductive rights.**

We can either sit back and admit defeat to these far-right extremists...

**[Or we can RISE UP, meet this ONCE-IN-A-GENERATION moment, and marshal a response so HISTORIC that we make every last anti-choice Republican REGRET what they've done. Please, friend, I've never needed your support more than today. Can you chip in $15 so we can WIN these midterms and finally codify reproductive rights into law?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47242715/353613596/1982135486?&amount=20&refcode=20220630r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNWEyMDI0LWYyZjgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=etJFlPT1CUTucORbu6d6sNToS_TXCNmeYDJrJ2SqPGo=)**

Friend, this isn't a normal fundraising email.

And a normal response won't suffice.

Tomorrow morning, Republican operatives will look at our response to the Supreme Court's decision to see whether strong Democrats like you are fired up.

If we post the same run-of-the-mill numbers, Republicans across the country will think they can get away with ANYTHING.

So friend, I'm asking you to step up in this moment of crisis.

**[I'm calling on supporters like you to marshal a response so historic -- 100,000 gifts before midnight -- to affirm our commitment to DEFEAT every anti-choice Republican that made this happen, SUPPORT pro-choice Democrats nationwide, and FINALLY codify our reproductive rights into law. So friend, can I expect to see your name on my "Pro-Choice Champion" list tomorrow morning?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47242716/353613597/1982135486?&amount=20&refcode=20220630r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNWEyMDI0LWYyZjgtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=etJFlPT1CUTucORbu6d6sNToS_TXCNmeYDJrJ2SqPGo=)**

I know you're livid, friend. We both are. But in times of crisis, our ONLY response can be to stand up and fight for what's right.

Thank you for fighting with me on the right side of history.

Nancy

_Speaker Pelosi and the NDRC are only asking for donations of up to $2,900 per election from individuals and for donations of up to $5,000 per election from federal political committees. Speaker Pelosi and the NDRC are not asking for donations in excess of these amounts or for donations from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks._

clean_body: | | A note from the NDRC team... We want to acknowledge that the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade is hitting many people hard. This decision will cause tremendous harm. The NDRC is committed to working for a future in which all human rights are protected. If you would like to support abortion access directly, =. Friend, I need your immediate attention. Trump's Supreme Court just ruled to rip reproductive rights away from every single woman in this country. I don't say this lightly, friend: How we act TODAY will decide the future of reproductive rights. We can either sit back and admit defeat to these far-right extremists... = Friend, this isn't a normal fundraising email. And a normal response won't suffice. Tomorrow morning, Republican operatives will look at our response to the Supreme Court's decision to see whether strong Democrats like you are fired up. If we post the same run-of-the-mill numbers, Republicans across the country will think they can get away with ANYTHING. So friend, I'm asking you to step up in this moment of crisis. = I know you're livid, friend. We both are. But in times of crisis, our ONLY response can be to stand up and fight for what's right. Thank you for fighting with me on the right side of history. Nancy Speaker Pelosi and the NDRC are only asking for donations of up to $2,900 per election from individuals and for donations of up to $5,000 per election from federal political committees. Speaker Pelosi and the NDRC are not asking for donations in excess of these amounts or for donations from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks. = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Subject: Donald Trump did not act alone
Team,

The January 6 hearings have shed a lot of light on just how sinister, calculated, and violent Donald Trump's plot to steal the 2020 election was. His name occupied most of the headlines and many people are calling for his prosecution.

**We wholeheartedly agree, but also know that Trump did not act alone.**

One man hell-bent on destroying our democracy is just a lunatic screaming into the void _unless_ he is enabled by those around him at every turn. This is what happened in the months leading up to January 6, and it is because of the Treason Caucus and other groups of Trump cronies that the Big Lie got as far as it did.

We believe that had Donald Trump been held accountable by the Republican members of Congress, and if the Big Lie had been immediately discredited by the members of the Treason Caucus, **January 6 would not have happened.**

These people deserve to face justice for their part in nearly decimating our democracy and we believe that if we band together, we can ensure that they are held accountable at the polls.

Fellow American,

Team, THOUSANDS of Democrats have stepped up to defend reproductive freedoms in the wake of the disastrous ruling overturning _Roe v. Wade_ \-- but we can't stop now.**

Our rights are in danger across America, and we need EVERYONE stepping up to defend them. **Our _emergency_ Democratic petition to support reproductive freedoms is still 42 signatures short in Pennsylvania, so please, do your part right now: **

name: Ana Hall via AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: quick personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
Hey team, it's Ana, Alessandra's campaign manager. I'll keep this quick.
I wanted to reach out one final time before tonight's fundraising deadline and ask if you could add a donation. Here's why:
Before joining Alessandra’s campaign, I had the pleasure of working for her in the State Senate. I’ve seen firsthand how she goes above and beyond for her constituents, and fights relentlessly to transform old institutions and systems to deliver for the people.
Alessandra’s leadership and energy are desperately needed in Congress, especially now with so much at stake.
In a few short hours, we're going to lay out our campaign's budget priorities for the next 54 days, between now and Election Day. Where we can invest — or where we can't — all depends on how many contributions we bring in between now and midnight.
Advertising, staffing, voter outreach... your $3 before then can help make those decisions a lot easier.
So please, if you can, here's a link:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?refcode=em220630-2-t1&refcode2=887_59515_GUo5Nm&akid=887%2E59515%2EGUo5Nm)
Thanks in advance for chipping in — especially today.
\- Ana

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?refcode=em220630-2-t1&refcode2=887.59515.GUo5Nm&akid=887%2E59515%2EGUo5Nm)**
---

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=887%2E59515%2EGUo5Nm).

name: General Mick McGuire
subject: From the cockpit to Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIRE FOR ARIZONA
body:
As a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=594eebf4fec842f78df4ccfdf59ef5f4&_e=1cJ0gNQGbrhCfVPKBbZzBPTlDG4qCl3PLYo3MH9Zef4WGBrJ3Nan0KkVyavA8QLAHeNMP_MVeZ890XXQ3Zm7cMhGlcIW_pY4ObT-sRaK8RMlRfzyiX95tjg4zDPLK8nX9I8k7_0xOwUI-c1j7kZHOMyPhEBPchIIiZKPQeIAhtigJJxk__vR1j15RqcQBRKHOj1Rca4BxPgT5YxT6xRFTTDkC_Eexy6P7QXu1pB6unZmImnrzySqvVPxMh5IRQNeAe2lsko_anJhiOviGoDIPFu_2LMy6f-oGfxRb74PjEAY4rx0o4DShGbbSP_YYmvD9miaaUDmjK1v3yNWlQCL_tLi4yD5HzehIC6of29Jy1O8Q_uQlmqgnAoIlb6kveDPdC8Q0OdeckbvrqP0znRNMg%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race.

Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high.

We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory.

Peter, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. Washington is full of career politicians who put their own ambitions over the people who elected them.

**Mark Kelly** is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona.

**Mark Kelly** voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders.

**Mark Kelly** has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety.

**Mark Kelly** has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation.

Make no mistake - we are in a battle for our country and in order for me to WIN I need your help today.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: They Aren't Saying This About Abortion
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_saying_this_abortion&n=1)
---
## They Aren't Saying This About Abortion
### Thursday, June 30th, 2022
Friend, A couple people asked me this week what my thoughts were on abortion. I know most people that have joined us at Action 4 Liberty, joined in the last two years, so they mostly know us as the group fighting government overreach during COVID. But abortion has been an important issue to me since the first time I got involved in politics. Not only am I pro-life, I also see this as an important liberty issue that is getting hijacked by the propaganda brigade of the left (media, corporations and institutions). **Here's what they aren't talking about with abortion:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRboJmdlhSvrwjxPVOj3TtxO&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_saying_this_abortion&n=2)
## [WATCH NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRboJmdlhSvrwjxPVOj3TtxO&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_saying_this_abortion&n=3)
You're seeing the Democrats do everything they can to make "women's reproductive rights" the issue in November. But they screwed up by tinkering with the economy and voters are going to reject them because of what they've done to their family budgets. Who replaces them remains unknown. Let's hope its a bunch of pro-liberty candidates who are willing to do what's needed to take back our country and state! I would love to hear your thoughts on this.
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_saying_this_abortion&n=4 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_saying_this_abortion&n=4)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_saying_this_abortion&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_saying_this_abortion&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_saying_this_abortion&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Flip CA-23 (Marshall for Congress)
subject: Midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
In just a few hours, we hit our first fundraising deadline as the Democratic nominee to flip CA-23.
Peter, this is serious.

# 15 Years ♥️
Friends,

Today marks 15 years of being married to my beautiful wife Laura. In between 6 kids, laughs and tears, ups and downs, health and sickness, we've seen God's blessings!

And as our journey takes us on the campaign trail for U.S. Congress, we are fortunate to have one another. We are in awe of all the friends and family that have come alongside us to support us. THANK YOU.

We are blessed. Blessed to celebrate 15 years, blessed to have 6 beautiful children.

And blessed to be living the American Dream. 🇺🇸

Juan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: This is it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
We have a real deadline at midnight

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/d871f6dc0d89/i-am-running-for-congress-9134098?e=356c0699dd)
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mvs-email?refcode=0601

Folks,

Exciting news — we submitted well over the required number of signatures and have been approved to be on the ballot this fall. Nothing we’ve done to date could’ve been done without all of you so thank you for all of your help!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mvs-email?refcode=0601

The work is just beginning though, and we are working to secure the resources necessary to get our message out that the middle class deserves a break and reach as many voters as possible between now and November. Can you help us by donating $100, $50, or $25 to my campaign today? (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mvs-email?refcode=0601)
DONATE (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mvs-email?refcode=0601)

For too long our concerns have gone unanswered by Scott Fitzgerald — he simply refuses to do his job, and work for us. It’s time to move our state and country forward by seeking solutions regardless of which side of the aisle they come from instead holding us back by playing partisan games.

If you’re tired of the same old same old and excited to vote for a candidate that will answer to you and help push the government back into the middle class’s corner, please consider contributing whatever you can to my campaign for Congress today.

Your grassroots support is what will make this campaign successful so that we can win back OUR seat in November.

Thanks again,

Mike
Contribute (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mvs-email?refcode=0601)

body:
Our second-quarter reporting deadline is less than two days away, and our team is in need of your support. |

| |

| | Friend,

I’m reaching out because our team is in need of your support as our second-quarter reporting deadline is less than two days away.

**This is a huge deadline for my re-election campaign.** I am hoping you will consider a contribution _**before the July 2nd deadline.**_ It’s important to have a strong campaign finance report going into qualifying at the end of July, as the election is just around the corner.

With your help, **I promise to continue standing up for our conservative values and** **working to deliver real results for the people of Louisiana and the Fifth District.** Please consider donating today by mailing your contribution to:
Julia Letlow for Congress

body:
We need your help | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/last-day?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I wanted to shoot you one more message this evening. We are a mere $2,000 away from our quarter end goal. Tomorrow, numbers are solidified and we're on to July. This campaign has momentum and is threatening Tim Walz in a major way.

Will you [help us with a $130](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=cb89a9e17f&e=33b11688c1) (or more) [donation](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=85db29266a&e=33b11688c1)? _That's $1 for every day until election day_. It will be used to [fund](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=051ee22253&e=33b11688c1) our field efforts and knock EVERY door we can!

Governor Walz (who is underwater in polling) wants Minnesotans to pay attention to anything (ANYTHING) that isn't impacting families on a daily basis. He's never even mentioned "rising crime" or "inflation" on social media:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=4f12f73247&e=33b11688c1)

[ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b9d21366b2&e=33b11688c1)
---
| Matt Birk and I are laser focused on public safety, fighting inflation by putting more money in pockets, and lowering gas prices! In 130 days, we will replace the out-of-touch leadership of Tim Walz. [Can we count on you](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e389fdb94a&e=33b11688c1) to help us hit our goal before the night ends?
---
|
In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47239246/353586946/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDE3ODA2MC1kNGY4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkO8eT0mUljojwWQP1i1pcZ9sMeIINaIVdfBgnu4-T0=&emci=d0bec624-b5f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=64178060-d4f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, There’s no question that right now, our country is facing a crisis. Just last week, Missouri was the very first state to completely outlaw abortions, even in cases of rape or incest, leaving many local providers scrambling in an effort to ensure critical healthcare and reproductive care to people in need throughout our region. As the wife of a physician and the mother of a nurse, I know personally how hard these decisions impact those seeking care and those providing it. It may even feel like the work we do means nothing in the face of the opposition’s ability to manipulate our system to achieve what they want. _But I’m asking you to believe that we can make a difference_. We can fight back, and we can win. And we can do what is needed to protect the rights of those affected by the callous and misguided decision to strike down _Roe_. **Extremism must be stopped everywhere.** From the highest halls of justice, to the office of every single elected official who purports to represent you—we must stand up and demand that our rights be respected. I am honored to be in the fight with you and pledge to use my voice and my position to do just that. Thank you so much for your support and your fellowship. **P.S.** _Today is our end of quarter fundraising deadline, and we are hoping to report some big numbers to show our strength. If you can help us out with a last minute contribution, I would so appreciate your support: _
**_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** clean_body: Peter, There’s no question that right now, our country is facing a crisis. Just last week, Missouri was the very first state to completely outlaw abortions, even in cases of rape or incest, leaving many local providers scrambling in an effort to ensure critical healthcare and reproductive care to people in need throughout our region. As the wife of a physician and the mother of a nurse, I know personally how hard these decisions impact those seeking care and those providing it. It may even feel like the work we do means nothing in the face of the opposition’s ability to manipulate our system to achieve what they want. But I’m asking you to believe that we can make a difference. We can fight back, and we can win. And we can do what is needed to protect the rights of those affected by the callous and misguided decision to strike down Roe. Extremism must be stopped everywhere. From the highest halls of justice, to the office of every single elected official who purports to represent you—we must stand up and demand that our rights be respected. I am honored to be in the fight with you and pledge to use my voice and my position to do just that. Thank you so much for your support and your fellowship. P.S. Today is our end of quarter fundraising deadline, and we are hoping to report some big numbers to show our strength. If you can help us out with a last minute contribution, I would so appreciate your support: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: Cecile Richards
subject: We need to fight like hell and win this race.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Cheri Beasley’s campaign in North Carolina is one of our best chances to flip a seat.
#

As I’m sure you’ve heard, a right-wing majority on the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last week — eliminating our constitutional right to reproductive freedom and disregarding nearly 50 years of precedent.
This is not what the American people want. This is Republican politicians putting the government in charge of your pregnancy. Full stop.
Our last line of defense for federal protection of safe, legal abortion is the U.S. Senate. It is urgent that we defend and expand our majority in order to pass legislation to codify abortion rights into law.
Cheri Beasley’s campaign in North Carolina is one of our best chances to flip a seat, so [**I am urgently asking you to make a donation before tonight's FEC deadline. Your support is critical if we’re going to protect abortion rights and secure a historic victory for Cheri in November.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=1&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2574?c0=cb-em-june22.k8UGZr&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=20&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2575?c0=cb-em-june22.3JVybC&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=21&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2576?c0=cb-em-june22.76_gl_&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=22&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-june22.j6DaSN&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=23&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2570?c0=cb-em-june22.f1GelR&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=24&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-june22.kRUvwA&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=25&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)**
---
****
Let’s be clear: this decision to overturn _Roe_ has been a longstanding goal of the Republican party. And if they take back the Senate, they are set on trying to pass a national abortion ban. They want the government and politicians to make the most personal decisions about your bodies and your families.
The last thing our country needs right now is more men in Congress telling women what to do with their bodies. But that’s Cheri’s opponent Ted Budd — he believes abortion should be entirely banned without any exceptions for rape, incest, or in cases where the mother’s health is at risk.
We need Cheri in the U.S. Senate, and she needs us to have her back right now — to fight like hell and win this race.
[**Please make a $3 donation right now to flip North Carolina and send Cheri to the U.S. Senate where she can cast the decisive vote to codify the right to abortion nationwide. The official FEC deadline is quickly approaching, so we need as many people as possible to pitch in and make clear that we will not back down or be silent.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=26&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)
In a race as competitive as this one, I can’t stress to you enough how important these resources are. Thank you for supporting Cheri. It means a lot to me — and frankly women across this nation whose rights are under attack.
\- Cecile Richards
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=27&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)
---
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220630-9-nor&refcode2=1170.357359.vjcght&t=28&akid=1170%2E357359%2Evjcght)**

Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611

name: Wesley, Ted, me (3)
subject: fw: Following up on Senator Cruz’ email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
After tonight, our fundraising numbers go public.
| Friend,
---
I wanted to be sure you saw Senator Cruz’ email about tonight’s FEC-mandated deadline.
---
When the clock strikes midnight and we have to close our books on the second quarter, there’s no turning back. At that point, our numbers will have to go public.
---
**_And Ted has already warned that if Pelosi sees us fall short of our Q2 goal, she’ll dump her _entire war chest_ into Houston to try and stop us from winning this FINAL SEAT needed to END her majority._**
---

**[Rush a donation before midnight to help us reach our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal and keep Kim in Congress fighting to defend reproductive rights →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47240191/353601286/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220630_eoq8_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220630_eoq8_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzg0NzEyMi1kOWY4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tlw0bZ3akVrz-SCtb39mExZoi-DqviejEEu583tQN-Y=)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier
Subject: I will always fight for the right to choose
Date: Thursday, June 30, 2022

Team,

It's been nearly one week since we learned the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. It's been a devastating and difficult few days, but it has reminded me of one of the reasons I ran for Congress in the first place.

As a doctor, I have always believed that deeply personal reproductive decisions should be made by a patient, together with her doctor. And after years of watching male politicians with no medical experience presume that they could make these healthcare decisions for women, I got tired of it and decided to run for office myself.

I am proud of the work I've done in Congress to protect the rights of women to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions, including passing the Women's Health Protection Act last year to make _Roe_ the law of the land. So long as I am your representative, I will fight every effort to take away a woman’s right to choose – but I need your help to stay in Congress.

Election experts are calling the race for WA-08 a "toss-up," and I'm facing four anti-choice Republicans. If any of my extreme opponents are sent to Congress, they will likely support Kevin McCarthy's proposed national abortion ban. We can't put this most important, most personal healthcare decision into the hands of politicians.

I'm hoping to count on your support before tonight's FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to ensure I have the resources to take on my anti-choice opponents and continue defending reproductive rights in Congress.

**Will you chip in $5 or more before midnight to keep the only pro-choice woman doctor in the House? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-june22-eoq](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47240192/353601287/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220630_eoq8_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220630_eoq8_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzg0NzEyMi1kOWY4LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tlw0bZ3akVrz-SCtb39mExZoi-DqviejEEu583tQN-Y=)**

Thank you,

Kim

body:
We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory. | [](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1ab942904ecb401d8999c9eaeac5dc19&_e=TyswUC-XsjyKIa3viPLvceQ-V0bZ1hdcJfCGZw07F7Ychm9GbvZ9XxjmZiVKp2HeR6yemg96AlKeIRgBAufHlI3zZ7DZd_i0NkqdDn_oWuFtsLWdwc22QjG3C5zui7-JsGdgKUiiclcBfnfoJ07Icx3r2i69TeKC5xakxBZKcRotP6qtDqNyu_c8hix3QQPt_2K-RCaszxpFDuHlgDolEXpwTfeKPiVeQbgm7u45qSjxHud1ZuMMm9jERHHhmZrCHpEJItgGyLGQEPhQn38JhgGnU3GfmiC6ajvRjjyOaPVQJ1pnJcZGTvU-9uVeGdQzSA_P_9Vwta9Vwg8MNBnpIKG7kz4420NBtuUx-K139pKVMDXbueD7hnC4y6YpWgioQwKKy-IHseDIXGHo2vwaJg%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race.

Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high.

We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory.

Peter, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. [**Will you join my fight and help send a conservative fighter to Washington to fix the mess the Democrats have made?**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1ab942904ecb401d8999c9eaeac5dc19&_e=TyswUC-XsjyKIa3viPLvceQ-V0bZ1hdcJfCGZw07F7Ychm9GbvZ9XxjmZiVKp2HeR6yemg96AlKeIRgBAufHlI3zZ7DZd_i0NkqdDn_oWuFtsLWdwc22QjG3C5zui7-JsGdgKUiiclcBfnfoJ07Icx3r2i69TeKC5xakxBZKcRotP6qtDqNyu_c8hix3QQPtUGmCcVf_khUktJFfolek84rSwG3msaxFHMIdWRJQMzUo6nprfQH5njpIrh0z3TCmMI76Wus2wCP7bj9zpy9oxEf1SAKSpnBjNLCHq9y9V8iAXpvVC4KE8_83wbfMeapjvwiyFiMViyGrJPLXAulGwjH__lMdNTMkGbtP9GA1Y8vuUbrhJmIaJbmM2nEllPaK_q0pnEVHAAzVub21NZUfVg%3D%3D)

[**SEND A TWO-STAR GENERAL TO WASHINGTON ⇒**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1ab942904ecb401d8999c9eaeac5dc19&_e=TyswUC-XsjyKIa3viPLvceQ-V0bZ1hdcJfCGZw07F7Ychm9GbvZ9XxjmZiVKp2HeR6yemg96AlKeIRgBAufHlI3zZ7DZd_i0NkqdDn_oWuFtsLWdwc22QjG3C5zui7-JsGdgKUiiclcBfnfoJ07Icx3r2i69TeKC5xakxBZKcRotP6qtDqNyu_c8hix3QQPtzadyzGrUgkQ4ZKBeCQ1o-xeicfjEy_wssbE4HxkkhlcsiOkZ1LKWgmMI3EFan28WN7wcw276m7-I0S-tIw19C9EZTfkYle2X4LzHa09gbhM2XQ5hfJGrSQUbbNxhSjH3vCJz5GfxG8I1wfnAphyBOQSZKTfyVNjgYixAW2prhniT6rP1n4TWMLzJMDhBK8rrrZCmpRMEY4CXRXX3ElNK8Q%3D%3D)
Washington is full of career politicians who put their own ambitions over the people who elected them.

**Mark Kelly** is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona.

**Mark Kelly** voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders.

**Mark Kelly** has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety.

**Mark Kelly** has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation.

Make no mistake - we are in a battle for our country and in order for me to WIN I need your help today.

Will you please join my team and contribute any amount and help send a two-star general to Washington to clean up the Democrats mess?

[**Your gift today will go towards putting Washington back to work for YOU and eliminating self-serving politicians like Mark Kelly.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1ab942904ecb401d8999c9eaeac5dc19&_e=TyswUC-XsjyKIa3viPLvceQ-V0bZ1hdcJfCGZw07F7Ychm9GbvZ9XxjmZiVKp2HeR6yemg96AlKeIRgBAufHlI3zZ7DZd_i0NkqdDn_oWuFtsLWdwc22QjG3C5zui7-JsGdgKUiiclcBfnfoJ07Icx3r2i69TeKC5xakxBZKcRotP6qtDqNyu_c8hix3QQPtK71JJ5jFFa06MwIkIeDY9H0jwThuLVtulurbFiEg0r7ky7eiG9dIgfmzizPmKSwSu6WwHQqJAuJJCCpYXAkIb8mhqj5uSfq7mMf8gaXHee3zBydHpoldgsFzTZ8bGF7VjD6XY4fN0bP1DypfdF__sBGarEJKqeQQbpd0HVgc7npUcGAU-fD7GyoDDY4ks2F9LUQB_vDc2whui0irEMnDhA%3D%3D)

[**SEND A TWO-STAR GENERAL TO WASHINGTON ⇒**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1ab942904ecb401d8999c9eaeac5dc19&_e=TyswUC-XsjyKIa3viPLvceQ-V0bZ1hdcJfCGZw07F7Ychm9GbvZ9XxjmZiVKp2HeR6yemg96AlKeIRgBAufHlI3zZ7DZd_i0NkqdDn_oWuFtsLWdwc22QjG3C5zui7-JsGdgKUiiclcBfnfoJ07Icx3r2i69TeKC5xakxBZKcRotP6qtDqNyu_c8hix3QQPttYyPBfmSmiScnZvHjRVHX2EAQKdL1LMThYRrIPxTGJ8aiH0KzrgYHN_zdCZRJc1f7QXWxJcUuKGPnL4S6FZ4lrLQ0DbmRDdtKyjw9Bn5f5MMjsPNwOG7qhsapIELypdqyfTnRv-JIDiDpvTHpaClJGztFBEDj693lqZC-WO1NmYnaDOKeo7WbpUWMGfhRAOOgSEl5WpGvk7m_xaJI-NgFA%3D%3D)
For Liberty,
[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=1ab942904ecb401d8999c9eaeac5dc19&_e=TyswUC-XsjyKIa3viPLvceQ-V0bZ1hdcJfCGZw07F7Ychm9GbvZ9XxjmZiVKp2HeR6yemg96AlKeIRgBAufHlI3zZ7DZd_i0NkqdDn_oWuFtsLWdwc22QjG3C5zui7-JsGdgKUiiclcBfnfoJ07Icx3r2i69TeKC5xakxBZKcRotP6qtDqNyu_c8hix3QQPtlClxLDYyauiSRjr_EiB_RINAs2fyEe9r5SEoNgew6FA3QnrhP6rrmCPKM6REQYEosee5cbjBzHmG2_P0Py7LuaURnCviZAd1NS0nh4nQiwTGQiVzib9Pxs0swFakt2okzopaCoXwXRzNA5X_4NSchvmIukEy62yN1g7FbgsaG4mlAJAv7aks0xXoMExfGYIDIJOeUedYhUYtK5fZ04h9tg%3D%3D)
Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire
USAF (Ret.)

| Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) has dedicated nearly 38 years of his life to serving our country. clean_body: We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory. | Peter, My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race. Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high. We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory. Peter, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border. When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. Washington is full of career politicians who put their own ambitions over the people who elected them. Mark Kelly is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona. Mark Kelly voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders. Mark Kelly has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety. Mark Kelly has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation. Make no mistake - we are in a battle for our country and in order for me to WIN I need your help today. Will you please join my team and contribute any amount and help send a two-star general to Washington to clean up the Democrats mess? For Liberty, Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire USAF (Ret.) | Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) has dedicated nearly 38 years of his life to serving our country. clean_body: | | | Peter, I know it’s getting late, but I wanted to take the time to reach out ahead of our first End of Quarter goal as the official Democratic Nominee for TX-15. Becoming the nominee has pushed this campaign into a new phase, one where we are working harder than we ever have now that we are up against one of the worst choices I could imagine for this district. It’s why this race has made national headlines, and why the DCCC put us on their Red to Blue List yesterday — this race could mean the difference between who controls the House next year. This is about more than me. It’s about more than one community. It’s about making sure South Texans' interests are heard in Washington and the future of this country. With all that in mind, we are going to be battling not only our MAGA opponent, but outside influence trying to snatch this district from us. We won’t allow that to happen. If you are with me, and this campaign to keep the House and TX-15 Blue, then I really need you right now. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly to Michelle Vallejo: | Thank you for your time tonight, Peter. I really do appreciate it because we are a people-powered campaign and we can't do this without you. Juntos, we are stronger! ¡Vamos Por Quince! Michelle Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

clean_body: | | | Hi team, This is a nail biter. We are just short of our fundraising goal, we have just a few hours left to raise that money, and I just know we can do it! With hours left on the clock, These deadlines only come around twice a year. If we don’t show the breadth and depth of our strength tonight, we will have to wait six months for another chance. I’m asking you one last time for your support. I wouldn’t ask if it didn’t matter. I’m asking because I believe in this city and I believe that together we can build a Houston with a robust economy, where everyone has access to green space and transportation, and safe, strong neighborhoods where our families can thrive no matter where they live! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you! Hola Friend, **These are YOUR donations at work! On June 18, Team Zapata hosted a General Strategy Conference where we met with Democratic leaders to share our LONG-TERM plan to flip this seat Blue!** We shared with them our two major initiatives that begin this weekend July 2, and I am so excited to share them with you here today: | **Zapata Response Team 👷♀️** **What: Going door-to-door in low income and low voter turnout neighborhoods to provide community service such as mowing lawns, fixing fences, hauling large items off properties, cleaning garages, grocery deliveries, driving folks to doctor's appointments + more!** **Volunteer:[https://actionnetwork.org/forms/zapata-response-team](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmeqce7ZHAyvdpNV-A5hoSBbC5wikVzpOaCQxk6oFf9BqRKqL_pvUToT5qcoJ-k_Wmw84OoJf-mBjQwMnRsBckCb6gHR1DRoCaZxtHvGp54-JDFsLdtc54KTppH857_EDI-nWWzcF1COMQUCk89vs7819vZvkMWte_SZLTvZxDTLjm3l1RyQ0-n_3Qh3Jh_fV0ltqNo9tbTi2_zeUVxiEnfbXtTHEmor50G5oEZJlIY1ehYTiGOrsTTFr66U7xc_J6BAPUgfROLIspzZW3EdpkkKRSb8IjqUMO2A8uiO5RZIw/3nd/6jkYRelGSCW8ITawpfXVBw/h1/2vwsuqaz5FR0xdHQqHu4xupkm0Raj-_wPO_0NXc7stg)** | **Get to Know Your Neighbor 👥** **What: Knocking on doors of "lean R" voters with the goal of establishing a basis of mutual respect--wherever that basis may lie. clean_body: Back to basics. | | Hola Friend, These are YOUR donations at work! On June 18, Team Zapata hosted a General Strategy Conference where we met with Democratic leaders to share our LONG-TERM plan to flip this seat Blue! We shared with them our two major initiatives that begin this weekend July 2, and I am so excited to share them with you here today: | Zapata Response Team 👷♀️ What: Going door-to-door in low income and low voter turnout neighborhoods to provide community service such as mowing lawns, fixing fences, hauling large items off properties, cleaning garages, grocery deliveries, driving folks to doctor's appointments + more! Volunteer: | Get to Know Your Neighbor 👥 What: Knocking on doors of "lean R" voters with the goal of establishing a basis of mutual respect--wherever that basis may lie. It is important we get to know our neighbors BEYOND political identities. Mil gracias, friend! Team Zapata | | Claudia Zapata is a practical, progressive Democrat running for Congress in Texas’ 21st congressional district in Central Texas. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I know it’s late but…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Republican strategists and political pundits will be scouring my campaign’s report looking for any signs of weakness.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=446%2E5257348%2EdCGRdH)
Hey Derek, I know it’s late, so I’ll try to keep this short.
Midnight marks our FEC deadline, the cutoff for contributions to be counted in our quarterly report. Not long after, my team will publicly file that report on all donations received this past quarter.
Republican strategists and political pundits will be scouring my campaign’s report looking for any signs of weakness.
This is our chance to show them how strong we are — show them that we’re going to fight tooth and nail to defend our majority and protect our democracy.
If you can, Derek, chip in a few bucks before midnight. Anything helps. Here’s a personal and secure link to give: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/jun2022_abs_em](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20220630_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=446%2E5257348%2EdCGRdH)**
Thanks for always being by my side. Talk soon.
— Adam Schiff
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

Chuck is a proud Western North Carolinian. He's a conservative leader, a small business owner, a federally-licensed firearms dealer, and the most wonderful husband, father, and grandfather. American families desperately need proven conservative leaders in Washington like Chuck, who will stand up to Nancy Pelosi and the radical left, so we can take back our U.S. House and restore our conservative vision for America. That's why I'm asking you this: I want to surprise Chuck with a list of all of our friends and neighbors who have pitched in before the deadline... | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for contributing ahead of tonight's critical deadline. Teresa Edwards P.S. The majority in our U.S. House may come down to this district. Adding your name to this list by contributing before midnight may be the difference between taking back the U.S. House, or giving Pelosi another disastrous term as Speaker. | | | | | | | Chuck Edwards for Congress | | Paid for by Chuck Edwards for Congress 337 N. Main Street, Hendersonville North Carolina 28792 United States

subject: FWD: Please, don’t let Scott down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
Today is the first quarterly financial deadline since Scott Baugh won his primary to take on radical leftist Katie Porter. |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=8de8a8fd3c&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter,

In case you didn't see my team's message from earlier, I am officially facing off against Katie Porter in November as the Republican nominee in California's 47th Congressional District. [Click here to become a Founding Donor and be one of the first people to support my campaign to defeat this far-left agitator.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=ea4935ea1a&e=8a657725d1) Through her far-left hatred and condescension, Katie Porter has amassed a nearly $20 million war chest. So, this is going to be one of the closest races and hardest-fought battles in the entire nation.

But, I know a thing or two about taking on tough fights. As the former Republican Leader of the California State Assembly, I've been fighting against the radical left for decades.

**If like me, you’re all in on defeating Katie Porter in November, please consider making a donation tonight. After I won the primary earlier this month, I set a goal to raise $100,000 before the end of June...**

[...Now, there are just hours left, and we're still $4,320 behind fully funding our budget >>> ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=a0b24f84f4&e=8a657725d1)
---
| [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=e7def7ce81&e=8a657725d1 "BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR")
---
| We’re building a movement in Orange County because it’s our responsibility to stop Katie Porter before she makes inflation even worse. Having your support is critical!

Thank you,
Scott Baugh

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Baugh Finance Team** <[info@baughforcongress.com](mailto:info@baughforcongress.com)>
Date: Thu, Jun 30, 2022 at 1:15 PM
Subject: Please, don’t let Scott down
To: Friend <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
---
| Peter,

Today is the first quarterly financial deadline since Scott Baugh won his primary to take on radical leftist Katie Porter in California’s 47th Congressional District. That means all eyes - especially Nancy Pelosi’s - will be on us when we make our fundraising numbers public.

[After the primary, we set a goal to raise $100,000 in June, and with just hours left to go on that goal, we are still more than $7,600 behind. ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=762467e4ff&e=8a657725d1)
---
| [HELP US MAKE UP THE DEFICIT ASAP](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=62eaca08bf&e=8a657725d1 "HELP US MAKE UP THE DEFICIT ASAP")
---
| The stakes of this race couldn’t be higher...

**With the Republican Party’s recent special election victory in Texas, there are now just 4 seats that must be flipped to fire Nancy Pelosi! Scott’s race against Katie Porter is one of those 4 races.**

So, we can’t afford to let down Scott and the entire Republican Party before this deadline at midnight!

Please - Peter \- before we have to send our next fundraising report to Scott, will you add your name to our June donor list with a donation of just [$10](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=9a772f8bc0&e=8a657725d1), [$20](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=560162a948&e=8a657725d1) or [$50](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=7fd574f1d0&e=8a657725d1)? We greatly appreciate your support!
---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEAT KATIE PORTER](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=d861ad1a62&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE NOW TO DEFEAT KATIE PORTER")

| Sincerely,
Baugh Finance Team

Happy Independence Day! I hope you are able to enjoy time with your family and friends this extended weekend. This celebration of the United

| | Gregory Coll Republican Candidate for the United States House of Representatives Wishes You a Happy Independence Day
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Happy Independence Day! I hope you are able to enjoy time with your family and friends this extended weekend. This celebration of the United States declaring independence from Great Britain, and defining the thirteen colonies were free and united, is one of the most memorable events in the history of America. As we celebrate with parades, barbecues, carnivals, picnics, and fireworks this 4th of July let’s remember the sacrifice required for this freedom. Our campaign and my run for Congress is critical to maintaining freedom through the principals and values that I will bring to Congress. There are individuals working hard to restrict our freedoms, increase taxes, and enact mandates on the American people. They have even started to attack children in their education institutions with CRT and other radical indoctrination of sex and gender curriculums in grade school. That all needs to stop. Americans fought for our freedom during the American Revolution, and we have to fight now to maintain that freedom. For those selflessly fighting for the American people and our freedom this holiday weekend, thank you for your sacrifice and all you do for us, and have a safe and enjoyable Independence Day! Thank you for your continued support and please think about making a donation or volunteering to help. More information may be found here: [https://www.gregorycoll.com](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/e1O6tN4nZ/c?w=AbonLuG13o5Q8sA8tq5T9FJ581SMrCp3eZ72ZroPjSw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3JlZ29yeWNvbGwuY29tLyIsInIiOiI2ZWY5YTRlYi01MjI3LTQwYTUtOGVkYS0xMmU3NTAxYTIxOTciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0ZGUxYmQzYy00ZDBhLTQ1NDEtOGRiMy1kYWYxMWRjZDBlYjEifQ) Thank you, Gregory Coll for Congress Gregory Coll, rocket scientist, businessman, family man married with three children, is the Republican candidate for Maryland Congressional District 8.Priorities: Healthcare Services, Strong Military, and Pro-Life.Strengths: Problem Solving, Leadership, and Management.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

subject: Another day in WI, another radical Dem

body:

**THEN,** it was Cory Booker.
**AFTER,** it was Adam Schiff.
**NOW,** it’s Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Shorts.png
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re literally hours away from our deadline.
#
Derek — just like our dude John, we’ll keep this email short(s).
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47972?refcode=em20220630-6375&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6375%2E434096%2EAhUj6J)
**Our next FEC deadline is literally hours away, but we’re still a few thousand dollars short of our goal.**
[**_If you can, will you kick in any amount you can spare to our campaign before midnight? This is your last chance to make a direct impact before our first end-of-quarter deadline of the general election._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47972?refcode=em20220630-6375&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=6375%2E434096%2EAhUj6J)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47972?refcode=em20220630-6375&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=6375%2E434096%2EAhUj6J)**
Look, chipping in $5 or $25 to our campaign might not always *feel* like much.
**But the grassroots contributions our campaign receives from folks like you are *literally* powering everything we do to defeat Dr. Oz, elect John Fetterman, and guarantee a Democratic Senate majority in 2022.**
We still have a lot more work to do + money to raise if we’re going to flip this seat. But if enough folks chip in before midnight, we'll stay on track to keep building the strong, honest, and inclusive campaign that will WIN in November. Are you in?
[**_Derek, this race could decide Senate control, so if you think saving our Democratic Senate majority is worth a modest donation to our campaign, please take a moment to donate before midnight. It’s your last chance!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47972?refcode=em20220630-6375&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=6375%2E434096%2EAhUj6J)
What we’re building together across all 67 counties of PA is so incredibly special. Please be a part of it tonight and throw in a few bucks, if you can. 🙏
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220630-6375-footer&t=23&refcode2=6375_434096_AhUj6J&akid=6375%2E434096%2EAhUj6J)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

But the grassroots contributions our campaign receives from folks like you are literally powering everything we do to defeat Dr. Oz, elect John Fetterman, and guarantee a Democratic Senate majority in 2022. We still have a lot more work to do + money to raise if we’re going to flip this seat. But if enough folks chip in before midnight, we'll stay on track to keep building the strong, honest, and inclusive campaign that will WIN in November. Are you in? What we’re building together across all 67 counties of PA is so incredibly special. Please be a part of it tonight and throw in a few bucks, if you can. 🙏 Thank you for everything, Team Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Reginald Bolding
subject: I just heard some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reginald Bolding
body:
|

|
---
| | |
---
| Hey Reginald, I have some bad news...
---
Gowri
| Let’s hear it, Gowri.
---
Reginald
|
---
|
---
| I’ve been running the numbers all day and it’s not looking good. We still need to raise another $1,250 before tonight at midnight, if we want to stay on track.

Gowri
| That’s a big gap, but I’ll ask our top supporters and see what they can do.

Reginald
|

* * *

Hey Peter — Just sending you this conversation with my Campaign Manager, Gowri.

Look, I know this is a lot to ask, but I really need your help here.

**Your $10 donation could make the difference in determining the future of my campaign, and the future of Arizona elections. I’ve provided a personalized link for you below to join me in fighting to protect and preserve our democracy.**

Thank you,

Reginald

name: Tim (from my iPhone)
subject: buzzer beater
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Hey—this is
the last email I’ll send you this month, and it’s a short one.

We’ve only got a few hours before we close the books on this fundraising
quarter—have I mentioned it’s our campaign’s biggest deadline to date?

It’s late in the game, and we need a miracle buzzer beater if we’re going
to close out the quarter with a win.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15821?t=1007&amount=25&akid=4390%2E3611125%2E9BinSM ]I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t our most important fundraising goal
yet—could you chip in a last-second $25 to beat the clock and help us hit
our $300,000 End-of-Quarter goal?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15821?t=1008&amount=25&akid=4390%2E3611125%2E9BinSM ]Chip in $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15821?t=1009&amount=30&akid=4390%2E3611125%2E9BinSM ]Other Amount

I’ve got your back in this Senate race. I’m counting on you to have mine,
too.

Thank you.

Tim

name: Natalie James
subject: (Urgent) my final ask
body:
I want you to hear from me directly that together if we unite, good will win.
| | |
---
| | [](https://he35og.fd52.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABivl0JczRQmF_cXZAkUusvzftF7V3-2vr-_vynyS3xdZkpV_MQ-FTW1ygBwY-biOfQE-54mXhSmTIWvOZC-DJTQgkaydT1B22T90fqjYW4R6rMnT-A4X-lSUZNAwf_PDoJcrlFnjbBaQQjpou73u9DNN_v2_dvyZIdk77rLDSxvPWvNmDpZq_8hdl044OKJdyOxEeuo5dcfqDMO7qk9-rpt3q6XeCeblURxh_EmpVuBI33EB5Ju32GTJmp_x08PwjYw_-GEPay25hKH6Ii_mJ5GlLUYtMYK9_JSBIkxqmW_5PrHYY0pfyGUXoeA6w5JGi-2ahgX1KXn98Asqkr1zcG-FETopZE2uxPDE6znmTLXWdQnmr-H72nbgMjYTaYx74C02jI_0DCl0LYbQnAcyxj8CCrCQ==)
---
| | |
---
| \-- One of the reasons why I love calling the grassroots supporters who power this campaign is to hear your stories. In my most recent calls, I have heard your stories about standing up for civil rights, for the right to vote, for reproductive rights and more. I have spoken with folks from across Arkansas. And I have had the chance to say thank you, directly, for all that you do for my campaign and in your communities. [** _Our work — to retire a dangerous, extremist senator and begin building a stronger Arkansas — will not be easy. But it is necessary, and I want to take the time to personally thank you for being a part of this team._**](https://he35og.fd52.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABivl0J05gwDrPn_1gnV7lWLhbG06vj_Ms9lWbJUANU73Pk93h3BUoDdQKLsNC2AuC_foDXvEu70Kmv-_OtNq2iagChj83a9QbH-Rku6lV66Jfm6HcvduFo9d-ZwmqU3RGXi4pmQ2vXCgPbJs_KQD7ZhjX9Ps5cKdPtEGLHgGNnd_tlcYhUDt_cjSsbN2h_U-X-NPjSmUMInSPo65jm2ij5N35EPoVAMqp7QSfRLrRMwSIrG4pT4AeQCnNgrtFY4fhqfEPMe62KYDM_k_q_Xj32Ttj0Um83A5c-eKSoTxQpkL8u0hXZzpmf5Sk_44m6a-4FeVhs83t6sYF703sQaooNB_VgDpK31xSmN-2HlDLpSs1L7DBB9l2emJogqLl0xa5HIBEVXhTH0dRpv6AKiXIRa34m8w==) **That is why I am calling our grassroots supporters once again.**[**_Can you chip in $25, or even $5 before to help us reach our $15,000 fundraising deadline goal?_**](https://he35og.fd52.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABivl0J-IhiTDae00gaXE6oyBA0Or-TBhKPqTV3BCvpC28cI_cy31zKOyFR8se4IE-rx6vDR0g7EWtPfLPlcKJnl7bMeUhc35pIsE4BrBCqeqNv86UmvCssUaFauuVQpmFKiFI7bwrMu7QbY9_ot5ScfPmpUBP0RoDdy6k7nDRt7EMK21sX-rR5_D1fYh_djKpmETBBt53O6AMJAMpPkxc9dvR1p42yEvHi66AyPayNNZrkuGzldqfmP04OppdBc3N0dPfBu8PnmF99RlHMSS3QxDYwrCykooObRMtPlx_vyhXcWHMKi8VWLwp2IN1k1oQhQl0rWF5Fx54EPH3O1_SZ-hGoUvL4M3nbdbi3iWL2ettQmiWknI3jxdISW4hBmcSMJ-lkzesthMayntnivnyMOtdTue3IRlb0x_UV6nC-ZB3Vgs4=)

| | [DONATE TO EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY](https://he35og.fd52.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABivl0J6vmAEbFQY7hs6dKXEoWr4Bvig5iaon87IoV3BNuyQfLtO520GFB9h6NLgdUMFNL-hKZQdfaF1ze2yVBhW3x6BmQXP_v5XcfmV1wmYdoFGe-zWYek6XDhDYWf7Hr_x_lqGYdlZRKh9n6s6wmguVY1wpTu468ScSu0TsjQ1kgJobMGf7fyUlkOswaw3QG5Jri3MeIWFJYCb5kcNGJQ6Xak-qRrRuNnXQ_UtQvTg-JgFZYwwlNjgRcXQPf6PZlnZMR66xElk5_WZVzh3mF_m6RyTB6sfuR5M40j9C7yn1Tt5_YJFDqeI9QiNdSUnlYk-BPf4jpzNUFYj8TMWOFgAeGb75NpPJe5ABvGTL3G7pXhj4MMKdCDuIzYydnwYDjPRg2w)

| ** _First Name_**** _, my name may be on the ballot — but this campaign is not about me. It 's about your story, your family's story and the stories of Arkansans across the state who John Boozman has left behind._** [** _Especially after the Supreme Court overturned_** _**_Roe v. Wade_**_** _, it is so easy to feel helpless — but it is vital to remember that we are not alone._**](https://he35og.fd52.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABivl0JVE0fQizJAmJjY3wK8129HZB2Fyq9CZnAdS9Q55VX6eLFY4i3tPEKRN298vhG8QtBucmxTfNmDyX2KTujBIzZnZu2iSoFHZvAQm25R-YQ_BN3BKhLmST4cYrEIZLa4foGcv3XQpGGPD6FvYWA2qwMmqyfdBEACIQrq-DviFCO9GuY_ohGfC2a2k8meirE8h-UzFO-zZsqev2psci4lvSy4sOQXdh8D_ojKuRUvoD0slhmWs7SqMNcEr-6RmbJxlICClFBNLrf3dlOBz_TI_ydiAL5x8yc792IWYkwRXlzicx6V7Lt7kXS_bc6EWMlcDrcNMkZ0B_vd_n3wqT0N95JqD_Wk_7Yxg_Nn4of2FJk9c7Xzq7CP2XPyGI6k6e_qFkCm899m-RQBodn6g7N_vmXbRvQHJ6ex_oR_1EdE5J5nIc=)**_To believe in our ability to protect one another. To lean into our capacity to defend our rights in the streets and at the ballot box. I 'm making these calls because this grassroots team is the backbone of our campaign,First Name. and I want you to hear from me directly that together, if we unite, good will win._**

**Hageman shows why voters are fed up with Cheney in Wyoming PBS debate**
---
Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, tonight clearly demonstrated why voters are fed up with Rep. Liz Cheney during a debate sponsored by Wyoming PBS in Sheridan.
Hageman’s campaign manager, Carly Miller, issued the following statement:
“It was big of Liz Cheney to take time from her busy schedule of giving speeches from New Hampshire to California and drop in on Wyoming in her private plane before heading home to Virginia. Meanwhile, Harriet Hageman has traveled nearly 30,000 miles within Wyoming over the last nine months, speaking to thousands of voters, and the overwhelming sentiment is that voters are fed up with Cheney. “As Harriet showed tonight, Liz Cheney is more concerned with helping Nancy Pelosi with her political dirty work on the January 6th Committee than she is about the problems we face here in Wyoming. Cheney herself acknowledged the many problems we face today – inflation and record high gas prices chief among them – but she has lost her ability to do anything about it. She can no longer be effective because she’s burned all her relationships with Republicans in Congress and the Democrats will discard her as soon as she’s no longer useful. “The citizens of Wyoming do not have a member of Congress looking out for them, which is a crisis when there’s only one House seat. Cheney has abandoned Wyoming and is only concerned about her own personal war with President Trump, yet she is still trying to cling to power. When Harriet Hageman is the congresswoman from Wyoming, she will always stand for Wyoming values and will never forget who hired her for the job.”

###

clean_body: | | | | Hageman shows why voters are fed up with Cheney in Wyoming PBS debate Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, tonight clearly demonstrated why voters are fed up with Rep. Liz Cheney during a debate sponsored by Wyoming PBS in Sheridan. Hageman’s campaign manager, Carly Miller, issued the following statement: “It was big of Liz Cheney to take time from her busy schedule of giving speeches from New Hampshire to California and drop in on Wyoming in her private plane before heading home to Virginia. Meanwhile, Harriet Hageman has traveled nearly 30,000 miles within Wyoming over the last nine months, speaking to thousands of voters, and the overwhelming sentiment is that voters are fed up with Cheney. “As Harriet showed tonight, Liz Cheney is more concerned with helping Nancy Pelosi with her political dirty work on the January 6th Committee than she is about the problems we face here in Wyoming. Cheney herself acknowledged the many problems we face today – inflation and record high gas prices chief among them – but she has lost her ability to do anything about it. She can no longer be effective because she’s burned all her relationships with Republicans in Congress and the Democrats will discard her as soon as she’s no longer useful. “The citizens of Wyoming do not have a member of Congress looking out for them, which is a crisis when there’s only one House seat. Cheney has abandoned Wyoming and is only concerned about her own personal war with President Trump, yet she is still trying to cling to power. When Harriet Hageman is the congresswoman from Wyoming, she will always stand for Wyoming values and will never forget who hired her for the job.” | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

name: Joseph Geevarghese
subject: authoritarian Republicans and corporate Dems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5943?t=1008&akid=3111%2E5885482%2E_Lf4FA

Peter Willis,

Corporate Democrats love to gaslight progressives, but the sad truth is that they are the ones who constantly betray the values they claim to be for every election.

If you scroll down in your inbox, I’m sure you’ll see some desperate plea for money from a corporate Democrat who will put out a nice-sounding press release while refusing to do anything secure the right to abortion.

If Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema decided to end the filibuster to pass abortion rights, we would pass national legislation. But, they won’t – because doing so would make it so their corporate donors couldn’t use the filibuster to block pro-worker bills.

Peter Willis, the truth is this: corporate Dems value their donors being able to crush unions more than your right to control your own body. Can we count on you to rush a donation to help us put pressure on corporate Dems to defend our rights or face defeat in primaries? Our end-of-month deadline is Thursday at midnight, so any amount helps! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5943?t=1009&akid=3111%2E5885482%2E_Lf4FA)

body:
What you need to know >>
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=3529%2E878179%2Egn-MAQ)._
---
**There are three things you need to know about Kentucky’s Senate race before tonight’s make-or-break deadline:**

1️⃣ Charles Booker is OFFICIALLY the Democratic nominee set to face-off against MAGA Sen. Rand Paul in November! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/16215?t=7&akid=3529%2E878179%2Egn-MAQ) 2️⃣ The GOP is dumping millions in dark money into this race because they know Booker can single-handedly ruin their scheme to take over the Senate!

3️⃣ **We’re still $4,532 short of our critical end of quarter goal** to elect Democrats like Charles Booker. If we don’t catch up, _we’ll lose the momentum we need to save our razor-thin Senate majority.
_ [**_Chip in $5 before our end-of-quarter deadline TONIGHT to retire Republicans like Rand Paul and finally FLIP this seat BLUE »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/16215?t=8&akid=3529%2E878179%2Egn-MAQ) | [**$16,000 END OF QUARTER GOAL: RUSH $5 NOW TO SUPPORT DEMOCRATS LIKE CHARLES BOOKER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/16215?t=9&akid=3529%2E878179%2Egn-MAQ)
---
Letting the GOP take back the Senate would be a DISASTER.

With our voting rights, our reproductive rights, and our civil rights all on the line, we _need_ Democrats like Charles Booker in the Senate to protect (and expand!) our fragile one-seat majority.
[**_Electing Democrats like Charles Booker has never been more important. So please, chip in $5 before our strict midnight deadline to help us save our Senate majority »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/16215?t=10&akid=3529%2E878179%2Egn-MAQ)
