name: Jan Kulmann
subject: A few words about the other night
body:
Friend, we may have come short in the primaries, but I am grateful to everyone who supported me throughout this journey. I sincerely thank you for supporting my campaign, donating, and volunteering.
Hi Friend,We may have come short in the primaries, but I am grateful to everyone who supported me throughout this journey. **I sincerely thank you for supporting my campaign, donating, and volunteering.** Thank you to my supporters, and especially to my family - my husband Dave, my parents, and my two children for your help along this incredible journey. __We are disappointed by the outcome, but we respect the voter's verdict, and will eagerly campaign alongside Barb Kirkmeyer to ensure the political progress of our state. __**The stakes are too high to tolerate division in our party. We must stand together and support Senator Barbara Kirkmeyer for Congress in November. Nancy Pelosi and Yadira Caraveo must be stopped.** Thank you for believing in us and our vision for Colorado's 8th District.Sincerely,Jan
--
**Jan Kulmann**
Candidate for Colorado's 8th District [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vgpkt-djdutkitld-r/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vgpkt-djdutkitld-y/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vgpkt-djdutkitld-j/) [ Forward ](https://jankulmannforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-djdutkitld-ACD786B5-vgpkt-l-i) | PAID FOR BY JAN FOR CONGRESS MAILING ADDRESS: JAN FOR CONGRESS3879 E 120TH AVE #290 THORNTON, CO 80233 [Read Our Privacy Policy](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vgpkt-djdutkitld-t/) You are receiving this email as you are subscribed for expressing interest in campaign updates from Jan for Congress.

For internal use only: RD139 [Preferences](https://jankulmannforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/j-vgpkt-ACD786B5-djdutkitld-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-u-vgpkt-djdutkitld-h/)

name: Team Finstad
subject: Need your attention on this
body:
Major deadline tonight
[](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qulukhl-jrhhjlljll-r/) **MIDNIGHT DEADLINE** [](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qulukhl-jrhhjlljll-y/) Friend,

Brad is facing a **major** end-of-quarter fundraising deadline that is just hours away. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: AOC’s Mob Attacked Me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60700714:6Az2wOoSN:m:1:3103520637:C605B09EA8295DCB8B9715D814ADB752:r "MTG Attacked") Peter, I was just attacked by the pro-abortion mob. It's hard to see me in the middle, but I was suddenly surrounded by what AOC is calling "mostly peaceful" protestors. That's like saying BLM's burning of America's cities in 2020 was just a few friends roasting marshmallows. **Roe V Wade being overturned should have been a time for celebration, but instead, I was surrounded and attacked by protestors encouraged to "fill the streets" by both AOC and Maxine Waters.** I'm telling you this is just the start of the Left's outrage over Roe v Wade being overturned. They don't want to battle it out at the ballot box. **They want to battle it out in the streets.** **[That's the violence of the Left and it's why I need your $25, $50, or $100 donation today to ensure I am victorious this November.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60700714:6Az2wOoSN:m:1:3103520637:C605B09EA8295DCB8B9715D814ADB752:r "That’s the violence of the Left and it's
why I need your $25, $50, or $100 donation today to ensure I am victorious this November.")** **I refuse to be bullied by the Leftist mob! They can attack me, punch me, kick me. BUT. I. WON 'T. STOP. FIGHTING. FOR. YOU!** This is a time to celebrate a historic ruling by the Supreme Court for overturning Roe and for reaffirming our 2A rights... not a time for violence. But that's all the Left knows. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60700714:6Az2wOoSN:m:1:3103520637:C605B09EA8295DCB8B9715D814ADB752:r "AOC")From focusing on Defunding Police, government mandates that are driving cops off the job, to erasing the 2A from our Constitution while doing nothing to stop the domestic terrorists that attack Pro-Life groups, it's pretty clear the Left doesn't care about your safety one bit. **And now they 're ready to wreak havoc for the Antifa-backed "Night of Rage."** The "Jane's Revenge" domestic terrorist group has already been attacking Pro-Life Clinics. Now they're taking their violence to the streets - and I was one of their first victims. **[This momma-bear ain't backing down. I will continue to fight for America First values. But, I desperately need your contribution of $50, $100, or $250 today if I'm going to have any chance of winning my election and keeping AOC from destroying our nation.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60700714:6Az2wOoSN:m:1:3103520637:C605B09EA8295DCB8B9715D814ADB752:r "This momma-bear ain’t backing down. I will continue to
fight for America First values. But, I desperately need your contribution of $50, $100, or $250 today if I’m going to have any chance of
winning my election and keeping AOC from destroying our nation.")** Look I get it. Bidenflation is killing everyone's pocketbooks right now. It cost me $83 to gas up my vehicle! But you've got to understand what's at stake here if we back down from the mob. Even Nancy Pelosi refuses to condemn AOC's violence. Communists fight in the streets. Americans that believe in a Republic make their case in the halls of Congress. And I refuse to let AOC, Mad Maxine, or any of the other Leftist bullies scare me away from my principles! **[This is a"dig deep in the couch cushions" moment. I need your help and I need it bigly. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60700714:6Az2wOoSN:m:1:3103520637:C605B09EA8295DCB8B9715D814ADB752:r "This is a “dig deep in the
couch cushions” moment. I need your help and I need it bigly. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?")** Don't delay! We can't let AOC and her Marxist agitators intimidate us. These Supreme Court decisions reaffirm the Constitution as our Founding Fathers intended and we can't let the Left or their terrorist friends threaten our Republic any more than John Hancock, Paul Revere, George Washington and so many other great men refused to kowtow to the British Empire. **[Donate today and help me fight back!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60700714:6Az2wOoSN:m:1:3103520637:C605B09EA8295DCB8B9715D814ADB752:r "Donate today and help me fight back!")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---

name: Jeff Clark Trader
subject: Bitcoin profits?
body:
| Dear Reader, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63129%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SB%2bUoa6Xaj5MdSi4gpNqSw&sysid=1) My name is Jeff Clark... And I have a confession to make. See, when it comes to Bitcoin and cryptos - I’m a boomer. Or that’s what my sons like to call me... And it’s true. I don’t know the first thing about Bitcoin or the technology behind it... All I know is that Bitcoin is here to stay. Already, institutional investors hold $70B of Bitcoin and counting... Bloomberg expects Bitcoin’s price to hit $400,000... So I certainly don’t want to miss out. But I also don’t want to spend weeks setting up some complicated technology... Just to be able to buy some Bitcoin... And then worry about my crypto account getting hacked or losing access to my crypto wallet... Luckily, I don’t have to do any of that... Thanks to this brand-new, unprecedented crypto “move”... I have the chance to rake in gains as high as 660%... 810%... even 1,925% or more from Bitcoin in a matter of days... Right in my regular stock brokerage account. No crypto wallets or crypto exchanges needed... No previous experience. Best of all, this method works whether Bitcoin shoots up to $100k or crashes down to $10k. [**Watch this LIVE demonstration to learn how.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63120%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZXeJbgN%2fPRXKKu18IyOUpA&sysid=1) Sincerely, Jeff Clark

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc3fh1g2k5j7mur9e16neoomem8batcj6u3fuc88_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3hecrb1dbi6ho75cj0sqq33d5lmdh68o30ehomadb0c5gnat1jm9g7fcrl66o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33c5lmdjr4sb6e4ob6p37m2qmash5u)

Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zca7p5nup5e75bpj1piepbhcs63vltug8js21sbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or2c3h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z15mjcvkh0a32r8hi1bjgvgpu03fefbhvvepmap0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or2c3h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Lora Ries
subject: Will you help us stop the Border Crisis
body:
My name is Lora Ries and I’m the Director of The Heritage Foundation Border Security and Immigration Center and former acting
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfr9343pvngfcj5fhtsud3l1sptn09v8ggds3ksg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfaoriepq72cpge3ij1c33e3grbcj5c1im1o9ncpqb8d74s3hm4ohn6pgr4d31eurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor1ddjcup72pjh6sqj4ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim6or3cjhm1ob24no)

---
Dear Fellow Conservative, I hope this email finds you well. My name is Lora Ries and I’m the Director of The Heritage Foundation Border Security and Immigration Center and former acting DHS Deputy Chief of Staff. The immigration policies imposed by the radical Left, beginning the day President Biden took office, have created the worst border crisis in American History. This crisis has exposed the dangers of the Left’s open-borders extremism, which has dismantled the effective policies designed to secure our borders that were previously in place. To make things worse: the Biden administration’s current policies will not only put more Americans in danger but will cost billions of taxpayer-funded dollars. It is time to end good money going after bad policy. The Biden administration's failures on the border **are unsustainable and unconscionable** Put another way, these bad policies have turned an already historic border crisis into a _catastrophe_ with major economic, cultural, and national security implications. Heritage launched a new Border Security and Immigration Center with a team of policy experts with actual border experience who are dedicated to exposing and correcting these far-left policy failures. We are giving policymakers at the federal and state level a roadmap for restoring what the Biden administration has broken— our American Sovereignty. Our Border Security and Immigration Center is laser-focused on providing workable solutions to the Left’s border catastrophe, **[but we need your support to be successful.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0qbrf6562gjb8o4g5i8fbs965jtan40eefkvl0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or0s5h2bs)** Will you help us stop the Border Crisis with your donation today? Please use this secure link to give your best gift now: **[https://secured.heritage.org/lets-stop-the-border-crisis/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhjtmet2qk868cvdg9muaegbcclqad54rpvb51s8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or0s5h2bs)** **We are determined to secure our southern border again. **[**Can we count on you to stand with us?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn72tuvvqejvg80rv4f0tk2vqblbvvlicv38fubg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or0s5h2bs) Thank you for your time, Lora Ries Director, Border Security and Immigration Center P.S. We must fight harder than ever before against open borders and amnesty. Please stand with Heritage and fight back against the Border Crisis here: **[https://secured.heritage.org/lets-stop-the-border-crisis/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkjseu7irdjeo73vnvgcuvn1ppju0iltcmbsqea8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or0s5h2bs)**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: For a limited time
body:
I hope you’re having a good day today.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpbk34omol4q2evfc9g6lsc72usfpggn5aij8hq8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongcmp7ad9hcpin8t9kmcp65dtlmorbapplcpqrco3ks9rjcd1mcdjm4odlmjhmeduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdgmmpmfcjhcpojed9kcuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or0s3h2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zll9h0m2q3j54o2maej0hcnep457h4v7vu4k4j30_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or0s3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsscgvgu7f95k9k2nkp202bmvaikfdsbunok8aq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or0s3h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztd2ih5r3ofcjeveuk6a17mkknqshu7o3a1srmcg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or0s3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: What went wrong with American history in schools?👎🏽
body:
This new book is the solution we've been waiting for
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh8oqt53uc8i4c4qmqpd40iu4e8n3bhi2qmpo9jg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uaob3db3egq69d776doj6s32ckpn0pr3e3j7ctlgelhb8d3661incpb3e6pm3c77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shmcooj1ddksup76phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cdhm6p73cpge49fg)

---
|
---
| | | I'd like to award you a ⭐️ gold star sticker if you can finish this sentence: "Those who don’t learn from the past are _________" Did you get it? I’ll reveal the answer in just a minute. But here’s the problem. Today our country is full of socialists and supporters of big government who are repeating the mistakes of the past because they never learned them. **The way we teach kids American history is totally upside down,** which is why I am ecstatic to share a new resource that every freedom-loving family needs to get to their kids to help them learn the amazing ideas from American history. So did you get the gold star? Here’s the full sentence: _Those who don't learn from the past are doomed to repeat it_. The problem is that young people are not are not taught to learn **_from_** the past. They are simply taught **_about_** the past. That's the message I share in this video, where I reveal our solution — a new children's book that teaches American history the right way. (Scroll down to see a sample.)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjm0qbako4l8gjj377e4he7239eq1h2mp1nmik08_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or6c3h2bs)
---
| _Click the image to watch the video._ We've created a [240-page, fully illustrated storybook](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0fltgur3kbrup2hijq6dhctho0tjo77h1k9go8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or6c3h2bs) for kids age 7-13 that teaches the inspiring stories of our country's founding. This powerful book solves a **critical problem that other history books for kids all have**. Other books... **❌** Focus on superficial facts, such as dates and names of places and battles **❌** Gloss over the Founding Fathers' ideas that revolutionized America and the world

**❌** Don't help young readers understand why what happened 250 years ago is relevant to our world today

In stark contrast to these boring history books, our A _merica's History_ stories...

✅ Help young readers understand history more deeply by immersing them in the stories around the events

✅ Teach the inspiring ideas of America's founding and how those ideas are relevant to their lives today

✅ Challenge your children to learn from the past and apply those ideas to our world

✅ Are filled with examples about how the lessons of history are relevant to us today

✅ Are enjoyable to read as a family and turn history into an engaging story for kids of all ages
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5k8bndj1ps7cmahi6c018mju2tf4bbsbgk2n55o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or6c3h2bs)

| [You can get the launch sale here](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9pg88cnlvmti9su52fm13fmlvo0sk7kbgitdupg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or6c3h2bs). In addition to the storybook, the launch sale also includes: The bundle includes: 1\. Our 240-page, hardcover, beautifully illustrated history book — unlike any other book out there! 2\. Over 200 pages of companion curriculum filled with projects and activities to increase your child's understanding of and love for American history 3\. Over 6 hours of MP3 audiobooks to listen to 4\. Over 4 hours of extra video stories of history These items will be sold separately after launch. If you pre-order, you get everything — which will be $216 when sold separately — for just $74.99.
---
| [Order the American History bundle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8sm464r3jdgigq7jb82ih2i5vat52f7ie51k4dg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdhm9or6c3h2bs)
---
| You've no doubt heard about the Tuttle Twins before. We've sold over 4 million books! Glenn Beck promotes our books on his show every day, and we're often featured in media across the country because our books teach the ideas that America was built upon. Schools no longer teach these ideas. (Even worse, many attack them.) That's why it's up to parents and grandparents to do it. But you're not alone — our team has books, curriculum, and more to help support the young ones in your life and make sure they learn how the world really works. Like me, you don't want your children to repeat the mistakes of the past. You want them to help save our country and make the future brighter. That means they need to learn from the past. And that's what our new 240-page book help them do. Here are some sample pages. (Click the button above to download a full chapter FREE to see more for yourself!)
---
|
---
| Take advantage of the launch bundle now to get over $200 in content for just $75! This expires soon so we wanted to let you know ASAP so you can reserve your family copy. Also, with the supply chain problems, we weren't able to print as many as we would like, so if you'd like to get a book for your family please order soon. This is how we save our country — by teaching our children the inspiring stories of our past. Textbooks and teachers aren't doing it well. We need to take the matter into our own hands. And the new Tuttle Twins book is just the resource you need!

name: HK
subject: Making sure you saw Brianna’s email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Friend, these latest rulings and delays are just a few of the reasons the All On The Line team continues to forge forward in our campaign for fair maps and elections.

We set a goal to raise $25,000 by midnight last night so we can continue this work but we missed it by a couple hundred dollars. Can you support our work by donating $20? Our team prepped this link for supporters like you who are able to help us meet this goal: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aotl-juneeom](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47245832/353617657/-1720992783?refcode=20220701_AOTL_F_EOM2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczMjM0ZWY3LTJjZjktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AW0NT7xkmlxAapHEP7ohSc0FNqHaonQnysmXv_tmOJw=)**

Even when news outlets and political leaders move on, we will still work to support voters challenging manipulated maps and are organizing against the broader conservative national strategy to undermine our rights and fair elections.

\-- HK

From: Brianna Shamsuddoha
Date: June 30, 2022
Subject: Let's talk about the Supreme Court

> Friend,
>
> It has been a very difficult few weeks. We have seen one bad decision after another come from the Supreme Court. So I wanted to give you an update on the impact recent decisions from the United States Supreme Court will have on our nation:
>
> ➔ Just today, the Supreme Court has announced it will consider a case that could give state legislatures sole control over our right to free and fair elections.
>
> ➔ Earlier this year, SCOTUS allowed the use of an unfair map that packs Black Alabama voters into a single congressional district and robs them of the opportunity to elect a representative of their choice in TWO districts. The court will not be issuing a final decision until after this year’s election which means Alabamians will have to vote on unconstitutional maps this fall.
>
> ➔ Earlier this week, the Supreme Court put a hold on a district court’s decision to block the use of Louisiana’s congressional map that violates Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. This delay is forcing Louisianans to vote on unfair maps just like their neighbors in Alabama.
>
> **All On The Line and fair map advocates are committed to keep fighting for fair maps in and outside of court.[ Chip in a few bucks towards our June end-of-month goal to help us keep going. >
> [**The first three decisions I mentioned just impacted fair maps directly. Now let’s talk about _Dobbs._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47245834/353617659/-1720992783?refcode=20220701_AOTL_F_EOM2_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczMjM0ZWY3LTJjZjktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AW0NT7xkmlxAapHEP7ohSc0FNqHaonQnysmXv_tmOJw=)
>
> The conservative majority decided to overturn our federal protections for reproductive rights and have now kicked our reproductive rights to state legislatures. The very state legislatures that we have been working for years to hold accountable and who could now have sole control of fair maps.
>
> Now tens of millions have immediately lost their right to an abortion thanks to trigger laws in 13 states -- like Texas where the state legislature is egregiously gerrymandered.
>
> The majority of this court has shown time after time that the court will protect the ideology of the few over the rights of the many. **This is where our state-by-state and multi-pronged approach comes into play.**
>
> ➔ We are committed to holding extremist state legislators who have or will ban abortion accountable through our on-the-ground volunteer and advocacy work.
> ➔ We will continue to support the fair maps movement in courts across the country.
> ➔ Most of all, we are committed to continuing this fight year after year to ensure our maps and elections are fair.
>

name: Lila Rose
subject: Ensure abortion dies with Roe
body:
This is one of the most surreal moments I've ever experienced. After decades of marching, advocating, and praying, Roe v. Wade is finally finished...

[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os9m9J1hYN)
| [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60415660:s9m9J1hYN:m:1:2532013465:83FF76EB718B9DA36F7C55700BA63DA0:r) [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60415660:s9m9J1hYN:m:1:2532013465:83FF76EB718B9DA36F7C55700BA63DA0:r) [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60415660:s9m9J1hYN:m:1:2532013465:83FF76EB718B9DA36F7C55700BA63DA0:r)
---
#
Friend of Life,

This is one of the most surreal moments I've ever experienced.

After decades of marching, advocating, and praying, Roe v. Wade is finally finished, the false "constitutional right" to kill a preborn child has been erased by the United States Supreme Court.

We are experiencing a truly historic victory for life!

I rejoice alongside you for the lives that will be saved due to the reversal of this horrific decision. However, this victory is just the beginning.

Our work to transform our culture and make abortion unthinkable is just getting started.

Abortion advocates are in an uproar, pushing lies that women will die, life-saving medical care will be eliminated, and the reversal of Roe will lead us back to the "Dark Ages."

Remember, abortion is still legal and even subsidized in many states. The killing of preborn babies has not stopped.

We are now fighting an uphill battle against an onslaught of disinformation and deceit -- the same lies that led to the senseless killing of 63 million innocent children.

The pro-life movement is facing its most critical moment in history.

In order to keep up our momentum for life, we need your financial support.

Specifically, I am looking for 50 people who want to protect babies from abortion to step forward and make a $30 gift before midnight tonight. This will enable us to reach 50,000 moms and dads with the truth they need to choose life. Donate here:**[https://give.liveaction.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60415660:s9m9J1hYN:m:1:2532013465:83FF76EB718B9DA36F7C55700BA63DA0:r)**

There is no doubt about it: the goal of the abortion lobby is to enshrine the "right" to kill a child through abortion in federal law. Now that they have failed in the Supreme Court, we will see more efforts than ever before to pass a national law forcing abortion on every community.

Pro-abortion activists are hoping we call it victory and walk away from the fight. But we will not make that mistake.

We must ensure that pro-life states, like Oklahoma, Mississippi, Texas, and dozens of others can continue to enact laws protecting preborn babies. We must shut down abortion facilities that are endangering the lives of women and putting to death innocent children--and we must continue the groundwork to build a Culture of Life in states like California, New York, and Illinois where abortion-on-demand is the law of the land.

No one has the right to intentionally kill an innocent human being. Our human rights, the first among them the right to life, are inherent and given to us by God. Governments exist to protect those rights.

Please stand with us to build a culture that cherishes every human life, starting with our precious preborn children. Make your gift right now to ensure that abortion dies with Roe: **[https://give.liveaction.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60415660:s9m9J1hYN:m:1:2532013465:83FF76EB718B9DA36F7C55700BA63DA0:r)**

People can change, and they change their hearts and minds when they are presented with the true humanity of the preborn child and the horrfic violence of abortion. And no other pro-life organization reaches as many people online with the truth about the killing of preborn children.

Your gift of $30 today will get the truth in front 1,000 young women and men who are hearing nothing but lies about abortion from the media. You can be a catalyst for change now: **[https://give.liveaction.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60415660:s9m9J1hYN:m:1:2532013465:83FF76EB718B9DA36F7C55700BA63DA0:r)**

We have reversed a deadly decision that has killed over 63 million innocent children, but we are just getting started in our battle to protect the lives of babies for generations to come. The Court can only change laws, it's up to us to change hearts and minds.

Thank you so much for your generosity that can make the end of Roe lead to the end of abortion.

For life,

**Lila Rose**
Founder and President

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60415660:s9m9J1hYN:m:1:2532013465:83FF76EB718B9DA36F7C55700BA63DA0:r)

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Passing along this URGENT request from young conservatives
body:
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9373%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=75FJlXGKxBQtpkGKjEEmFg&sysid=1)
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T%2bkFw5yozSfsNbu1EH%2fXkg&sysid=1) Fellow Conservative, I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training program is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. My staffer Bryan, who oversees the Leadership Institute’s campus programs, sent an urgent email to let me know **the demand by students to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [ **Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36227%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FInpjk6Nx90%2fKOVtcUkc9w&sysid=1) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36228%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qfaaYmhtFuIspdvDXGZcng&sysid=1) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
* * *
**From:** Bryan Bernys
**To:** Morton Blackwell
**Subject:** URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships? Morton, I just got confirmation that we can move the National Youth Leadership School to the university auditorium. That takes care of the classroom space issues we had. But now there’s a financial issue. With the increase in travel costs, we’ve used up everything in the scholarship fund for students’ travel and hotel rooms. My team still have **50 more applications** to process from students who want to come to the training. Is there any room left in the budget for more student travel scholarships? I don’t want to have to tell my team to turn students away who can’t afford to come, but there’s no other option if we can’t get more scholarship funding. Please let me know how to proceed as soon as possible. Respectfully, Bryan \--
**Bryan Bernys**
Vice President for the Campus Leadership Program
Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9373%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=75FJlXGKxBQtpkGKjEEmFg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9373%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=75FJlXGKxBQtpkGKjEEmFg&sysid=1)

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: End of June Update 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
Father Navy SEAL Business Owner
---
| | | | | | End of June Update 2022
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire
I'm running for State Senate in 2023 so we can un-California Virginia.
Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner)
---
| 2A News
---
|
---
| I attended the Second Amendment Institute Champion Banquet with Wicomico, MD Sheriff Mike Lewis, fellow Delegate Scott Wyatt of Hanover and many other staunch second Amendment supporters. Amy Swearer, a 2nd amendment policy expert at the Heritage Foundation, and Phillip Van Cleave, President of the VCDL, both received the Second Amendment Champion Award.
The US Supreme Court is making huge progress on preserving our constitutional 2nd amendment rights. On the heels of last week's landmark ruling expanding individual gun rights, the U.S. Supreme Court on Thursday threw out several lower court rulings that had upheld gun restrictions including bans on assault-style rifles in Maryland and large-capacity ammunition magazines in New Jersey and California. It is our God given right to protect ourselves, "shall not be infringed". I will tell you why crime is up all over America, especially in democrat controlled cities. Over the last two years radical Democrats have defunded, demeaned, and told our police to stand down. The left has made a mockery of our rule of law with progressive prosecutors, funded by Soros, who continually put criminals back on the streets with their "revolving door" policies. On July 1 today Virginia will release 4000 more criminals back on to our streets. People are starting to realize the police cannot be everywhere which is why there are 1 million new gun owners in America. The largest new gun owner demographic is black women. When gun ownership goes up crime goes down. You may remember England banned guns in the 90's and then a few years ago the mayor of London wanted to ban knives because their murder rate there was higher than New York. The left keeps talking about mental health, they need to talk about our right to defend ourselves from evil hearts. I will introduce more legislation in January to expand your gun rights in Virginia. In the mean time, I recommend you join the [VCDL](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-n5_g18MhHKVeiYr-lU9CdKd2WTqf0z2yVPPBUBDiH7wDYN33w4ZYoWbpIWD06NAGW8a7dWHuHsD7h-fRj__QMotKGX0Kns6pAWRdKIF-gSGjSw5rEkYxkRy1feFmM0gS6v3-8TuKN0=&c=HuGrO5VAMKjWndvfcvsBfkgL7dozMSgWpCzZbJNhtuKRu5cA_o3bAg==&ch=yqfIcMNumsJJb9tWEVD0iAtKzrcKKViqj9KN0b48MdX-TDh0FCbluQ==).
---
|
Dear Friend,
We live in the greatest country in history. It seems like every month is a busy month, but June was really busy with the budget, a prolonged special session, primaries, and other events around the district. I'm glad summer is here and I'm looking forward to celebrating Independence Day in a few days with you around the district. Freedom isn't Free so please keep our men and women serving away from home, in our military, in your thoughts and prayers, while celebrating our independence with your family and friends this weekend.
Our Republic is worth saving. Despite all the craziness going on in our country and around the world, keep working hard and keep the faith!
---
|
---
| General Assembly
---
| We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice, represent your interest, and fight for our conservative values in Richmond. Inflation, $5 and rising gas prices, baby formula shortage, high taxes, public safety, CRT in education, school choice, Ukraine, election integrity, infrastructure, rural broadband, healthcare, protecting the sanctity of life, protecting our Second Amendment, and more are on the minds of fellow Virginians. Democrat policies are causing inflation. Interest rates are rising and I believe things are going to continue to get tougher and tougher for fellow Americans. We must remain vigilant and get people back to work. Governor Youngkin, and the rest of us in the General Assembly, are working diligently to address your concerns.
Here is my end of June update, with some of the things on my mind, and what I've been up to around the district:
---
| The Budget
There are things I like and things I don't like about the budget. Keep in mind we have an obstacle course we have to overcome in regards to a Democratic controlled Virginia State Senate. Thank you for voting for Governor Glenn Youngkin. Some of the highlights follow:
This budget is the largest tax decrease in Virginia history, times 4. This budget gives Virginians $4.2 billion in tax relief.
The standard deduction went from $4,500 for individuals and $9,000 for joint filers to $8,000 individuals and $16,000 for joint filers, effective tax year 2022.
There is a one-time tax rebate of $250 for single taxpayers and $500 for married taxpayers filing a joint return. Rebates are issued in FY 2023, based on taxpayers' 2021 tax returns.
A reduction of $372.4 million to eliminate the state sales tax on food for human consumption (groceries) and essential personal hygiene products, effective January 1, 2023.
A reduction of $315.0 million to make the Virginia Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) refundable to 15.0 percent of the federal EITC.
A reduction of $301.0 million to provide an income tax subtraction for military retirees age 55 or older of $10,000 in tax year 2022 and $20,000 in tax year 2023. This is in support of my bill HB 1128, which reduces taxes on Veteran Retirement Pay up to 40k.
This budget invests $159.0 million General Fund (GF) over the biennium in the Virginia Business Ready Sites program, including $50.0 million in FY 2023, contingent upon general fund revenue collections. Funding is intended to support grants in order to develop project-ready sites, which make the Commonwealth more competitive in attracting economic development projects.
This budget has the largest education spending ever in a Virginia budget that includes money for modernizing schools, SROs, and more. There is a 5% salary increase each year for teachers and support positions.
Our law-enforcement folks will get a pay raise and issues like compression, new equipment, mental health, and training are addressed.
This budget allocates a total of $3.5 million for remediation of Harmful Algal Blooms in the Shenandoah River and Lake Anna. This is a success and something I've worked on for a few years with Senator Mark Peake.
Unfortunately, there is no Gas Tax Holiday. A Gas Tax Holiday would help everyone, especially farmers and truck drivers. The Democratic State Senate also blocked the Hyde Amendment, an amendment to prevent tax payer dollars from being used to fund abortion.
A few key issues:
We did modify or eliminate most of the Bad Parts of HB 257 "The Predator Protection Act".
We did make it a requirement to inform parents of sexually explicit material in the classroom.
We did make it a requirement to report absentee ballots by precinct.
We did ban police department "ticket quotas".
---
| In Due Course 2022 Changes to Virginia's Laws
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-n5_g18MhHKVeiYr-lU9CdKd2WTqf0z2yVPPBUBDiH7wDYN33w4ZYv9iDzw2zPHML4ibrz68f5yiwXQimnG4TnCNmrJiAzI5tUxb_dU1f7Ez70abe1Zn1722aD2DxI64Uw8One1fI5gVw-E-hzu1hqwCG3AtHFtU3-HvA9w0gpw=&c=HuGrO5VAMKjWndvfcvsBfkgL7dozMSgWpCzZbJNhtuKRu5cA_o3bAg==&ch=yqfIcMNumsJJb9tWEVD0iAtKzrcKKViqj9KN0b48MdX-TDh0FCbluQ==)
---
| You can read more details on bills that passed at this year's edition of "In Due Course," a publication put together by the nonpartisan staff attorneys in the Division of Legislative Services by [Clicking here ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-n5_g18MhHKVeiYr-lU9CdKd2WTqf0z2yVPPBUBDiH7wDYN33w4ZYv9iDzw2zPHML4ibrz68f5yiwXQimnG4TnCNmrJiAzI5tUxb_dU1f7Ez70abe1Zn1722aD2DxI64Uw8One1fI5gVw-E-hzu1hqwCG3AtHFtU3-HvA9w0gpw=&c=HuGrO5VAMKjWndvfcvsBfkgL7dozMSgWpCzZbJNhtuKRu5cA_o3bAg==&ch=yqfIcMNumsJJb9tWEVD0iAtKzrcKKViqj9KN0b48MdX-TDh0FCbluQ==)
---
| Budget Amendments Day
---
|
---
| My wife and best friend, Tracy, and I ate breakfast at McLeans Restaurant before a busy day, with fellow law makers downtown, at the Capitol for Budget Amendment Day. I voted, "yes", to fully fund the Education Improvement Scholarships Tax Credit (EISTC) program; "yes", to the Gas Tax Holiday; "yes", to the Hyde Amendment, and other conservative efforts. Unfortunately, the Democrat State Senate voted, "no", on most of our initiatives.
---
| American Muscle
---
|
---
| I was in Milwaukee on business and took a few moments to visit a staple of Americana, the Harley Davidson museum. I recommend you visit.
---
| HBCU's
---
|
---
| The Democrats wanted to use your taxpayer dollars to educate illegal aliens. But Governor Youngkin put in a Virginia Budget Amendment # 8 to instead use that money to better fund Historically Black College or Universities (HBCUs). This amendment actually passed the Senate, thanks to Democrat Senator Spruill and Morrissey. To read more [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-n5_g18MhHKVeiYr-lU9CdKd2WTqf0z2yVPPBUBDiH7wDYN33w4ZYv9iDzw2zPHMvehFCrWI1mRSgttrTkLiSCZ9HSc21cPEmeGhGsQZ0d3Su0XNatKgLVwF--h4lTTv6akgTGBfaIFfNC5-lvDoFYqk9W0qvM9eC9D7pDFunVtIZr2YaKZANuqhwLXw3m-eFyO65rJyY2L0qPOZE09Bsofm6Q5SCsfs0q4dnYQXyL7Q1SWfCrm-yHq1hAPLp1JQ&c=HuGrO5VAMKjWndvfcvsBfkgL7dozMSgWpCzZbJNhtuKRu5cA_o3bAg==&ch=yqfIcMNumsJJb9tWEVD0iAtKzrcKKViqj9KN0b48MdX-TDh0FCbluQ==)
---
| HB1128 McGuire Reduce Taxes Veteran Retirement
---
|
---
|
---
| It really is amazing what you can achieve when you work as a team! Tax Decrease Success! For 30 years legislators made no progress on reducing taxes on Veteran Retirement. My Veteran Retirement Tax Reduction bill made it another step in the right direction. After 30 years, my conference report, HB 1128, and the Senate conference report, SB 528, just passed the House! The Senate version, SB 528, had an age requirement of 65 and a max tax exemption of 15k. My bill, HB 1128, has no age requirement, and over three years, it gets us from incremental tax exemption to 20k, to 30k, and reaches a max exemption of 40k. We merged the two bills with the following compromise: There is now an age requirement of 55, and there is an incremental tax exemption, over four years, of 10k, 20k, 30k, and then a max exemption of 40k. They have been trying to do this for 30 years!
---
| Virginia 7th
---
|
---
| We are fired up to support Christian Conservative Leader, Yesli Vega, for Congress Virginia 7th! It was an honor to join Yesli with Senator Ted Cruz in Spotsylvania, just before the primary. I was happy to see Congressman Bob Good, Congressman Dave Brat, and Congressman Jim Jordan join Senator Ted Cruz and me in endorsing our friend, Yesli Vega, for the 7th Congressional District.
---
| Gas Tax Holiday
---
|
---
| We all remember when America was energy independent two years ago, and gas was under $2/ gallon. Do you miss President Trump? Why do you think Biden shut down the Keystone Pipeline on day one? Everything is more expensive these days and it's getting worse. Even though gas prices continue to surge, Democrats blocked Governor Youngkin's attempts for a Gas Tax Holiday. Isn't it interesting how President Biden wants a Gas Tax Holiday now? These are crazy times!
---
| Budget Rally at Tom Leonard's Farmers Market
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Governor Glenn Youngkin signed his first budget at my friend's store, Tom Leonard's Farmers Market, right here in my Virginia House District 56! Thanks for the shout out to the huge crowd, Tom. This budget has the largest tax decrease in Virginia history and it includes school choice options, eliminates the Virginia State grocery tax, and it has unprecedented funding for education & law enforcement.
---
| "2000 Mules", Louisa County, July 13th
---
|
---
| The Louisa Tea Party and I Invite you to join us to see the movie, "2000 Mules", at the Louisa Jefferson Madison Library, on Wednesday, July 13th, at 7pm. Please sign up and bring ten friends. Put the word, "Louisa", in the email subject line. RSVP to [john@mcguireforvirginia.com](mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com)
---
| "2000 Mules", Hanover County, July 14th
---
|
---
| We will also show the movie, "2000 Mules", in Hanover County on Thursday, July 14th, at 7pm, at the Montpelier Center for Arts and Education. Please sign up and bring ten friends. Put the word, "Hanover", in the email subject line.
RSVP to [john@mcguireforvirginia.com](mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com)
---
| "2000 Mules", Goochland Success
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you, Goochland Tea Party, Senator Amanda Chase, and constituents from all over central Virginia, for coming out to support and watch the movie, "2000 Mules". We really appreciate our security team that included some amazing Goochland County Sheriff deputies. Isn't it interesting who those who protest the most about this movie haven't even seen the movie? It is imperative that we work together to stop voter fraud. This year, we must win our congressional seats, in order to stop the radical Biden White House. Become an election worker, a pole watcher, and volunteer wherever you can, so we can have free and safe elections! I'm running for the Virginia State Senate in 2023 so we can "un- California" Virginia, and it starts with election integrity! I will be showing this movie all over Senate District 10.
---
| The Day in May (June)
---
|
---
| Stone Office Equipment's, "The Day in May", was postponed to the month of June this year. On this day, Stone office Equipment employees gather to honor police officers, firefighters, veterans, and others from Hanover, Henrico, and other places. They also recognize charities they support, and paid respects to deceased officers, Trey Sutton, Mike Christianson, and others. It was great to meet folks from The Patriot PAC, Cameron Gallagher Foundation, The Jillian Fund, The Children's Hospital, Riverside School, Henrico Police and Fire Foundation, State Police Association, and more.

clean_body: Father Navy SEAL Business Owner | | | | | | End of June Update 2022 | VA Delegate John McGuire I'm running for State Senate in 2023 so we can un-California Virginia. Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner) | 2A News | | I attended the Second Amendment Institute Champion Banquet with Wicomico, MD Sheriff Mike Lewis, fellow Delegate Scott Wyatt of Hanover and many other staunch second Amendment supporters. Amy Swearer, a 2nd amendment policy expert at the Heritage Foundation, and Phillip Van Cleave, President of the VCDL, both received the Second Amendment Champion Award. The US Supreme Court is making huge progress on preserving our constitutional 2nd amendment rights. On the heels of last week's landmark ruling expanding individual gun rights, the U.S. Supreme Court on Thursday threw out several lower court rulings that had upheld gun restrictions including bans on assault-style rifles in Maryland and large-capacity ammunition magazines in New Jersey and California. It is our God given right to protect ourselves, "shall not be infringed". I will tell you why crime is up all over America, especially in democrat controlled cities. Over the last two years radical Democrats have defunded, demeaned, and told our police to stand down. The left has made a mockery of our rule of law with progressive prosecutors, funded by Soros, who continually put criminals back on the streets with their "revolving door" policies. On July 1 today Virginia will release 4000 more criminals back on to our streets. People are starting to realize the police cannot be everywhere which is why there are 1 million new gun owners in America. The largest new gun owner demographic is black women. When gun ownership goes up crime goes down. You may remember England banned guns in the 90's and then a few years ago the mayor of London wanted to ban knives because their murder rate there was higher than New York. The left keeps talking about mental health, they need to talk about our right to defend ourselves from evil hearts. I will introduce more legislation in January to expand your gun rights in Virginia. In the mean time, I recommend you join the ==. | Dear Friend, We live in the greatest country in history. It seems like every month is a busy month, but June was really busy with the budget, a prolonged special session, primaries, and other events around the district. I'm glad summer is here and I'm looking forward to celebrating Independence Day in a few days with you around the district. Freedom isn't Free so please keep our men and women serving away from home, in our military, in your thoughts and prayers, while celebrating our independence with your family and friends this weekend. Our Republic is worth saving. Despite all the craziness going on in our country and around the world, keep working hard and keep the faith! | | General Assembly | We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice, represent your interest, and fight for our conservative values in Richmond. Inflation, $5 and rising gas prices, baby formula shortage, high taxes, public safety, CRT in education, school choice, Ukraine, election integrity, infrastructure, rural broadband, healthcare, protecting the sanctity of life, protecting our Second Amendment, and more are on the minds of fellow Virginians. Democrat policies are causing inflation. Interest rates are rising and I believe things are going to continue to get tougher and tougher for fellow Americans. We must remain vigilant and get people back to work. Governor Youngkin, and the rest of us in the General Assembly, are working diligently to address your concerns. Here is my end of June update, with some of the things on my mind, and what I've been up to around the district: | The Budget There are things I like and things I don't like about the budget. Keep in mind we have an obstacle course we have to overcome in regards to a Democratic controlled Virginia State Senate. Thank you for voting for Governor Glenn Youngkin. Some of the highlights follow: This budget is the largest tax decrease in Virginia history, times 4. This budget gives Virginians $4.2 billion in tax relief. The standard deduction went from $4,500 for individuals and $9,000 for joint filers to $8,000 individuals and $16,000 for joint filers, effective tax year 2022. There is a one-time tax rebate of $250 for single taxpayers and $500 for married taxpayers filing a joint return. Rebates are issued in FY 2023, based on taxpayers' 2021 tax returns. A reduction of $372.4 million to eliminate the state sales tax on food for human consumption (groceries) and essential personal hygiene products, effective January 1, 2023. A reduction of $315.0 million to make the Virginia Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) refundable to 15.0 percent of the federal EITC. A reduction of $301.0 million to provide an income tax subtraction for military retirees age 55 or older of $10,000 in tax year 2022 and $20,000 in tax year 2023. This is in support of my bill HB 1128, which reduces taxes on Veteran Retirement Pay up to 40k. This budget invests $159.0 million General Fund (GF) over the biennium in the Virginia Business Ready Sites program, including $50.0 million in FY 2023, contingent upon general fund revenue collections. Funding is intended to support grants in order to develop project-ready sites, which make the Commonwealth more competitive in attracting economic development projects. This budget has the largest education spending ever in a Virginia budget that includes money for modernizing schools, SROs, and more. There is a 5% salary increase each year for teachers and support positions. Our law-enforcement folks will get a pay raise and issues like compression, new equipment, mental health, and training are addressed. This budget allocates a total of $3.5 million for remediation of Harmful Algal Blooms in the Shenandoah River and Lake Anna. This is a success and something I've worked on for a few years with Senator Mark Peake. Unfortunately, there is no Gas Tax Holiday. A Gas Tax Holiday would help everyone, especially farmers and truck drivers. The Democratic State Senate also blocked the Hyde Amendment, an amendment to prevent tax payer dollars from being used to fund abortion. A few key issues: We did modify or eliminate most of the Bad Parts of HB 257 "The Predator Protection Act". We did make it a requirement to inform parents of sexually explicit material in the classroom. We did make it a requirement to report absentee ballots by precinct. We did ban police department "ticket quotas". | In Due Course 2022 Changes to Virginia's Laws | == | You can read more details on bills that passed at this year's edition of "In Due Course," a publication put together by the nonpartisan staff attorneys in the Division of Legislative Services by == | Budget Amendments Day | | My wife and best friend, Tracy, and I ate breakfast at McLeans Restaurant before a busy day, with fellow law makers downtown, at the Capitol for Budget Amendment Day. I voted, "yes", to fully fund the Education Improvement Scholarships Tax Credit (EISTC) program; "yes", to the Gas Tax Holiday; "yes", to the Hyde Amendment, and other conservative efforts. Unfortunately, the Democrat State Senate voted, "no", on most of our initiatives. | American Muscle | | I was in Milwaukee on business and took a few moments to visit a staple of Americana, the Harley Davidson museum. I recommend you visit. | HBCU's | | The Democrats wanted to use your taxpayer dollars to educate illegal aliens. But Governor Youngkin put in a Virginia Budget Amendment # 8 to instead use that money to better fund Historically Black College or Universities (HBCUs). This amendment actually passed the Senate, thanks to Democrat Senator Spruill and Morrissey. To read more == | HB1128 McGuire Reduce Taxes Veteran Retirement | | | It really is amazing what you can achieve when you work as a team! Tax Decrease Success! For 30 years legislators made no progress on reducing taxes on Veteran Retirement. My Veteran Retirement Tax Reduction bill made it another step in the right direction. After 30 years, my conference report, HB 1128, and the Senate conference report, SB 528, just passed the House! The Senate version, SB 528, had an age requirement of 65 and a max tax exemption of 15k. My bill, HB 1128, has no age requirement, and over three years, it gets us from incremental tax exemption to 20k, to 30k, and reaches a max exemption of 40k. We merged the two bills with the following compromise: There is now an age requirement of 55, and there is an incremental tax exemption, over four years, of 10k, 20k, 30k, and then a max exemption of 40k. They have been trying to do this for 30 years! | Virginia 7th | | We are fired up to support Christian Conservative Leader, Yesli Vega, for Congress Virginia 7th! It was an honor to join Yesli with Senator Ted Cruz in Spotsylvania, just before the primary. I was happy to see Congressman Bob Good, Congressman Dave Brat, and Congressman Jim Jordan join Senator Ted Cruz and me in endorsing our friend, Yesli Vega, for the 7th Congressional District. | Gas Tax Holiday | | We all remember when America was energy independent two years ago, and gas was under $2/ gallon. Do you miss President Trump? Why do you think Biden shut down the Keystone Pipeline on day one? Everything is more expensive these days and it's getting worse. Even though gas prices continue to surge, Democrats blocked Governor Youngkin's attempts for a Gas Tax Holiday. Isn't it interesting how President Biden wants a Gas Tax Holiday now? These are crazy times! | Budget Rally at Tom Leonard's Farmers Market | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin signed his first budget at my friend's store, Tom Leonard's Farmers Market, right here in my Virginia House District 56! Thanks for the shout out to the huge crowd, Tom. This budget has the largest tax decrease in Virginia history and it includes school choice options, eliminates the Virginia State grocery tax, and it has unprecedented funding for education & law enforcement. | "2000 Mules", Louisa County, July 13th | | The Louisa Tea Party and I Invite you to join us to see the movie, "2000 Mules", at the Louisa Jefferson Madison Library, on Wednesday, July 13th, at 7pm. Please sign up and bring ten friends. Put the word, "Louisa", in the email subject line. Please sign up and bring ten friends. Put the word, "Hanover", in the email subject line. We really appreciate our security team that included some amazing Goochland County Sheriff deputies. Isn't it interesting who those who protest the most about this movie haven't even seen the movie? It is imperative that we work together to stop voter fraud. This year, we must win our congressional seats, in order to stop the radical Biden White House. Become an election worker, a pole watcher, and volunteer wherever you can, so we can have free and safe elections! I'm running for the Virginia State Senate in 2023 so we can "un- California" Virginia, and it starts with election integrity! name: Charlie Crist
subject: the unstoppable strength of this grassroots team
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
a humble “thank you,” from me to you |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47246463/353618559/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220701_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc3NjNmMy0zM2Y5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sioz78XX7QuH3bo2bPnWtgNLr8hUtKZh57VDllA2DTc=)
---
Hi friends, I know my team has sent you a lot of emails in the past few days, so I don’t want to take up too much of your time.

I just wanted to say — from the bottom of my heart — **_thank you so much for your support in this last quarter._** We hit our goal (and then some), and none of that would be possible without folks like you.

These past few months have shown the unstoppable strength of this grassroots team:
* According to NBC News, a new survey by a top GOP pollster (!) showed me leading Gov. DeSantis in the race.
* Plus, St. Pete Polls dropped a poll showing my campaign leading in **_every region_** of Florida.

So thank you again for your support, friends. Thank you so much.

**However, while we may have the momentum, Gov. Ron DeSantis has an army of far-right, billionaire backers. They’re prepared to spend millions to reelect him, so it’s going to take a lot of money to win — and there’s only one full quarter left before the election.

_[I hate to ask, but if you have a few dollars to spare, could you contribute to my campaign? If not, I understand — though please know that every donation goes a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47246464/353618560/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220701_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc3NjNmMy0zM2Y5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sioz78XX7QuH3bo2bPnWtgNLr8hUtKZh57VDllA2DTc=)_**

Thanks again,
Charlie Crist

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47246465/353618561/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220701_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc3NjNmMy0zM2Y5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sioz78XX7QuH3bo2bPnWtgNLr8hUtKZh57VDllA2DTc=)

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Urgent scholarship request for young conservatives
body:
I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the L
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zef86h1a4c9qpbp96bf3vp6852v9cdp9se4e6hog_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ujjm6ptlcdo66sr16spj4t9l6ko7fc3n64oefcrhc2qb4t5ledqe6o9he9hmdc77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shmcooj5ddjcurm4phim2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cdhmeor0s9ie49fg)
I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5dc9ptam4mln8vhb0og52mcnt57sa6ecfa2612o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdjm6o72cjh2bs) Fellow Conservative, I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training programs is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. **My staff just sent me an urgent email to let me know the demand to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [ **Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvm93otmr43c16435qq0n1hd8u2juo0hgbci06u8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdjm6o72cjh2bs) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvk44km19oov6dtifeluub3b92nmlqhvj2dr3too_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdjm6o72cjh2bs) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
I want to personally invite you to our campaign's next big event — the Takoma Park July 4th parade!

| Peter, I want to personally invite you to our campaign's next big event — the Takoma Park July 4th parade! **Can you join John King and the rest of the team at 9:30AM to walk in the parade?** [_**Sign up here!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47248063/353622906/-1573984928?utm_campaign=parades&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGNkZjE4OS0zOWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-haDbQsR1Zsy1GKv29J1ZOGKqHp9JxHbrZ-HtoxuX4=&emci=68f2aab5-dbf7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=b8cdf189-39f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484) Please let me know if you have any questions by emailing me at _**ben@johnkingforgovernor.com**_. We hope to see you there in your best red, white, and blue! Can't make it? name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: We know by now that courts matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
We should know by now that courts matter, .
With the overturning of Roe v. Wade and Planned Parenthood v. Casey, we understand the importance of the U.S. Supreme Court. With that said, last week’s ruling should be a clarion call to everyone about how important the lower courts are, as a case initiated in Mississippi had national repercussions.
NPP's Kadida Kenner recently spoke with Law.com [https://www.law.com/thelegalintelligencer/2022/06/27/time-is-running-out-3rd-circuit-nominee-clears-senate-hurdle-but-some-skeptical-of-confirmation-as-midterms-loom/] [https://www.law.com/thelegalintelligencer/2022/06/27/time-is-running-out-3rd-circuit-nominee-clears-senate-hurdle-but-some-skeptical-of-confirmation-as-midterms-loom/] on the heightened urgency to move Pennsylvania's lower court nominations along following the U.S. Supreme Court’s ruling Friday in Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization.
'Kenner said Toomey’s abstention, and his 2016 decision to block the nomination of Rebecca Ross Haywood, who would have become the first Black woman on the Third Circuit, were ironic given his recent Tweets offering support for Juneteenth, which commemorates the end of slavery.
“We ask for Toomey to live up to what he likes to tweet about when it relates to the advancement of Black people in this country,” Kenner said.' You can read the full article here. [https://www.newpaproject.org/time-is-running-out-3rd-circuit-nominee-clears-senate-hurdle-but-some-skeptical-of-confirmation-as-midterms-loom/]
Here's are some quick updates before we head into the weekend.
News Roundup
With Roe headed to the states, every vote this fall matters | Pennsylvania Capital Star [https://www.penncapital-star.com/commentary/with-roe-headed-to-the-states-every-vote-this-fall-matters-monday-morning-coffee/]
Speaking for a tyrannical minority, the Supreme Court widened the cracks in our national foundation. Read more . [https://www.penncapital-star.com/commentary/with-roe-headed-to-the-states-every-vote-this-fall-matters-monday-morning-coffee/]
PA Republicans Pushing Constitutional Amendment To Control Women’s Bodies | Bucks County Beacon [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2022/06/pa-republicans-pushing-constitutional-amendment-to-control-womens-bodies/]
Democratic Governor Tom Wolf has vetoed every piece of anti-abortion legislation passed by the Republicans since 2015, which is why Senate Bill-956 is so dangerous. Read More. [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2022/06/pa-republicans-pushing-constitutional-amendment-to-control-womens-bodies/]
The clock is ticking for lawmakers, Wolf to agree on 2022-23 budget. What to know so far | Pennsylvania Capital Star [https://www.penncapital-star.com/government-politics/the-clock-is-ticking-for-lawmakers-wolf-to-agree-on-2022-23-budget-what-to-know-so-far/]
Lawmakers have until midnight on Thursday to pass a spending plan that allocates billions of dollars to fund education, economic growth, community development, and human services. Read more. [https://www.penncapital-star.com/government-politics/the-clock-is-ticking-for-lawmakers-wolf-to-agree-on-2022-23-budget-what-to-know-so-far/]
The Link Between Voting Rights and the Abortion Ruling | Washington Post [https://www.washingtonpost.com/outlook/2022/06/28/dobbs-voting-rights-minority-rule/]
Looking ahead, the Supreme Court is also poised to make it easier for states to dilute the voting power of racial minorities. Here's what you need to know Read more. [https://www.washingtonpost.com/outlook/2022/06/28/dobbs-voting-rights-minority-rule/]

clean_body: [] We should know by now that courts matter, . With the overturning of Roe v. Wade and Planned Parenthood v. Casey, we understand the importance of the U.S. Supreme Court. With that said, last week’s ruling should be a clarion call to everyone about how important the lower courts are, as a case initiated in Mississippi had national repercussions. NPP's Kadida Kenner recently spoke with Law.com [] [] on the heightened urgency to move Pennsylvania's lower court nominations along following the U.S. Supreme Court’s ruling Friday in Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization. 'Kenner said Toomey’s abstention, and his 2016 decision to block the nomination of Rebecca Ross Haywood, who would have become the first Black woman on the Third Circuit, were ironic given his recent Tweets offering support for Juneteenth, which commemorates the end of slavery. “We ask for Toomey to live up to what he likes to tweet about when it relates to the advancement of Black people in this country,” Kenner said.' You can read the full article here. [] Here's are some quick updates before we head into the weekend. News Roundup With Roe headed to the states, every vote this fall matters | Pennsylvania Capital Star [] Speaking for a tyrannical minority, the Supreme Court widened the cracks in our national foundation. Read more . [] PA Republicans Pushing Constitutional Amendment To Control Women’s Bodies | Bucks County Beacon [] Democratic Governor Tom Wolf has vetoed every piece of anti-abortion legislation passed by the Republicans since 2015, which is why Senate Bill-956 is so dangerous. Read More. [] The clock is ticking for lawmakers, Wolf to agree on 2022-23 budget. What to know so far | Pennsylvania Capital Star [] Lawmakers have until midnight on Thursday to pass a spending plan that allocates billions of dollars to fund education, economic growth, community development, and human services. Read more. [] The Link Between Voting Rights and the Abortion Ruling | Washington Post [] Looking ahead, the Supreme Court is also poised to make it easier for states to dilute the voting power of racial minorities. Here's what you need to know Read more. [] We're Hiring: Chief Operating Officer (COO) Just posted: We're currently hiring a full-time Chief Operating Officer [] to join our team. [] Visit our website [] to learn more about job opportunities with Team NPP. To apply, please email your resume to jobs@newpaproject.org [jobs@newpaproject.org] and indicate the position you are applying for on the subject line. Third Annual Community Oration of Frederick Douglass's "What To The Slave is The Fourth of July?" NPP’s Kadida Kenner will be participating as an orator in the third Annual Frederick Douglass Community Oration. This event will be held under the same copse of trees on the main campus of Lebanon Valley College on Monday, July 4th at 12:00 p.m. [] We're on a mission to register 50,000 voters in the Commonwealth Your investment in our work will help us register Pennsylvanians in underrepresented and often neglected communities of color. Every cent counts towards our goal. [] Invest in our democracy [] The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Politics as usual cannot go on. It’s up to us to change the narrative.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I need to ask more of you now. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47249096/353626347/823540626?refcode=ea.e0c529ba-3df9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e0c529ba-3df9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGM1MjliYS0zZGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOny7UOIKYC24rrzsbGtVqZ_R_ga1UIvnOtLn61GffA=&emci=f220a07c-cdf7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0c529ba-3df9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Politics as usual can’t go on any longer. Not now. We can’t pretend that our most fundamental rights are not under attack or that our democracy isn’t threatened from within. We can’t accept more of the same from the Republican Party. We must _refuse_ to let them drag us backward. **Politics as usual _can’t_ go on. But participating in electoral politics is also how we change the narrative.** Peter, thank you for your support over the last few days, as we all came to terms with our post-_Roe_ reality. Your generosity will make it possible for us to support pro-choice Democratic candidates up and down the NC ballot. I knew I could count on you, and now I need to ask more from you. Our fundamental rights are on the line in November and in _every_ election to come. I will defend reproductive choice in our state as long as I have the veto power to do so — and blocking GOP supermajorities in Raleigh will require your continued support. **[Please, consider a monthly donation of $5, $10, or any amount that is right for you to power our work electing North Carolina Democrats up and down the ballot. We’re in a fight we cannot lose, and with your support, we WILL | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47249605/353628078/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzJjOTQ2OS0zZWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2ItVPciNHFamIu7fb47cC4zjBBrPGmz2OiVXNQ_mqI=)

Peter: Gov. Lujan Grisham is running against a GOP candidate whose views are _seriously backward_ _._
Mark Ronchetti is a far-right conservative who is spreading lies about Gov. Lujan Grisham's support for reproductive choice, and __ he __ wants to take us back decades – but we won't let him.
**To stop Ronchetti's MAGA movement in its tracks, we set an emergency goal to raise $150,000 before our reporting deadline on Saturday at midnight. [Please, will you donate $5 now to safeguard our freedoms and protect New Mexico from the GOP?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47249606/353628079/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzJjOTQ2OS0zZWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2ItVPciNHFamIu7fb47cC4zjBBrPGmz2OiVXNQ_mqI=)**
Gov. Lujan Grisham has enacted countless policies to better our state – from legalizing cannabis to taking bold action to protect access to abortion. While she's been a public servant her whole life and has deep roots in New Mexico, Ronchetti is a career weatherman with zero political leadership experience.
**We can't let the GOP replace New Mexico's first Democratic Hispanic woman to serve as Governor with a GOP radical who would take our state back to a time when _women were treated as second-class citizens._**
**[Our reporting deadline this Saturday is our most important fundraising milestone yet, so we have to ask: Will you please contribute $5 before midnight to help us reach our emergency $150,000 goal and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47249607/353628080/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzJjOTQ2OS0zZWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2ItVPciNHFamIu7fb47cC4zjBBrPGmz2OiVXNQ_mqI=)**
Thanks for your support,

Team MLG
