Peter, the lack of safe, affordable housing in New York is a crisis.

I’ve spent every moment as your attorney general fighting against decades of discriminatory housing practices, manipulative private investors who have gone unchecked for too long, and the irreparable damage that COVID-19 has left on our communities – but there is still so much work to be done for our communities.
A survey conducted last year showed that a majority of low-income Black New Yorkers ranked “affordable housing” as their **_top priority_**, especially as families continue to pull themselves out of staggering amounts of back rent. And even worse, **_the Bronx – a predominantly Black and Hispanic borough – has the highest concentration of eviction cases in the state of New York. _**
It’s abundantly clear that the housing crisis hits our communities the hardest. When I became attorney general, I vowed to do everything in my power to defend the forgotten and powerless, and protecting the right to affordable housing is a key part of my work.

**But, Peter, I can’t win this fight alone. That’s why I need to collect at least 5,000 responses for my housing survey before midnight tonight, but I’m still missing your voice. So please, take a moment now to respond:**
| | **Should everyone have access to affordable housing?**

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Please see – FW: URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships?
body:
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4aq0dkk3rk1kvkj7mh26o72c1q5m52b6r0la0d8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0or0shh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thm6poe2t9gcmpjctphmuqbepjk6con8tpjmqom8dphc4qmedjhc4pnap77c1o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33c5lmdjreo3664rjac77m2qmash5u)
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1p4ktufn7qljqs5v580bbcepgo1fatcu6kn0tlo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0or0shh2bs) Fellow Conservative, I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training program is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. My staffer Bryan, who oversees the Leadership Institute’s campus programs, sent an urgent email to let me know **the demand by students to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [ **Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjq76c7ua662vff3ij34e3mv3lgfboohbkiui558_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0or0shh2bs) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjgdmkq0g9hubsn38953ssb9bcbfg7q4q6tg6c20_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0or0shh2bs) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
* * *
**From:** Bryan Bernys
**To:** Morton Blackwell
**Subject:** URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships? Morton, I just got confirmation that we can move the National Youth Leadership School to the university auditorium. That takes care of the classroom space issues we had. But now there’s a financial issue. With the increase in travel costs, we’ve used up everything in the scholarship fund for students’ travel and hotel rooms. My team still have **50 more applications** to process from students who want to come to the training. Is there any room left in the budget for more student travel scholarships? I don’t want to have to tell my team to turn students away who can’t afford to come, but there’s no other option if we can’t get more scholarship funding. Please let me know how to proceed as soon as possible. Respectfully, Bryan \--
**Bryan Bernys**
Vice President for the Campus Leadership Program
Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

clean_body: I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. | | | | Fellow Conservative, I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the Leadership Institute. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training program is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. My staffer Bryan, who oversees the Leadership Institute’s campus programs, sent an urgent email to let me know the demand by students to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations. More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds. The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that. The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training? Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship? If so, please use this link to give online right away: Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, Morton C. Blackwell President, Leadership Institute From: Bryan Bernys To: Morton Blackwell Subject: URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships? Morton, I just got confirmation that we can move the National Youth Leadership School to the university auditorium. That takes care of the classroom space issues we had. But now there’s a financial issue. With the increase in travel costs, we’ve used up everything in the scholarship fund for students’ travel and hotel rooms. My team still have 50 more applications to process from students who want to come to the training. Is there any room left in the budget for more student travel scholarships? I don’t want to have to tell my team to turn students away who can’t afford to come, but there’s no other option if we can’t get more scholarship funding. Please let me know how to proceed as soon as possible. Respectfully, Bryan \-- Bryan Bernys** Vice President for the Campus Leadership Program Leadership Institute | | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmgvoj3ss1f8qsdf0b6n673jsv8tmoskqc136r58_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uaqm8p9gelp68d32mion0oj4merb2s3lephned9j6hr3bctnm8r3ct3n6kpb2s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shmcoojed9gcup32phhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cdhm1o31chjm49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqpij5ci3kqjrsbac2a7ole1f1hridmpjf691ib0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0ob4cth2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ajih0lcd5fs8mq4sn6q95ic3emu1ftiuo7rn2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0ob4cth2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z91i0ecnpndg3iklc86q59amj5n66d58vm387bro_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0ob4cth2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z53dk1or3jjeiomq9qdeaht1fkfpm6band1199a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0ob4cth2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4tm9e2o9m6vqiq2llbam9q55tvqia6pq0eeo3h0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0ob4cth2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjo0bo18evp3ggdf31o94rek7v3acrr6vmqcjd28_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0ob4cth2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo6f8o0t0g0gemkjsuvr4g31ki3td8qer95vlgl0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0ob4cth2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zipr7melbfba5fi6csnihntv4b3l3c4ektf62lp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdge0ob4cth2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: NextGen America
subject: Our right to abortion: What you can do now
body:
| | Friend, **It’s been a week since the Supreme Court overturned our constitutional right to abortion.** This decision has thrown our country into a legal, constitutional, and public health crisis. Devastation has already hit across the country, as 11 states have already banned or severely limited abortion, and more are moving to do the same. The Supreme Court may have made this decision, but they didn’t act alone. For the past 50 years, Republicans have made it their mission to take away the constitutional right to our bodies. The Supreme Court, and anti-choice politicians, have directly gone against the will of the American people to push their agenda for power and control. We know what a country without the right to abortion looks like, and we refuse to go back. Let’s be clear: **The fight for abortion does not end with the Supreme Court’s decision.** There is so much we can do to protect our rights — starting with the states. The Supreme Court has put the decision of whether abortion will be legal in the hands of the states, and we’re going to make sure our state lawmakers’ decisions reflect us. **[Take action: Write your governor and state legislators now and urge them to push back against the Supreme Court’s ruling by protecting abortion rights in your state.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47259081/353656599/-2084956747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZTYxOS00NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1o_qQGAXfZ6OzG01FfCzbcteX_wbgEwUy4651PhyoNQ=&emci=b975e129-b8f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0acbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** The right to make decisions for our bodies should be ours, but the Supreme Court has taken that away from us. **A group of just five people, who do not reflect our hopes for the future, have stripped us of a fundamental right and freedom. ** Women and birthing people now face a reality where their futures are no longer up to them. Black people, who already die at unprecedented rates from pregnancy-related issues, are facing the brunt of this ruling as even more draconian, far-right abortion bans hit their communities. **And we know that Republicans aren’t going to stop here.** They will continue to disregard Americans health and safety as they work to ban abortion at the federal level. **That’s why we need to stay in this fight.** To protect our health, freedom, and future, we’ve got to make sure our state lawmakers do everything they can to protect our right to an abortion. [**Write your governor and state legislators now to ensure they not only protect but expand abortion rights in your state.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47259083/353656602/643926608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZTYxOS00NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1o_qQGAXfZ6OzG01FfCzbcteX_wbgEwUy4651PhyoNQ=&emci=b975e129-b8f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0acbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) | [Send a message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47259087/353656606/-1278387693?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWNiZTYxOS00NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1o_qQGAXfZ6OzG01FfCzbcteX_wbgEwUy4651PhyoNQ=&emci=b975e129-b8f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0acbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

clean_body: | | Friend, It’s been a week since the Supreme Court overturned our constitutional right to abortion. This decision has thrown our country into a legal, constitutional, and public health crisis. Devastation has already hit across the country, as 11 states have already banned or severely limited abortion, and more are moving to do the same. The Supreme Court may have made this decision, but they didn’t act alone. For the past 50 years, Republicans have made it their mission to take away the constitutional right to our bodies. The Supreme Court, and anti-choice politicians, have directly gone against the will of the American people to push their agenda for power and control. We know what a country without the right to abortion looks like, and we refuse to go back. Let’s be clear: The fight for abortion does not end with the Supreme Court’s decision. There is so much we can do to protect our rights — starting with the states. The Supreme Court has put the decision of whether abortion will be legal in the hands of the states, and we’re going to make sure our state lawmakers’ decisions reflect us. The right to make decisions for our bodies should be ours, but the Supreme Court has taken that away from us. A group of just five people, who do not reflect our hopes for the future, have stripped us of a fundamental right and freedom. Women and birthing people now face a reality where their futures are no longer up to them. Black people, who already die at unprecedented rates from pregnancy-related issues, are facing the brunt of this ruling as even more draconian, far-right abortion bans hit their communities. And we know that Republicans aren’t going to stop here. They will continue to disregard Americans health and safety as they work to ban abortion at the federal level. That’s why we need to stay in this fight. To protect our health, freedom, and future, we’ve got to make sure our state lawmakers do everything they can to protect our right to an abortion. | "CTA Button" Solidarity, NextGen America P.S. There are ongoing legal battles across the country as activists and organizers fight for the right to abortion at the state level. name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: My mom's everlasting words: Never tire, Val
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck.
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, a few points from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47259599/353657813/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3611-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNiZTYxOS00NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMGBA70B3fACshCviTgsAR4G6uM-_0-EwKDPZ-XROfc=)**
All the best,

Val Demings

We are close, but I need your help to reach my fundraising goal.Peter Please your Congressman, I will OPPOSE price hikes.I will ADVOCATE for oil production.I will SUPPORT energy independence.I will UTILIZE American resources. Will you join my fight to be your next Congressman? All the best, Anthony |

As June comes to a close, all of us at King-Siri HQ wanted to thank you for an amazing month!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47265165/353672303/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220701-opd_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220701-opd_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220701&&&&utm_content=opd_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=11052414-4df9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA1MjQxNC00ZGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_HDDiLncTVigf5InmxGp8794rgZMDTudsHuEwpyRu4=) | Peter, As June comes to a close, all of us at King-Siri HQ want to thank you for an amazing month! Thanks to supporters like you stepping up to help John and Michelle meet this critical moment, our campaign is fired up and ready to take on whatever lies ahead in these final 18 days ahead of the primary. We truly could not have made it this far and achieved so much without your support. **But as pride month comes to a close, it’s important to remember that the fight for LGBTQ+ rights doesn’t end when June does.** The LGBTQ+ community needs more than empty allyship from politicians, governments, and corporations — they need someone who will stand with them and provide real support. John is ready to be a real defender, ally, and advocate for LGBTQ+ Marylanders, and to make our state a safe place for all Americans to live. That’s why yesterday, John published an op-ed in _Washington Blade_ that goes into further detail about his plans for a more inclusive Maryland — we hope you’ll take just two minutes of your day to read it. | | [READ THE OP-ED](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47265167/353672304/2120628508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA1MjQxNC00ZGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_HDDiLncTVigf5InmxGp8794rgZMDTudsHuEwpyRu4=&emci=5946ac2d-93f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=11052414-4df9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)

Team King-Siri

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Will you sponsor a conservative student’s scholarship
body:
I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them.
|
---
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63122%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RscatIrp89n2k5uxd12Y3Q&sysid=1) Fellow Conservative, I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training programs is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. **My staff just sent me an urgent email to let me know the demand to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [**Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63123%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EDz7AwG0I5zpYjPsHLFvJg&sysid=1) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63124%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Um49%2b%2bGHQbJDqSXzo5hytA&sysid=1) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6103%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=5RzQqIu8hSspQYnYip8qWw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6103%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=5RzQqIu8hSspQYnYip8qWw&sysid=1)

name: NDRC Election Update
subject: Washington Post warns of “election chaos” ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
Here’s what we’re doing instead of panicking.
|
---

---
Hi team – did you see _The Washington Post’s_ report that **“The latest GOP primaries point to serious election chaos ahead”?**

We did – and we’re alarmed. Across the country, election deniers are running for Republican nominations for critical races like secretary of state and governor. These candidates tout the Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump. It’s one thing for these extreme candidates to spread misinformation – but if they win their races in November, they could actually have _the power to reject election results_ they don’t like in 2024!

**But we’re not panicking. Instead, we’re _doubling down_ on our fight for fair, clean elections, including by investing in supporting candidates who will UPHOLD democracy. Can you help with a donation?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Here’s what we’re doing instead of panicking. | Hi team – did you see The Washington Post’s report that “The latest GOP primaries point to serious election chaos ahead”? We did – and we’re alarmed. Across the country, election deniers are running for Republican nominations for critical races like secretary of state and governor. These candidates tout the Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump. It’s one thing for these extreme candidates to spread misinformation – but if they win their races in November, they could actually have the power to reject election results they don’t like in 2024! But we’re not panicking. Instead, we’re doubling down on our fight for fair, clean elections, including by investing in supporting candidates who will UPHOLD democracy. Can you help with a donation? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Look, team, we’re not going to minimize the severity of this threat. One election expert warned that “Week by week, the dangers to the integrity of the election system are increasing.” We’re not getting angry or dejected. We’re getting active! We’re working hard to support Democratic candidates in 17 key states who can protect the sanctity of our elections – no matter what the GOP tries. And that’s just one part of our strategy to help save democracy! Your support will determine the success or failure of our effort, team. Will you chip in NOW? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
Let's dispel some rumors! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mattbirk.com/main-street5?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

This past week was yet another busy one on the trail! [We got a large shipments of yard signs](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=ee17b2aee2&e=33b11688c1) and you can get yours [by clicking here](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=eed1f415b5&e=33b11688c1)!
**This week on[ "Mainstreet with Matt"](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=f5cad7e3b3&e=33b11688c1), I walked the golden streets of Edina (okay, they're not really golden). **I met plenty of Minnesotans who disagree with me, but that's a good thing! We need to engage in dialogue, not shut each other down as Tim Walz has done so often! Scott and I are committed to hard conversations and competing ideas.

**[Watch the latest episode here ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=20e73039e4&e=33b11688c1)or click the thumbnail below:**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=cec2086602&e=33b11688c1 "Mainstreet with Matt, Episode 5, Edina")
---
| I hope you have an incredible weekend filled with memories and family! As for our campaign? Well, it's parade season! See you out there. Make sure you tell your friends and neighbors about Jensen/Birk and the stakes of this election!

In Freedom,

Matt Birk
Republican Candidate for Lt. Governor
Dr. Scott Jensen's Running Mate

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Better than we ever expected!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.malinowskifornj.com/p/Bix_Do8Sr0m0vj5sQl0SCA2?unsubscribedata=22NcUeqoO%2F5w63crZHu0O3pw5neLTaG5SGDn7q%2BQEBaWeV%2B6hct%2FHfRH17AoT4%2B8CRCK95DwusqK1Dzw11J7wFOIHCl3wUk46C4n7oReOR4dQLoRWNqCCTSQfMKJ%2BMR1TGV5mPlnxeHq3IJ1H81AIYILpq9bNP5ID9oFPRPJNh%2FXRf301UsKyfRAaSMzNmm%2BKCgMxWCTC0OoJ0sWhpseHRTI%2BCkXlZ4g2euwf6opTmfgN9JdGS7nChhBOserPVy9qrCvHzQoPmOQqgM0Qna%2BlBUaF%2FsrUuN%2Fd2O6DDN%2FXoUD9vUa5uL7%2BdQJcPM%2Bc6gOjRpCg6mWvwDsPop0vhgz0bLb0mlz5dmKGPG2tZU%2BzeDwn8mKD2FN4qro4e3dGIb0r1JwyJeey0c6QsB9i1xcuRRKJ64Q5fbYqaAGXM953fI%2F%2B%2B5bukrEZZKDuK19eKs4)
---
| |
---
Team,

We are so grateful for the support of our incredible grassroots team. Because of your contributions, we not only met our FEC end-of-quarter goal – we surpassed it!

As you know, after each quarter, our fundraising numbers go public and are used as a sign of our campaign’s strength. Team, make no mistake – the GOP is going to take notice of how much fight we have in us. And we are just getting started!

My opponent, Tom Kean Jr., has consistently chosen to side with the most extreme pro-Trump wing of the GOP in his fourth, desperate effort to get to Congress. Our country needs leaders – Democrats and Republicans – who will defend the foundations of our democracy against extremism, and fight for common sense policies that the vast majority of Americans support. Instead, Kean has chosen silence and cowardice.

_To codify Roe v. Wade, pass more meaningful gun safety legislation, rescue the climate, and fight for progress on all the issues we care about, we must maintain our majority in the House, and our race is one of a few that could make the difference. With your help, we will keep pushing forward for our district, for our democracy, and for our country._

We’ll keep you in the loop as the midterm elections draw closer — but be sure to follow my campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47271465/353683624/-1307674320?lang=en&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220701_1_1&refcode2=887425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODc0MjViMy01MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmocuYDiqZX0V06J_JQLyjf-VFdm2lDv6ZLu8aN--hM=&emci=837425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=887425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=19214294) and [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47271466/353683625/-570343612?refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220701_1_1&refcode2=887425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODc0MjViMy01MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmocuYDiqZX0V06J_JQLyjf-VFdm2lDv6ZLu8aN--hM=&emci=837425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=887425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=19214294) for day-to-day updates and [sign up to volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47271467/353683626/-1968512?refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220701_1_1&refcode2=887425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODc0MjViMy01MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmocuYDiqZX0V06J_JQLyjf-VFdm2lDv6ZLu8aN--hM=&emci=837425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=887425b3-50f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=19214294) with us too!

— Tom

clean_body: As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Team, We are so grateful for the support of our incredible grassroots team. Because of your contributions, we not only met our FEC end-of-quarter goal – we surpassed it! As you know, after each quarter, our fundraising numbers go public and are used as a sign of our campaign’s strength. Team, make no mistake – the GOP is going to take notice of how much fight we have in us. And we are just getting started! My opponent, Tom Kean Jr., has consistently chosen to side with the most extreme pro-Trump wing of the GOP in his fourth, desperate effort to get to Congress. Our country needs leaders – Democrats and Republicans – who will defend the foundations of our democracy against extremism, and fight for common sense policies that the vast majority of Americans support. Instead, Kean has chosen silence and cowardice. To codify Roe v. Wade, pass more meaningful gun safety legislation, rescue the climate, and fight for progress on all the issues we care about, we must maintain our majority in the House, and our race is one of a few that could make the difference. With your help, we will keep pushing forward for our district, for our democracy, and for our country. We’ll keep you in the loop as the midterm elections draw closer — but be sure to follow my campaign on and for day-to-day updates and with us too! — Tom = * | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district — which experts say could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. = = Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. name: Fairness Project
subject: WOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project
body:
https://www.thefairnessproject.org/ [https://www.thefairnessproject.org/]
Friend,

From all of us here at the Fairness Project, we wanted to say thank you. Because of supporters like you, we were able to exceed yesterday’s $30,000 fundraising goal and start off Q3 strong.

Because of supporters like you, we are back on track to have the resources necessary to support a jam-packed slate of ballot measure campaigns heading into the midterms — even after some last-minute campaign additions this past month to protect reproductive rights.

Since 2016, we’ve helped to change the lives of over 18 million Americans, and as we head into the midterms, we’re ready to keep up our fight and change millions more.

Supporters like you have helped us to expand Medicaid and deliver health care for over 875,000 people across the country, put over $22 billion into the pockets of workers through raising the minimum wage, and so much more.

These are policies that change lives. As we ramp up our efforts heading into the midterms, just know that your support is what has made this work possible, and what will make securing permanent access to reproductive health care in Michigan and Vermont possible come November.

So, friend, today we wanted to say thank you — for standing with us then and standing with us now as we fuel up for the midterms and our continued fight for fairness.

Thank you for your continued support,

— Fairness Project
https://www.facebook.com/projectfairness/?emci=e13538fc-af1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid [https://www.facebook.com/projectfairness/?emci=e13538fc-af1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid] https://twitter.com/FairnessProject?emci=e13538fc-af1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid= [https://twitter.com/FairnessProject?emci=e13538fc-af1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 24 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfpus-all-email-july2022-fr-july-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25] DONAR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfpus-all-email-july2022-fr-july-esfooter?refcode=footer&amount=25] Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state.
https://www.thefairnessproject.org/about/ [https://www.thefairnessproject.org/about/]
You can request to get only the most important emails from our team here [https://secure.everyaction.com/OQqoxlH0Y0OJ4uq9P9GBdA2] , or you can unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/uJ_6fIomlESWcQLD5p6QiA2?unsubscribedata=nkiRBoYmOgQ3Vu2VnMWsyQACc3Vtpcc4ApMzigj34tJprtypxO0aZIJZv7J0KQJcaAzszv1G1XWQm1dZvSHVFuQx6juissay%2F7qnTZRQNZHOH1FHx7Pop5VvRHKZRJb4s88M41zrXl%2FF0%2FXwyB4uEu4dLowhy8AQZ6jZiyUqE904lruHmuePvEHjlbB4IOO1%2FLfOQTOc9JEHX6jiz23WX4pWEqwBiWWenqCH3k%2FeGhAwJHEotJBzQeXdngMvv1PhoExAhUbQJWgv3Tn4i%2BNKN9dajFrA6wTr9efv%2FvT6mE30usJ7xH%2BfCNOg2Na7rHOc0H9aD7%2BU4Cmo7B9wvrPqULPltAusacAc2Q4c9dowcaJs40z7aH3x%2BsB6CVSNADMTeghy2ceYDR3bbaxPzH5gsCgVyVCW19UiGR8VbAPOG4g%3D .Paid for by the Fairness Project

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m more committed than ever to delivering the resources, the relief, and the reform our nation needs to get on a better path.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47275706/353687760/333259033?refcode=em_220701_tyjune&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220701_tyjune&refcode2=8e9a9bae-52f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlhOWJhZS01MmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LdLi8NvM4N9AMa_iv3CWCB1RBRoJoiiWXD7paYJYUpQ=)

| | Dear friends, Before I log off for the weekend and spend some _much-needed_ time with family, I just wanted to say one last thank you to everyone who voted, volunteered, donated, or simply cheered me on in the Special Election. I know this isn’t the result we wanted, but I’m already looking forward with hope — _52,913_ people voted for me on Tuesday, and that means **52,913 Nebraskans** believe it’s time for a new era of leadership representing our district. **That’s why I’m more committed than ever to delivering the resources, the relief, and the reform our nation needs to get on a better path.** While my opponent will be spending the next five months in Washington D.C., I'll be on the ground connecting with each and _every_ voter in our district to make sure that come November, we have the grassroots power we need to bring home a victory. I’m ready to continue this fight, but now that Mike Flood will officially be the incumbent in office this November, I need your help. My opponent is going to have unlimited access to the GOP’s deep pockets and dark money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors now more than ever. [**Will you make a quick $15 contribution so that we can start this month one step ahead?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47275707/353687761/333259033?amount=15&refcode=em_220701_tyjune&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220701_tyjune&refcode2=8e9a9bae-52f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlhOWJhZS01MmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LdLi8NvM4N9AMa_iv3CWCB1RBRoJoiiWXD7paYJYUpQ=) | [GET AHEAD + STAY AHEAD! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47275708/353687763/333259033?amount=15&refcode=em_220701_tyjune&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220701_tyjune&refcode2=8e9a9bae-52f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlhOWJhZS01MmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LdLi8NvM4N9AMa_iv3CWCB1RBRoJoiiWXD7paYJYUpQ=)

Thank you, everyone. I hope you get some rest this weekend — on Monday, we’re going to hit the ground running!
All my best,
Patty

name: Josh
subject: Thanks for your continued support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Team,

As July begins and the holiday weekend approaches, I wanted to take this opportunity to thank you for your help with last month’s FEC filing deadline.

Our campaign was up against a lot in June. We had our primary and began to fight back against our anti-choice opponent and his attacks— just in the past few weeks alone. We needed money to fight back and keep my campaign on track — and you delivered .

Together, we met our goal, and now we’re on pace to stay strong as the midterms approach. And I promise you this: I will not stop fighting for our Jersey Values and real solutions to our problems no matter who stands in our way .

There are challenges ahead of us in the second half of this year, but with you on my team I’m confident in our future successes.

Thank you again.

Yours,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: [#]Team, As July begins and the holiday weekend approaches, I wanted to take this opportunity to thank you for your help with last month’s FEC filing deadline. Our campaign was up against a lot in June. We had our primary and began to fight back against our anti-choice opponent and his attacks— just in the past few weeks alone. We needed money to fight back and keep my campaign on track — and you delivered . Together, we met our goal, and now we’re on pace to stay strong as the midterms approach. And I promise you this: I will not stop fighting for our Jersey Values and real solutions to our problems no matter who stands in our way . There are challenges ahead of us in the second half of this year, but with you on my team I’m confident in our future successes. Thank you again. Yours, Josh Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. DONATE [] DONATE MONTHLY [] VOLUNTEER [] Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 [] [] []

body:
Your continued support can make a big impact.
#
Peter,
I want to thank all of you for helping us meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal yesterday.
_But we can’t afford to slow down for a minute_. We only have four months to go until November, so I’m reaching out today to tell you how you can make a tremendous impact in that short time.

Patty

name: =?utf-8?Q?Reed=20Olson=20for=20MN=202A?=
subject: Moving & Shaking!
body:
Heading up north to a town near YOU?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/54ae3b613452/a-birthday-wish-9139817?e=0ba866af2d)
Logo

** We have been moving AND shaking this month!
------------------------------------------------------------

Our yard signs are IN and we can’t wait to see them dotting the Northwoods landscape!

Looking to host a yard sign? Reserve one here: https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=73eef09a84&e=0ba866af2d (https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=829f4f1ed9&e=0ba866af2d)

We were able to attend the “Cherish the Children” Pow Wow on Harriet Island in St. Paul on the 4th. The event was hosted by Ain Dah Yung, a housing agency based in St.Paul, that primarily focuses on youth and families.

We had an absolute blast on 105.3 WRLN Red Lake Nation Radio (https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=da14435b75&e=0ba866af2d) on the 7th and we look forward to stopping by again to chat soon.

Little known fact: Flag Day is one of my favorite holidays! It was great to celebrate down at the Bemidji waterfront and support voting rights.

Many thanks to the awesome crew that came out to doorknock on behalf of our campaign on the 25th! A special thanks to congressional candidate Jen Shultz and Representative Jamie Becker Finn for driving all the way up here to join us!
Find out how YOU can get involved with the campaign! (https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=9952a55a41&e=0ba866af2d)

We bumped into MN 2B candidate Erika Bailey-Johnson 17th Annual Healing Powwow, hosted by Sanford Bemidji on the 24th.

We were privileged to see our community come together in celebration of Juneteenth and create an important space for open conversation about African Americans’ struggle for freedom and equality. It was a great afternoon full of stories, singing and community connection.

** Going on the Road!
------------------------------------------------------------

We are currently making t-shirts and putting the finishing touches on our parade float (thank you to our awesome crew of volunteers! ). Next week, we will be hitting the whole circuit—Bemidji, Baudette, Debs and Red Lake. We look forward to meeting many of you along the route.

Would you like to walk with our float in any of these parades? We’d sure love to have you. Let us know @ 218-766-0383 (tel:2187660383) .

Have a safe holiday week everybody!

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I need to know: Are you with me?
body:
[****](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ccd427a20e1d40f9bdaff3b272800730&_e=igsiNR2S7oEas2397n5fhqk7y9CX5cVtreze4N9EqCnvf_b0kjpH2Y6cZu5KpfJmwNi7UtFiA36Rb2XIIbTPWAwRghhNJrFOtmUVm3q6EBs9M8q9ZGHqZAYcebr4zbwc5Fbf5F94qmfKNv5q6xCwsGgNVpsLb6LxD7K0Fg64KqhBscYEE_Bx3khQ9C9wG3bYIsNPJFrGKEGuWIDhYHFbP97MNa_NalT-dRD5lhJsQve-p5cCIP0CDQDr_GziAseG0pITR9xOY8Qv3b9K6x1zquCJ3NTJyzFDkykaUDSyQb7917b3QuHhBAQ9vSJNUh1jwpTxminMS7osrxN1WOqDoyLsflLUgbZYzM-0IaJN9bwDEYYsX-bFAtgAHwjGuACWnwUpQJ3pDt95YgnOiiLqB1cKR1O5HefQS_WkIKQNuy0%3D)
Friend,

Since being elected Governor of Florida,**I have become the #1 defender of freedom.** The Left knows this, and they HATE it.

Friend, being the #1 defender of freedom has made me the #1 target of the Left.

But I wouldn't change a thing.

Every day, I go to work with Florida families in mind. I fight to **keep our communities safe** , to **keep our economy thriving** , and to **keep our beautiful Florida environment preserved** so generations to come can enjoy all our state has to offer.

__**[Donate now to help me continue the fight>>>](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ccd427a20e1d40f9bdaff3b272800730&_e=igsiNR2S7oEas2397n5fhqk7y9CX5cVtreze4N9EqCnvf_b0kjpH2Y6cZu5KpfJmwNi7UtFiA36Rb2XIIbTPWAwRghhNJrFOtmUVm3q6EBs9M8q9ZGHqZAYcebr4zbwc5Fbf5F94qmfKNv5q6xCwsGgNVpsLb6LxD7K0Fg64KqhBscYEE_Bx3khQ9C9wG3bYN99qyOyGKe0qFUfh_xD5hQ8yOv74ESoAF-SnoxVMMMrCD0A03tBSX04FMZ9J-77nOKv5BjpkJneVJXg3m8PW3de2xcilxH12OPv2dKpJRK6csGQg4ZoXHDsKKJ-CCXfco7kEs7eFXRyDyXwNJtWa2pxlRwBbHEfJwTj93T1qaNadGYfyXdX1nPpyj_Kr2i6Gp-3Sonz4T7B7tfx3bRyYcuk4GeMNasQyAOMgq74nViQ%3D "Donate now to help me continue the fight >>>")**__

Fighting for the future of Florida is an easy choice for me. I think about my three young kids and the future I want them each to have in our great state.

The Left sees that freedom is resonating with Floridians from all walks of life, and they are doing everything they can to defeat me in November and _turn Florida blue. _They are pouring MILLIONS of dollars into Florida and working overtime to spread lies about my administration through their smear merchant allies in the mainstream media.

They even recently spread misinformation _from the White House podium._

**I will continue to disabuse their narrative at every turn, but I can 't do it alone, Friend. **I am looking to build an army of grassroots supporters who will help me fight back against the Democrat Machine.

There is too much on the line this November to sit back. __**[I need to know: Are you with me?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ccd427a20e1d40f9bdaff3b272800730&_e=igsiNR2S7oEas2397n5fhqk7y9CX5cVtreze4N9EqCnvf_b0kjpH2Y6cZu5KpfJmwNi7UtFiA36Rb2XIIbTPWAwRghhNJrFOtmUVm3q6EBs9M8q9ZGHqZAYcebr4zbwc5Fbf5F94qmfKNv5q6xCwsGgNVpsLb6LxD7K0Fg64KqhBscYEE_Bx3khQ9C9wG3bYVescuGDuMdXXOzexmWyyndsZpGPjNW8iq1AVxJ9ik89lr2B_RDq6sVPpzIWF7c6I0JZJzE5lC6TGZAtZ9sSFqyOO-f1JozCm4fDSR9zRZrfJhvbJDz8f5J9j3YUepKg9LIZ9x9AvodHGtKGYCfZjfdqfH18ATcqeiETqXB4Q3p7VK4cF3G3-IOo7d1qzmvvxSX3c4G5s3GIDFc6wooaj2BjQfTcaHe7bN4V8Aep8IQA%3D "I need to know: Are you with me?")**__

**[[I'M IN!]](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ccd427a20e1d40f9bdaff3b272800730&_e=igsiNR2S7oEas2397n5fhqk7y9CX5cVtreze4N9EqCnvf_b0kjpH2Y6cZu5KpfJmwNi7UtFiA36Rb2XIIbTPWAwRghhNJrFOtmUVm3q6EBs9M8q9ZGHqZAYcebr4zbwc5Fbf5F94qmfKNv5q6xCwsGgNVpsLb6LxD7K0Fg64KqhBscYEE_Bx3khQ9C9wG3bYKbF68VAT-yHdrm1srCvxhf5mddrb-F8OiE2LYATpAGLCFwHVWmlq1LzvRVL0VEwZRWtoSZtbaoKbg8HnPgtsv8zCyO8xPEPjer-8L3jO1zdStLGK4INWoGqGtichXSSC57eEdKBzUsKmjS7bw3U4lZIMstE9i8T6PVFGzfueB2NjZ3rJShoJQU_IDvF1f3VXZWHIEqBsAX-ZBloy6blkti9mPq4YPRXGaG97TlPwM3E%3D "\[I’M IN!\]")**

Thank you for standing with me.
Thank you for standing for freedom.
Thank you for helping me Keep Florida Free.

__**[Pledge your support for our freedom-first mission now, Friend >>>](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ccd427a20e1d40f9bdaff3b272800730&_e=igsiNR2S7oEas2397n5fhqk7y9CX5cVtreze4N9EqCnvf_b0kjpH2Y6cZu5KpfJmwNi7UtFiA36Rb2XIIbTPWAwRghhNJrFOtmUVm3q6EBs9M8q9ZGHqZAYcebr4zbwc5Fbf5F94qmfKNv5q6xCwsGgNVpsLb6LxD7K0Fg64KqhBscYEE_Bx3khQ9C9wG3bYU8Lz42L4R0-mOMCkvd4pDIj6BTo9r1QT3rvfsG7G270EMvCCOp__kh66sUWQsy4KeJjGAmNRwQ3U48GyQznIYjeHU6Y1Pum0oN87LlfjnnH8uvZ2Tq2lgnM9QmvgwrP2Tzh0aL8Fz2KFlHu8UrmEPEj0Qy1GtOonj3e0GBJF3TEVFO4k0mloQcQ5rzHBbft4N6kpqE3cSuajJZj7PAOlwlyIlvbOCTRFSqy7ak9n_OU%3D "Pledge your support for our freedom-first mission now, First name or "Friend" >>>")**__

Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ccd427a20e1d40f9bdaff3b272800730&_e=igsiNR2S7oEas2397n5fhqk7y9CX5cVtreze4N9EqCnvf_b0kjpH2Y6cZu5KpfJmwNi7UtFiA36Rb2XIIbTPWAwRghhNJrFOtmUVm3q6EBs9M8q9ZGHqZAYcebr4zbwc5Fbf5F94qmfKNv5q6xCwsGgNVpsLb6LxD7K0Fg64KqhBscYEE_Bx3khQ9C9wG3bYHjW__RlhOMVGxlBd_-4Y74cPIGhELagJakatuzHRPmYNDVLUqqz1cfemUpN6dCygsRBCi7Erm0imPyfLpK-C1QQ497z_SQVr9ZFFSmgNbINHO_mckPO2r9yiuv1uW4RCF-x1wApX5-q4bIbxeueCbMciGULE0rW1dFPaxYmVAts0n1qZ4hEm8maDIFSVMxFLJmo3CajK8N0EbS0A7oDxSwC31avvGscRAj_6MeI7lFU%3D "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ccd427a20e1d40f9bdaff3b272800730&_e=igsiNR2S7oEas2397n5fhqk7y9CX5cVtreze4N9EqCnvf_b0kjpH2Y6cZu5KpfJmwNi7UtFiA36Rb2XIIbTPWAwRghhNJrFOtmUVm3q6EBs9M8q9ZGHqZAYcebr4zbwc5Fbf5F94qmfKNv5q6xCwsGgNVpsLb6LxD7K0Fg64KqhBscYEE_Bx3khQ9C9wG3bYKmEz7nYceSTbnTwykE3F7AQ0bJce0si3WPFAy1muabjXR_cdl8EqiVwvdgoukYk56pgwimOy_A-8KthhajUZArf6IlzR48KL0fzn2n2cufqpown4g5vVatQA5IN4wN24b0JkL1DW6Cc7qlCqfvHqw_T_QcR8d8jUBC77OGVTgB44WRk_-UO5e3Cc5mcFa3IsnxhOMbBBTD3FMsVNg3lxLWgCtjo9mYWBGRKo847rVME%3D)

body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220701&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220701&amount=28]
Team,
I just wanted to send a quick note to thank you for your support before last night’s end-of-quarter deadline (and for putting up with more emails than normal). I know the last few weeks have been anything but calm, and to have your support during such a tumultuous time means the world.
Because I don’t take corporate PAC money, I really do rely on the generosity of grassroots supporters to help fund my campaign. It’s not an exaggeration to say I couldn’t do this without you.
So THANK YOU once again. Now, I’ll get out of your inbox.
Forever grateful,
Elissa

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you in advance for your $25 donation towards our $1 million drive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47278596/353700221/1927938479?refcode=220701_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY3YjRmMS01OWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebGfEWDSzUJLRWhrOvqpnmHCBLyV-VP9RqZv8p_D0aA=)
Team — [**I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $25 or whatever you can afford split between my campaign and Seth Moulton — to help counter the $1,000,000 NRSC attack ad that is on the air now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47278597/353700222/1927938479?refcode=220701_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY3YjRmMS01OWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebGfEWDSzUJLRWhrOvqpnmHCBLyV-VP9RqZv8p_D0aA=) Here’s the truth: This is the biggest attack on our campaign so far. The NRSC put $1,000,000 behind this ad in one week alone, and they won’t stop there. But we’ve seen tough times before. And thanks to you, we’ve always come out the other side stronger. So, we need a BIG response to show them that it’s going to take a lot more than a few attack ads to stop this team and our momentum. **And friend, it’s critical that we have everyone with us if we’re going to hit our $1,000,000 goal by midnight and set the record straight. Even splitting $25 can make a difference if everyone is pitching in.** We’ve had a good start so far, and while our opponents may have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us, we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win. Which is why I’m humbly asking: [**Can you please split a donation of $25 or more today between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us hit our $1,000,000 goal and counter the flood of outside spending pouring into this race? I would not ask were it not so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47278598/353700223/1927938479?refcode=220701_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY3YjRmMS01OWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebGfEWDSzUJLRWhrOvqpnmHCBLyV-VP9RqZv8p_D0aA=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47278599/353700224/-1534947712?refcode=220701_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY3YjRmMS01OWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebGfEWDSzUJLRWhrOvqpnmHCBLyV-VP9RqZv8p_D0aA=)
We are in a great position to win this race. The polls are close and our organization is strong. But the attacks we have yet to face will be unprecedented — and we have to be ready. And if you chip in to help, I know we will be. Thank you, Mark Kelly
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47278600/353700225/-1534947712?refcode=220701_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY3YjRmMS01OWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebGfEWDSzUJLRWhrOvqpnmHCBLyV-VP9RqZv8p_D0aA=)

name: Young Kim
subject: I am living the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I came to this country as a young girl. My mother and I would collect cans and bottles on the beach and then donate the funds raised to our church -- our way of giving back to the community that had welcomed us with open arms.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708892:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r)
---
I am living the American Dream.

Patriot, I came to this country as a young girl. My mother and I would collect cans and bottles on the beach and then donate the funds raised to our church -- our way of giving back to the community that had welcomed us with open arms.

I spent years navigating our immigration process and was granted citizenship. I put myself through college, started a business, raised a family, and now am one of the first Korean American women in Congress. I have always put our community first, and will continue to do so in Washington.

[**But I need your help to keep the American Dream alive for future generations \-- to ensure that everyone has the same opportunity I did all those years ago. I can 't do it alone.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708893:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r)

We only recently unseated Pelosi's candidate -- the first Republican to unseat an incumbent CA Democrat in 26 years -- and we're not in the clear. The Democrat's spent $20+ million against us, outspending us at every turn, and this time around we'll face millions more. Pelosi is determined to win back every seat she lost, _including this one._

[**Can you chip in to defend this seat?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708893:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r) If you've ever wanted to have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our nation, you can't afford to sit this one out.

Pelosi has the House. Schumer has the Senate. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have the White House. Winning back the House for Republicans is the only way to put lower taxes, affordable healthcare, small business protection, and quick, common-sense reforms at the top of the agenda!

My friend, this is bigger than one seat. It's about saving the future of our nation. Can I count on you to help to defend this seat from the Democrats?

To victory,

Young Kim
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708893:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708893:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r)**[DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708892:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r)**
---

[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708892:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r)
* * *
__
_We 'll get straight to the point: _
__
_We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats._
__
__YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she 's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations.__
__ _[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708894:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r)_
---
_ _
_[_**So, we 're humbly asking for a donation to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708894:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r)_
__ _[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60708894:J-FjcOonN:m:1:3299561967:CAC8A070C9DD88F39FFAAC892E24127F:r)_
---
_ _

---

Orange 92869

name: Doug White
subject: by the people, for the people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
Thank you to everyone who supported my campaign over the last week as we pushed towards our all-important Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline. Thanks to your hustle, we’re on track to report very impressive grassroots fundraising numbers!

This weekend, as many of us take a break to celebrate the July Fourth weekend, I hope you’ll join me in thinking long and hard about the state of our democracy.

Over the last few years, we have seen just how fragile that democracy is – and just how far some extremists in our political sphere will go to overthrow it.

The January 6 committee hearings revealed shocking information about the extent of the Trump administration’s knowledge and involvement in the violent attempt to overthrow our free and fair elections.

**We can’t forget that many of the same extremists who promote that Big Lie are now running for office up and down the ballot across the country – including here in WA-04.**

At the same time, we’ve watched our regressive Supreme Court strip Americans of our fundamental rights to privacy and bodily autonomy, undermine the EPA’s ability to tackle climate change... and promise to hear arguments in a case that could forever change how elections are run in our country.

This weekend, we celebrate the day our founding fathers declared we would no longer be governed _by the unelected few_. Instead, they formed a government _by the people, for the people_.

**We cannot continue to allow the tail to wag the dog.** This Fourth of July, we must recommit ourselves to our democratic values and the fight to protect them.

Thank you, and Happy Independence Day!

– Doug

| PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
---
Doug White for Congress
PO Box 9674
Yakima, WA 98909
