clean_body: | | Thank you to everyone who supported my campaign over the last week as we pushed towards our all-important Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline. Thanks to your hustle, we’re on track to report very impressive grassroots fundraising numbers! This weekend, as many of us take a break to celebrate the July Fourth weekend, I hope you’ll join me in thinking long and hard about the state of our democracy. Over the last few years, we have seen just how fragile that democracy is – and just how far some extremists in our political sphere will go to overthrow it. The January 6 committee hearings revealed shocking information about the extent of the Trump administration’s knowledge and involvement in the violent attempt to overthrow our free and fair elections. We can’t forget that many of the same extremists who promote that Big Lie are now running for office up and down the ballot across the country – including here in WA-04. At the same time, we’ve watched our regressive Supreme Court strip Americans of our fundamental rights to privacy and bodily autonomy, undermine the EPA’s ability to tackle climate change... and promise to hear arguments in a case that could forever change how elections are run in our country. This weekend, we celebrate the day our founding fathers declared we would no longer be governed by the unelected few. Instead, they formed a government by the people, for the people. We cannot continue to allow the tail to wag the dog. This Fourth of July, we must recommit ourselves to our democratic values and the fight to protect them. Thank you, and Happy Independence Day! – Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. Hello all,

It's hard to believe that it's already July, isn't it? It's even harder for me to believe just how far we've come in the almost one year since we first launched this campaign.

As a matter of fact, in this quarter, we have raised over **$100,000** from wonderful supporters just like yourself. And while we all know Bryan Steil and his corporate cronies are going to raise far more than that, I'm not discouraged.

This is a testament to how important it is to have representation that _really_ knows and cares for the communities they serve. I know I can be that for Wisconsin's 1st, and I thank each and every one of you for believing in me.

It's a long road to November, but from what I've seen so far, Bryan Steil doesn't have a chance.

Until next time,

body:
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47280341/353707330/-802992747?refcode=AU_MLJ_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20220701_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA3MzUzZi01ZmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YS4C4KF2wGimn7Y6GUTgB7o95j7Orq-rf-Yj58hEIfQ=)

Team, I owe you another “thank you.”
There hasn’t been an FEC quarter yet when my finance team has had to tell me we fell short of a fundraising goal, and that’s because of generous grassroots supporters like you who understand how critical our work is for New Yorkers.
Whether you chipped in, added your name to a petition, responded to a survey, or simply read our emails to stay up to date with what we’ve been doing — every action you take helps our efforts.
And I want you to know that I’m grateful from the bottom of my heart.
**Now that we have less than two months left until the primary, we’ll need strong grassroots support to keep up the fight for New York’s workers and families. **
Our work is just beginning — and with multiple opponents and time running out in this primary race, the path ahead won’t be easy.
But together, I know we can keep speaking truth to power and delivering bold, progressive change. We must keep working to build a nation that works for everyone — not just the privileged few.
Thank you for your commitment, and I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together.
— Mondaire

clean_body: = Team, I owe you another “thank you.” There hasn’t been an FEC quarter yet when my finance team has had to tell me we fell short of a fundraising goal, and that’s because of generous grassroots supporters like you who understand how critical our work is for New Yorkers. Whether you chipped in, added your name to a petition, responded to a survey, or simply read our emails to stay up to date with what we’ve been doing — every action you take helps our efforts. And I want you to know that I’m grateful from the bottom of my heart. Now that we have less than two months left until the primary, we’ll need strong grassroots support to keep up the fight for New York’s workers and families. Our work is just beginning — and with multiple opponents and time running out in this primary race, the path ahead won’t be easy. But together, I know we can keep speaking truth to power and delivering bold, progressive change. We must keep working to build a nation that works for everyone — not just the privileged few. Thank you for your commitment, and I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together. — Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 122 C Street NW Suite 360 Washington, DC 20001 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. ---
| St. Louis, MO - Donald Trump Jr. [retweeted Greitens for Senate Chairwoman Kimberly Guilfoyle's tweet](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e_liQUV7z_OHEL-x-Dlpyo0VKAqAcbMyVdKXmCohVd_A0ZZ-tqK7vvY94sOc22kjvsVauzrTxD2F3wuDBUKNPShj3iPPirdx3-5Pc51b39xI6rOrzgVtDFEfegNYfb-Cm1RX-9UC5Tge3d8f4zzuam4r1_S5Btn_yAtpknxeF7o_EheOCg9pA2zgvQBSJtXTRgA3A-ApkfH647iodoVriBDCgVSs_LaDDqi-E3pkrD1PyvOKAB-9rg==&c=hk-NZavjmhAFexVQRAPov4cNdf0WF0KQj90vcI4Pjmct3SPHuyvQtg==&ch=BIgpuWUhWA2W4UZ73O8JRX80X8qq_y3Fu3fViAiiV_9Qj1JgLqpZZw==) about a new report showing former Governor Eric Greitens is favored to be the next U.S. Senator from Missouri.

name: Pat Ryan
subject: I’m running for Congress because I still believe in our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Ryan for Congress
body:
|
#
---
_Pat Ryan is running in a critical August Special Election for New York’s 19th Congressional District. We’re counting on grassroots support to defend this toss-up seat and hold the House. But if you would like to unsubscribe, you can[here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/FUF1EkxGgkSFNwrhVK41ow2?unsubscribedata=0aXQfXfcAqyuWbXBBZmQCm5CQX%2FREZ60R9Xrysbnh3wyKVDk7iw2FfgSxIxzoTHnK18tOZ6ds1%2B%2FKNmDeOwuFZi2fQzBTkIHjr6D9ffErtJ4navDD%2FKpv2nfcJBD%2FCGz1DstrK1WI3%2FwQdJyvRq%2FrfgsNPVaO1ZIDOxzkalg4vg5D3XfHDQKAbWh1Fm4TNGaK7dC%2FgjV%2F%2FAdT5BRL4JunBo17yMzXxxsv2BkLTJFSgpYVGV9NU4Hz6RnWeus%2BXBpu5DUOyAq2EKIndjWnAxsQbb1kGMtGmHs9NGjf9v4pduXqeJ1YxORPtSVUsEHzJsqKB8m5UCYqOcw5d7QUQmTVWtqnQQ0xH0%2FQ5%2F8yWvk%2BMXD4g%2BA1BkSJXUkMhzPCPlSh7wJlgCHZGJRg9SKWS6mvYnZ57szuQn%2FM6Y68GBLDP8%3D)_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47281060/353709703/772400505?refcode=AU_PKR_FR_GEN_LAU_NTL_202207_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTAyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyNzE1Mi02MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_BESGm6NH1tuWjtgau2-NU0fhogpiDicrpPPlFsFoI=) Friend, My name is Pat Ryan and I am running in the August Special Election to succeed Lt. Governor Delgado in Congress and defend our fragile House majority. I wanted to reach out to explain why I’m running, what’s at stake in this race, and why I have been called to serve this community my entire life. [**I hope you’ll take a moment to read this note all the way through, but I have to ask: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to help my team win this battleground race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47281062/353709705/772400505?refcode=AU_PKR_FR_GEN_LAU_NTL_202207_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTAyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyNzE1Mi02MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_BESGm6NH1tuWjtgau2-NU0fhogpiDicrpPPlFsFoI=) | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47281064/353709707/772400505?amount=5&refcode=AU_PKR_FR_GEN_LAU_NTL_202207_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTAyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyNzE1Mi02MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_BESGm6NH1tuWjtgau2-NU0fhogpiDicrpPPlFsFoI=)
---
As a young man, I chose to go to West Point, to become an Army officer, and ultimately to put my life on the line in combat because I believe deeply in our country, in our core values – equality, justice, opportunity; and because I trusted that our elected officials in Washington would do right by me and my fellow soldiers.
But instead, they sent us to war in Iraq with no strategy and without the resources to fight it. And rather than working together to fix the problem, they devolved into partisan bickering and posturing. Seeing the situation worsen – and doing nothing to fix it – while my fellow soldiers and I were losing lives, limbs, and years away from our families.
Unfortunately, our national politics have only become more broken, more dysfunctional, and more divided in the years since. That’s why, a few years ago, I decided that rather than throwing up my hands in frustration and giving up, I needed to jump in and try to be part of the solution – to start fixing our politics, improving our country, renewing our democracy from the ground up: that’s why I ran for local office in the community I grew up in in the Hudson Valley.
The last few years serving as Ulster County Executive, I have had the tremendous and humbling opportunity to lead our community through some of the most challenging times in the last century. Guiding our community through a once-in-a-century pandemic, and figuring out how to come out the other side, better, stronger, and more equitable. And I have seen firsthand that it can be done!
**I am running for Congress to represent the community where I was born and raised, where my family has been for five generations, where I graduated from West Point, where I am raising my two young sons with my wife Rebecca, and where I serve as Ulster County Executive.**
[**I believe we are in an existential fight for our democracy and we need all hands on deck. My very first day at West Point I was taught there are three answers to any question: yes sir, no sir, and no excuse sir. That’s it, period. As a leader, if we’re not getting it done – whether at the local level or in Washington – there is no excuse.
I’ve seen that government can actually work on the ground level, if you’re willing to do the right thing as an elected official. Not to divide people for your own political gain, but to do the hard work, to bring people together towards consensus and to drive actual results.
It is clear right now that things are not getting done in Washington, things are not working for people in this community. We have near-record inflation, we have global instability and a war in Ukraine, and we’re witnessing a direct and radical assault on women’s rights to control their own bodies, voting rights, and much more. With so much on the line, we need a leader in Washington who will actually step up and fight.
First, I will run in a Special Election to succeed Lt. Governor Antonio Delgado in Congress. After the Special Election in August, I will then turn to the General Election in the newly-drawn New York 18th Congressional District in November. Both of these races will be tough, but are very winnable as long as we build strong grassroots support and work as a team.
We need leaders in Washington who will actually approach the job as public servants, not politicians. People who have really put it on the line for our country – serving in combat, building a business from scratch, bringing people together in tough times. I hope you’ll join me in this fight.
[**With the Special Election just weeks away, I can’t take on this fight alone. Will you pitch in to help us hit the ground running on day one?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47281077/353709722/772400505?refcode=AU_PKR_FR_GEN_LAU_NTL_202207_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTAyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyNzE1Mi02MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_BESGm6NH1tuWjtgau2-NU0fhogpiDicrpPPlFsFoI=)
Yours in service,
Pat Ryan

name: Maggie Hassan

body:
As we enter the last full quarter before the election, I just wanted to take a moment to thank you for standing with me in this race.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47281189/353710288/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1211-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTc0NmNlZi01ZmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcmakFLcBZRswDwI6YkngwJ_jC0KQJHB40I8D8rG_Ng=)
---
Hi there,
As we enter the last full quarter before the election, I just wanted to take a moment to thank you for standing with me in this race. We have a tough fight ahead of us, but I've won tough fights before. And with your support, I know we can do it again.
With _Roe v. Wade_ __ overturned and Republicans ramping up their attacks on reproductive rights, it has never been more important to protect our Senate majority. Thanks to people like you, friend, who have stepped up time and time again to support my campaign, I am fighting for the issues that matter most to Granite Staters.
The next few months will be critical. Mitch McConnell has made it clear that if he takes back the Senate, he will ban abortion in all 50 states. And he's laser-focused on flipping this seat. That’s why I’m so grateful for your continued support. Make no mistake, winning won’t be easy, but if we keep working together, I know that we can do it.
So thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for being with me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
P.S. Our fundraising has historically slowed down in the summer, but we can’t afford a slump right now. Republicans have spent over $10 million attacking me, and there’s more to come. That’s why I’m so grateful for your continued support. Make no mistake, winning won’t be easy, but if we keep working together, I know that we can do it. So thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for being with me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan P.S. Our fundraising has historically slowed down in the summer, but we can’t afford a slump right now. Republicans have spent over $10 million attacking me, and there’s more to come. = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

name: Read/Act News
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxODItMjUxY2JlMWFlZTI2NDlhZGI5MmU5OWY2ZDcwYmExMDQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlZC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2hpbGxzZGFsZS9yb21hbi1yZXB1YmxpYy1kdmQ_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yb21hbl9yZXB1YmxpYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9SQU5PMDcwMTIwMjImc2M9MDAxNDdOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyJ9/eMiXp7Oa63rtWlcIcUt0IQ)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic." ** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxODItMjUxY2JlMWFlZTI2NDlhZGI5MmU5OWY2ZDcwYmExMDQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlZC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2hpbGxzZGFsZS9yb21hbi1yZXB1YmxpYy1kdmQ_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yb21hbl9yZXB1YmxpYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9SQU5PMDcwMTIwMjImc2M9MDAxNDdOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyJ9/yjDYI8R8xm-n-6xHTNKT6w) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxODItMjUxY2JlMWFlZTI2NDlhZGI5MmU5OWY2ZDcwYmExMDQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlZC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2hpbGxzZGFsZS9yb21hbi1yZXB1YmxpYy1kdmQ_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yb21hbl9yZXB1YmxpYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9SQU5PMDcwMTIwMjImc2M9MDAxNDdOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyJ9/g7zADMkdvcwl29iZyE6dMw)

| | And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxODItMjUxY2JlMWFlZTI2NDlhZGI5MmU5OWY2ZDcwYmExMDQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlZC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2hpbGxzZGFsZS9yb21hbi1yZXB1YmxpYy1kdmQ_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yb21hbl9yZXB1YmxpYyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9SQU5PMDcwMTIwMjImc2M9MDAxNDdOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyJ9/er6Ju2yc4OqzLkmE9L__fA)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That's why we produced **"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" **and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. | | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic." when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. | | | And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," along with the companion map today: Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That's why we produced "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

I’ve spent my career fighting for working families, small businesses, survivors of domestic abuse, and the environment while serving in the Maryland General Assembly. It would be an honor and privilege to fight for each and every one of you in Annapolis as your next Lieutenant Governor.
Wes and I are committed to getting to work on Day 1 in office, so we can create **more economic opportunities for all Marylanders, high-quality public education for every student, more affordable health care, and 21st century transportation infrastructure** across the state.
But this is a _highly_ competitive race — one of the most important in the nation in 2022 — and we need all the support we can get to stand out from the crowd and reach every last undecided voter over these final 18 days.
**[So, if you can, pitch in a donation to support me and Wes today. We deeply appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47252572/353639350/366828926?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220701deadline7_am_120da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjU0M2ZlYi00MWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=533MKFWd_DK39nmO1OiCrFG22jghmHKWCqdTyeEEEls=)**
— Aruna

clean_body: | = Hi, team! It’s Aruna, Wes’s running mate and candidate for Lieutenant Governor. First, thank you for helping us end the month of June on a strong note. Today, we’ve officially entered primary election month, andin just two days, Wes and I face our LAST campaign finance deadline before Election Day. Every campaign in this gubernatorial race has to disclose their fundraising numbers one more time before the primary, and it’s a crucial opportunity to show how strong our people-powered movement is before voters make their voices heard on July 19. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’ve spent my career fighting for working families, small businesses, survivors of domestic abuse, and the environment while serving in the Maryland General Assembly. It would be an honor and privilege to fight for each and every one of you in Annapolis as your next Lieutenant Governor. Wes and I are committed to getting to work on Day 1 in office, so we can create more economic opportunities for all Marylanders, high-quality public education for every student, more affordable health care, and 21st century transportation infrastructure across the state. But this is a highly competitive race — one of the most important in the nation in 2022 — and we need all the support we can get to stand out from the crowd and reach every last undecided voter over these final 18 days. = — Aruna | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. name: Eric Lynn, Democratic Nominee for Congress
subject: Thank you, team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERIC LYNN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Eric Lynn for Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP24/1/93680/images/lynn-email-logo.png]
Hi team –

I just wanted to send you a note to thank you for supporting us through the end of last quarter.

We were up against one of the most important fundraising deadlines of the year. And I am so appreciative of the thousands of people, including you, who make this campaign possible.

This race isn't easy. At every turn, we're faced with an extreme Republican opponent who is backed by Trump, the gun lobby, and special interest groups. That's not the campaign that we're running here.

I've worked to make Team Lynn a movement that inspires hope, meets voters where they're at, and most importantly, listens to the needs of my neighbors in Pinellas County.

This race is going to require all hands on deck until November. We need a Democratic movement that's united to keep our majority and prevent a Republican takeover. That's why I'm proud to have you on my team.

You know that this 2022 midterm election will determine the future of our country. And you're not afraid to stand up and fight for a Democratic win.

Thank you again for your support, and let's keep up the fight.

– Eric Lynn, Democratic Nominee for Congress, FL-13
Eric Lynn is a former Senior Advisor to President Obama, national security expert, small business owner, community advocate, and St. Petersburg Native who is ready to lead Pinellas County forward. Empathic, passionate, and pragmatic, Eric knows how to get the job done in Washington on day one.
Will you join Eric's team and support him for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-email?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=7b02f9a8-66f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a]

subject: Where would you rank Donald Trump...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**News Alert: Historians rank Donald Trump as the WORST president in 150 years!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8437?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=5004%2E9716520%2EPVgzYh)
_He was our worst president in over a century, but Trump reportedly wants to run again in 2024!**Please, tell us now:**_

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8437?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=5004%2E9716520%2EPVgzYh)
**Should Donald Trump run for president in 2024?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8437?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=5004%2E9716520%2EPVgzYh)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8437?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=5004%2E9716520%2EPVgzYh)
---

Team: The results are in, and a poll of more than 100 historians **_ranks Donald Trump LAST among American presidents in the last 150 years._**

Trump’s presidency was defined by his corruption, racism, and incompetence -- but even though historians agree he was one of the worst EVER, Trump is still planning a 2024 comeback!

We need to know where voters stand BEFORE Trump announces a run. **Our urgent Live Poll closes at MIDNIGHT, and we're still missing your response! Please, tell us now:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8437?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=5004%2E9716520%2EPVgzYh)
**Should Donald Trump run for president in 2024?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8437?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=5004%2E9716520%2EPVgzYh)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8437?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=5004%2E9716520%2EPVgzYh)
---

Thank you for your input,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

[Photo](https://go.dscc.org/go/1270?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-TrumpAlert-WorstPresidentEver1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=5004%2E9716520%2EPVgzYh) by Gage Skidmore. name: Deb Baldus McGrath
subject: Asking for your endorsement, not your money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is a campaign by and for the people.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47257709/353653461/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.31cbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.31cbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWNiZTYxOS00NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMMzfN1BvXVN40jVLLLUHegGZJwZYX2YOQ1_Wd7q0Wc=) Peter,

I wanted to reach out right away to extend my sincere gratitude.

**Your generous support over the last week allowed us to meet our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal - our last end-of-quarter goal before August’s primary election!**

Because of your support, we are able to keep our campaign running strong (we even launched our first TV ad!) and do everything it takes to defend this district for Democrats.

I have asked over and over again for you to contribute to our team to power our work, and I’ll ask more before this campaign is over. I’m so grateful to know that I can always count on you to step up.

Today, though, I’m asking for your support in a different kind of way, one that won’t cost a cent.

[This is a campaign by and for the people, and we want to show everyone that _the people_ are with us. Click here to officially endorse my candidacy for Congress. Then, consider sharing this link with your family and friends so they can do the same.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47257710/353653462/1984118611?refcode=ea.31cbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.31cbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWNiZTYxOS00NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMMzfN1BvXVN40jVLLLUHegGZJwZYX2YOQ1_Wd7q0Wc=&emci=bb3ee687-3ef7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=31cbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225) | ****[ENDORSE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47257711/353653463/1984118611?refcode=ea.31cbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.31cbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWNiZTYxOS00NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMMzfN1BvXVN40jVLLLUHegGZJwZYX2YOQ1_Wd7q0Wc=&emci=bb3ee687-3ef7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=31cbe619-46f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)****

This grassroots team is powered by friends, business owners, farmers, activists, and more just like you. I am honored to have you with us.

I could not do this without you,

Deb
| **Deb Baldus McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity.**

Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. clean_body: This is a campaign by and for the people. | = Peter, I wanted to reach out right away to extend my sincere gratitude. Your generous support over the last week allowed us to meet our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal - our last end-of-quarter goal before August’s primary election! Because of your support, we are able to keep our campaign running strong (we even launched our first TV ad!) and do everything it takes to defend this district for Democrats. I have asked over and over again for you to contribute to our team to power our work, and I’ll ask more before this campaign is over. I’m so grateful to know that I can always count on you to step up. Today, though, I’m asking for your support in a different kind of way, one that won’t cost a cent. | ** This grassroots team is powered by friends, business owners, farmers, activists, and more just like you. I am honored to have you with us. I could not do this without you, Deb | Deb Baldus McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb Baldus McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. name: Peter Franchot
subject: Endorsed By Community Leader David Chapman!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Big announcement – I’m so excited to receive the endorsement of David Chapman, our honorary Mayor and longtime advocate of Lake Arbor! For decades, David has proudly served our communities as one of Maryland’s leading grassroots activists. He played a pivotal role in the creation of the Lake Arbor Civic Association, and advocated for new schools, increased economic development, and public safety.
David, I can’t thank you enough for your support. Your leadership represents the promise and possibility of grassroots activism, and as Governor, I’ll proudly partner with you to deliver results for Prince George’s County and all of Maryland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davidchapmanendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davidchapmanendorsement?amount=20.22]
With just weeks to go until the July 19 primary, our movement continues to grow stronger every day. We’re leading in the polls, we’re leading in endorsements, and we’re leading in the battle of ideas. We’re closer to the finish line than any other team in this race – and with your help, we’re going to widen our lead even further.
Fresh off the heels of this major announcement, will you chip in to power our movement to victory? We’re looking to gain 48 new grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight, and your support can help get us to our goal.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davidchapmanendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davidchapmanendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davidchapmanendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davidchapmanendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davidchapmanendorsement]
With election day right around the corner, your contribution will go a long way towards helping us reach out to voters in this critical home stretch.
Your contribution will help secure our victory by allowing us to:
*
Print
more
yard
signs,
field
literature,
and
mail
pieces
*
Run
more
ads
online
and
on
television
*
Create
more
T-shirts,
stickers
and
bumper
magnets
*
Recruit
more
volunteers
*
Knock
on
more
doors
*
Place
more
phone
calls
*
And
so
much
more!
From protecting and expanding access to abortion care at the state level, to making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, to building a world-class transit system, to leveling the playing field for Black Marylanders, we have a truly exciting opportunity to change the way that government does business in the years to come.
Click here to help make our bold vision for our future a reality. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davidchapmanendorsement?amount=20.22]
Thank you for your continued support of our movement!

subject: The Court didn’t end abortion, but YOU can.
body:

[Unsubscribe](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=73fba26530154910bc75237726b301a6&_t=rdrXerbNZiqZJK8ppklVg9DLGtlhkuydxkfRIQRVo8TXNuf6cttZkwoGlGR0xHeCWCryDiJ6jveun0FMc6hESVRNQjnjmBr_j9k4fyJS-QPw-cQ6hO9KpMzenP_Dt4XetfNgRtYILDRcD2Ugj4nLmThOIOKCGj5ja068K9ps7cPz2WydfD4AmCi4MITtW8gDxpFyrnN0F0l9qxmZL60z82_m6x7d3WytXo947XYarYs%3D)

#
Friend of Life,

This is one of the most surreal moments I've ever experienced.

After decades of marching, advocating, and praying, Roe v. Wade is finally finished, the false "constitutional right" to kill a preborn child has been erased by the United States Supreme Court.

We are experiencing a truly historic victory for life!

I rejoice alongside you for the lives that will be saved due to the reversal of this horrific decision. However, this victory is just the beginning.

Our work to transform our culture and make abortion unthinkable is just getting started.

Abortion advocates are in an uproar, pushing lies that women will die, life-saving medical care will be eliminated, and the reversal of Roe will lead us back to the "Dark Ages."

Remember, abortion is still legal and even subsidized in many states. The killing of preborn babies has not stopped.

We are now fighting an uphill battle against an onslaught of disinformation and deceit — the same lies that led to the senseless killing of 63 million innocent children.

The pro-life movement is facing its most critical moment in history.

In order to keep up our momentum for life, we need your financial support.

Specifically, I am looking for 50 people who want to protect babies from abortion to step forward and make a $30 gift before midnight tonight. This will enable us to reach 50,000 moms and dads with the truth they need to choose life. Donate here:**[https://give.liveaction.org](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=73fba26530154910bc75237726b301a6&_e=RZpMgbsNtwjws8zex7rixDFkZU9Lg9vAEwplq6942_Dvvx-76kh-ITiBE5UFRGvMO_7mpj5tarbW0LoVt2kkbAShZ20047isaXKyROC4S7LqUr_C-I8H9tCDWCAHM5Qt_IVoeMzUjzH9GqbwHULdWH2zCFlyaoLsNDffkbFZiZc1Nl9G25kuxCIYUZBIzpK15zM4ncjQM-q22Ebn4-wa2K3YQeGEA1USYX_lCH9TBxfNuK9Mq9-QPy1imn1cQvTA3CUFlOqfY66G5ZlE_Iv854c5bli_WvwEETafjwaEd7SGeMGMVkAo2qZyYnuVjaerwNjNFabJZt_d7ppfF4yZkFbC5pvLb426vvpGaa9wxwZGVpNL-EU-zp2DtYXAbHpx1H051qywW_2dNGT0-4XeB-U11Ruo8n0jFmbyEd9RHyWytUkP3RByyeXLc3TfMSOQ3_r6-rz4GTWACwlfag0RKPKJDri2ypLPX6FP4DKGj_I%3D)**

There is no doubt about it: the goal of the abortion lobby is to enshrine the "right" to kill a child through abortion in federal law. Now that they have failed in the Supreme Court, we will see more efforts than ever before to pass a national law forcing abortion on every community.

Pro-abortion activists are hoping we call it victory and walk away from the fight. But we will not make that mistake.

We must ensure that pro-life states, like Oklahoma, Mississippi, Texas, and dozens of others can continue to enact laws protecting preborn babies. We must shut down abortion facilities that are endangering the lives of women and putting to death innocent children—and we must continue the groundwork to build a Culture of Life in states like California, New York, and Illinois where abortion-on-demand is the law of the land.

No one has the right to intentionally kill an innocent human being. Our human rights, the first among them the right to life, are inherent and given to us by God. Governments exist to protect those rights.

Please stand with us to build a culture that cherishes every human life, starting with our precious preborn children. People can change, and they change their hearts and minds when they are presented with the true humanity of the preborn child and the horrfic violence of abortion. And no other pro-life organization reaches as many people online with the truth about the killing of preborn children.

Your gift of $30 today will get the truth in front 1,000 young women and men who are hearing nothing but lies about abortion from the media. You can be a catalyst for change now: **[https://give.liveaction.org](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=73fba26530154910bc75237726b301a6&_e=RZpMgbsNtwjws8zex7rixDFkZU9Lg9vAEwplq6942_Dvvx-76kh-ITiBE5UFRGvMO_7mpj5tarbW0LoVt2kkbAShZ20047isaXKyROC4S7LqUr_C-I8H9tCDWCAHM5Qt_IVoeMzUjzH9GqbwHULdWH2zCFlyaoLsNDffkbFZiZc1Nl9G25kuxCIYUZBIzpK15zM4ncjQM-q22Ebn4-wa2K3YQeGEA1USYX_lCH9TBxfNuK9Mq9-QPy1imn1cQvTA3CUFlOqfY66G5ZlE_Iv850lZdYuiNeOEte3mVlT4L8pK8POT1wsKJFXsHD0oHdjA7_uJzOcnh1XwT6gl1jX40au-TccuvcnRu6P-arN9-WqriwCJmpAHYowfBZe3u5zoXQTfgqeht7u5btgvbn30-sbDzYwUCh0-pxWyLflSG7kvsEjuRl4BaLGowju1M8pR_HUE2OM26Zigl_qpDk8bNgBzFftsWcKEDzSCWscZYfs%3D)**

We have reversed a deadly decision that has killed over 63 million innocent children, but we are just getting started in our battle to protect the lives of babies for generations to come. The Court can only change laws, it's up to us to change hearts and minds.

name: CIntel on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBIC91h8N)
_Please see a special message from our sponsor:_
---
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60417874:sBIC91h8N:m:1:2532013465:42738D58B87A709FC1674B88DFE07F82:r)
---
| | Good day, fellow American.
You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly.
You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation.
_**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60417874:sBIC91h8N:m:1:2532013465:42738D58B87A709FC1674B88DFE07F82:r)**_
We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.
The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen!
That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**.
We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed.
These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school.
**You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. **
That's because we're seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.
And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country.
So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email!
[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60417874:sBIC91h8N:m:1:2532013465:42738D58B87A709FC1674B88DFE07F82:r)
For our children,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

---

name: Joe Cunningham
subject: It’s all thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| Folks,

I wanted to reach out to thank you for the support you showed our campaign last month.

June was a major month for our campaign. We won the primary and I officially became the Democratic nominee for governor of South Carolina and we faced our first major fundraising deadline of the general election.

You stepped up to show that South Carolinians are ready to fire McMaster and bring new leadership to our state. And with everything going on in S.C. and across the country, we need new leadership now more than ever.

With women’s reproductive rights at stake and McMaster’s vow to push for an abortion ban with no exceptions, we need to fight back and elect a pro-choice governor in November who will protect abortion access and veto any anti-choice legislation passed by the GOP-led legislature. **I vow to you that I will be that governor.**

There is so much at stake in this election, and though the road ahead won’t always be easy, I know we are building a movement that will carry us to victory in November. And for that, I am truly grateful.

If you didn’t get the chance to chip in before our fundraising deadline, or you want to double down on your support of our people-powered campaign, **[click here to make a contribution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47284049/353720479/1313088344?amount=25&contactdata=xV%2ByD8evqIv5DlhXq1kB0Xs02bBahC%2FyCy8wnLm%2FNhDgYCWXMMO%2FUAg7jodEJ4IApMX7Lnlhd2rxc0yIk87mqbxnomlwCy9Q6%2FLIJPZiuAQ%3D&source=JC_EM_ST_1MO_20220701_1_1&utm_source=jc_em_st_1mo_20220701_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDNiZjMwNi02OWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=783tbYBcq188BFncoeFySfHMyx0pxl2_8v3VpwdL-NU=)**

Thank you for always having my back,
Joe

clean_body: | Folks, I wanted to reach out to thank you for the support you showed our campaign last month. June was a major month for our campaign. We won the primary and I officially became the Democratic nominee for governor of South Carolina and we faced our first major fundraising deadline of the general election. You stepped up to show that South Carolinians are ready to fire McMaster and bring new leadership to our state. And with everything going on in S.C. and across the country, we need new leadership now more than ever. With women’s reproductive rights at stake and McMaster’s vow to push for an abortion ban with no exceptions, we need to fight back and elect a pro-choice governor in November who will protect abortion access and veto any anti-choice legislation passed by the GOP-led legislature. I vow to you that I will be that governor. There is so much at stake in this election, and though the road ahead won’t always be easy, I know we are building a movement that will carry us to victory in November. And for that, I am truly grateful. If you didn’t get the chance to chip in before our fundraising deadline, or you want to double down on your support of our people-powered campaign, = Thank you for always having my back, Joe | = | | If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from our team, Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina Joe Cunningham PO Box 21012 Charleston, SC 29413 United States **

---
Folks,

My parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. **_So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in June made me so happy and thankful._**

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in June, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my June fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in November and push their Socialist Agenda on the American people. This can’t happen.

**_I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING._**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start July off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.
| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaj386ph9aavrts86ckmq6k47ve7hc4vqh70nnjg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3cdie1ob6c1h2bs)

name: Mike Waltz
subject: I couldn’t do it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter, I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you for all of your help during our end of quarter push.

Our mission would have never gotten this far without your incredible dedication.

I am so grateful to have a leader like you on our team.

Your perseverance, patriotism, and unapologetic conservatism are a beacon of light.
---
In Service,

But not only that – because of a West Virginia law passed before women had the right to vote – doctors, nurses, and health care providers face arrest and prison for caring for their patients!
The fight for reproductive rights is now up to the State Legislature.

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Testify under oath
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
|
---
Friend,

The House January 6 Committee has released some explosive details about the assault on our Capitol. But they are still missing key pieces of the story and critical testimony from the biggest players involved in allowing the attack to occur. That’s because Donald Trump and his inner circle—including Rep. Kevin McCarthy, Rudy Giuliani, Steve Bannon, and Mark Meadows—refuse to testify under oath. They love to spread lies about January 6 on their shows or in media appearances. But we must demand the truth from them.
You deserve to know what they knew as this attack on our democracy unfolded. All Americans do. That’s why we’ve launched a new billboard campaign in places they can’t ignore.**Here’s what the billboards will look like:**
---
---
These billboards are live in New York City’s Times Square, near the Mar-a-Lago Club in Florida, in Kevin McCarthy’s congressional district, and near Mark Meadows’ residence in Lake Keowee, SC.
##
RAP is fighting back against Trump and his enablers—but none of the work we do would be possible without your support.

Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project

clean_body: | Friend, The House January 6 Committee has released some explosive details about the assault on our Capitol. But they are still missing key pieces of the story and critical testimony from the biggest players involved in allowing the attack to occur. That’s because Donald Trump and his inner circle—including Rep. Kevin McCarthy, Rudy Giuliani, Steve Bannon, and Mark Meadows—refuse to testify under oath. They love to spread lies about January 6 on their shows or in media appearances. But we must demand the truth from them. You deserve to know what they knew as this attack on our democracy unfolded. All Americans do. That’s why we’ve launched a new billboard campaign in places they can’t ignore.Here’s what the billboards will look like: These billboards are live in New York City’s Times Square, near the Mar-a-Lago Club in Florida, in Kevin McCarthy’s congressional district, and near Mark Meadows’ residence in Lake Keowee, SC. RAP is fighting back against Trump and his enablers—but none of the work we do would be possible without your support. Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project | | | | | | | | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

It's time we all join Matt Gaetz in calling out this warmonger who FIRST joined Democrats in a persecution of the whole MAGA Movement, and is NOW joining them to force the jab on America's brave soldiers... == | | | == | Matt is not backing down on this - in fact, he's calling for ALL service members who have been separated from the military for refusing this experimental vaccine to be restored with their rank and back-pay immediately. This medical apartheid that only hurts our military readiness should have never been forced upon these heroes. If you agree with Gaetz over Cheney, help us make that crystal clear ASAP. | | | == | Thanks for fighting back, Team Gaetz | | | | | == == | | | == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
You have made an incredible impact.
#

Friends —
I know June was a tough month, and that we sent a lot of emails ahead of last night’s FEC deadline. So, I just wanted to send a quick thank you before the holiday weekend.
In difficult moments, Gabby has always reminded me to summon hope. To keep going, even when it seems darkest. And with a team like this behind me, I know we’ll defend this seat and hold the Senate.
We received tens of thousands of donations ahead of our public filing deadline, which speaks volumes about the depth of support for this people-powered campaign. It all adds up to help us fight back against the attack ads running right now, and that’s how we win.
It’s no secret this is going to be an expensive campaign, and my decision to not accept corporate PAC money makes fundraising a little more challenging. But it was the right decision and all of you have made an incredible impact.
I am very proud of that fact, and you should be too. Gabby and I hope you’re able to enjoy some time with family and friends this weekend.
Thanks again,
Mark
* * *
**Every month we aim to get a number of people signing up to say they endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. This month, our goal is 25,000 people. Will you add your name to say you endorse Mark today?**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-endorse-july22/?source=em220701-1-7&refcode2=3208.6688874.vArDpz&t=1&akid=3208%2E6688874%2EvArDpz)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=3208%2E6688874%2EvArDpz).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Watch and share this course on DVD
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq65fgjde6k09iqmla0t27625oqo72vnaudrmicg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg60oj4cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tr6csqe0pbhmpim1cr5m6p6eojhe9orccb16gpm0tjm6pjm8slks5pm7cjicoo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3cphhespm0ptim5j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr1ta68t6icobgqtpd0hv965td3p51fi8oalp6b0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg60oj4cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zijm9fb1gt4bai0o22cbhog1ctkbtabss56u22ro_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg60oj4cdh2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zigtcf49iap5sj9ik1ccgdc7vpdtcibb5nnffphg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg60oj4cdh2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi5j4kjels6f7oo3hti45qvshabgvq660c5l1s90_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg60oj4cdh2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zjr60po9uf7u6p5ic4mcek1j1s6b3395bplfa9b8).

Kerri here, with Madison Horn's campaign for U.S. Senate, calling all supporters!

With the help of our tremendous volunteers, Madison received almost 70,000 votes in the primary election.

We need your continued support to get the word out about Madison and her desire to "Bring logic back to politics." The run-off election between Madison and Jason Bollinger will occur on August 23, 2022 and the general election on November 8th.

We will have a volunteer call on Wednesday, July 6, 2022 at 6:00 PM CST. If you would like to attend, please use the Zoom link below. Thank you for your support!

name: Katie Hill
subject: We're really grateful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xC83zD7pD4BanQQv5jnRLRHLExv2TXR1Mq2oBU10KZw=/LwLmorrIDtwqD-0eWgxsNXqluZ41IL11-NGry1cOfGs=)
---
There's no sugar coating it. This last week has been _brutal_.
After half a century, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. Already, clinics have shut their doors and abortion procedures have been canceled. _We are in a crisis._
**That 's why we wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.**
The end of June was a really big fundraising deadline for us. And with the Court's decision, our work of advocating for and electing women has _never_ been more important.
**We couldn 't do our work without you. So thank you, ****Peter, for being a part of the HER Time team.**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xC83zD7pD4BanQQv5jnRLRHLExv2TXR1Mq2oBU10KZw=/HAsQ9huDi7_WRYe1-qcXJ8GOnhwFbwlvY0e16Nh4v-g=?refcode=X_070122_ThankYou)
---
[**Your donations will allow us to keep fighting for women 's rights no matter what the future might bring >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xC83zD7pD4BanQQv5jnRLRHLExv2TXR1Mq2oBU10KZw=/pFWey3CkZsUT-AJNFHYxf_Y8uo_UPyIl5p1sLHZv4Jg=?refcode=X_070122_ThankYou)
In solidarity,
-- _Katie_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xC83zD7pD4BanQQv5jnRLRHLExv2TXR1Mq2oBU10KZw=/pFWey3CkZsUT-AJNFHYxf_Y8uo_UPyIl5p1sLHZv4Jg=?refcode=X_070122_ThankYou)

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time **[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xC83zD7pD4BanQQv5jnRLRHLExv2TXR1Mq2oBU10KZw=/ouW6UMycyX9H0jzJGaTJC10wA93GoUsvBTdjU5pPfC4=?refcode=footer)**, and **[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xC83zD7pD4BanQQv5jnRLRHLExv2TXR1Mq2oBU10KZw=/LwLmorrIDtwqD-0eWgxsNXqluZ41IL11-NGry1cOfGs=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

clean_body: = There's no sugar coating it. This last week has been brutal. After half a century, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Already, clinics have shut their doors and abortion procedures have been canceled. We are in a crisis. That 's why we wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support. The end of June was a really big fundraising deadline for us. And with the Court's decision, our work of advocating for and electing women has never been more important. We couldn 't do our work without you. So thank you, Peter, for being a part of the HER Time team. | Peter, I want you to be one of the first to know: a new poll just came out that shows John in the top 3 of this crowded race — and 23% of Maryland Democratic primary voters are still undecided! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47284806/353723435/-1945192756?source=email-ngp-20220701-fr_full-JO_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220701-fr_full-JO_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220701&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JO_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=dc24110b-6ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzI0MTEwYi02ZmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xZN6x54rSiubm5F4g3SYUXfFm_R1RsuPrZijEYUJA9c=) What does that mean for us? **With just 18 days left until the July 19th primary, this race is wide open – and we need your support now more than ever to take the lead. ** I’m getting ready to do another MASSIVE TV ad buy to get John in front of as many undecided voters across the state, but we still need to raise another $6,500 to make the buy as strong as we can. [_**Can you rush in $15 right now to get us there?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47284807/353723436/-1945192756?source=email-ngp-20220701-fr_full-JO_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220701-fr_full-JO_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220701&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JO_S2_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=dc24110b-6ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzI0MTEwYi02ZmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xZN6x54rSiubm5F4g3SYUXfFm_R1RsuPrZijEYUJA9c=) Our opponents have been spending nearly 2x as much as us, but it’s abundantly clear their message is NOT resonating with Marylanders as so many folks remain undecided. Meanwhile, our polling shows that once folks see our ads and get to know a little more about John’s story and his vision to build a more just and equitable Maryland, they support us. **So as long as our campaign can continue fueling TV ad buys, digital ads, and radio to spread John’s message, we will win. ** Supporters like you have fueled our campaign to this point, and now John and I are depending on you to get us across the finish line. With just 18 days left until the July 19th primary, this race is wide open – and we need your support now more than ever to take the lead. I’m getting ready to do another MASSIVE TV ad buy to get John in front of as many undecided voters across the state, but we still need to raise another $6,500 to make the buy as strong as we can. = Our opponents have been spending nearly 2x as much as us, but it’s abundantly clear their message is NOT resonating with Marylanders as so many folks remain undecided. Meanwhile, our polling shows that once folks see our ads and get to know a little more about John’s story and his vision to build a more just and equitable Maryland, they support us. So as long as our campaign can continue fueling TV ad buys, digital ads, and radio to spread John’s message, we will win. subject: Personal Question
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
‌ |
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/personal-question-nipxviacni?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| Hey ,
Mark Brnovich here.

If you’re getting this email, then you probably already know a little bit about me...

Like the fact that I’m the 26th Attorney General for our great state of Arizona...

Or how I’m running for U.S. Senate.

The reason I’m reaching out to you today is a personal one:

I want to earn your vote in the upcoming Republican Party Primary on August 2nd.

**Notice, I said _earn_.**

That’s an important word, yet it feels like politicians don’t use it that often.

Instead, it seems like a lot of elected officials think they _deserve_ to hold their office.

Like they’re entitled to it.

Have you ever noticed that?

Now sure, those folks may pay lip service to voters every few years during an election...

But once they get enough votes – it’s just business as usual...

And they abandon all those promises they made to you.

**It’s messed up, right?**

And this is one of the big reasons I’m running for the United States Senate: To give the citizens of Arizona a real voice in Washington D.C.

Now look...

This is the part of the email where you’re probably expecting me to start rattling off my track-record and my conservative values...

Or maybe you’re just waiting for me to ask you for money.

Well, let me surprise you a little today...

Because while I _am_ extremely proud of my track-record and my values...

And while _of course_ most political campaigns need donation to succeed...

Today’s email is all about YOU.

So instead of asking for your money, or your vote...

**What I really want to know is this: **

_What’s the #1 issue in our state that’s keeping you up at night?_

Inflation? Border Security? Election Integrity? Jobs?

Maybe it’s something else.

Do me a favor...

**Take five seconds to hit reply to this email and let me know what’s important to you**.

Seriously, you are the reason that I’m running for the United States Senate.

It’s not for power, or influence, or fortune, or fame.

It’s for every man, woman, and family in our state.

I work for _you_ ...

And I want to know how I can best serve _you_ once I’m elected to the U.S. Senate.

All the Best,

Mark
---
| | PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE.

---

subject: Them: millions; us: ZERO
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Raphael Warnock and his Democrat dark money allies have been flooding the airways with attacks against me. |
---
Fellow American,

I wish I had better news, but here's the truth: we have been seriously outraised, and now, we're also being outspent.

Senator Raphael Warnock and his Democrat dark money allies have been flooding the airways with attacks against me.

Fellow American, they've already spent $8 million since I won the Republican nomination, flooding Georgians' homes and screens with misleading attacks.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5e03110c08594b67a783e63351ed0c2d&_e=_zAwyhBFlpUXk5BtUgZC0V4xDTvD7pqMVANxUV1oWK8KYBFh7jAhFjWm7jn3Yj850GrvA1eRMTUVy0gMV6XUg-g9eh0heTMJnXCjZ2ubEVxjixzPiAhd_1D-SlNMHHxi0YqJFXKknehQ_dY4zWhBWAtWkoqXOuif3tszQ6KefkfsNPofEGl1lFG-gHfjQOcntRXpAmU_v4ThLMeQ94uDoWokYSb3H85eQzBdWBA5TwH_EQGWsJ3HcRHdvHj4elrRAhITgRRYXE1-QU1O2Wzt169aYmyK-Habw3hZUlrM0g5p4LtcIBD53epP1r-Iyp3MWeqVgO7gIcdJ8GEUv7gmxq-iFi5xV0BewsQDz3gNIB2wkWgBAv5qXYuwt_DjRE9vtTTTWJgDr9_D4byiO5aRl_Bsap_C22xcvFzvWvuCsCUs601HdMZFRJJg6ZfMcmWiEkJ8-ntElRs11mOeIVghM9z6XbAK7aVH2djosjWLyS4McFc2Pv78rNvYsu8CRiXz)

clean_body: Raphael Warnock and his Democrat dark money allies have been flooding the airways with attacks against me. | Fellow American, I wish I had better news, but here's the truth: we have been seriously outraised, and now, we're also being outspent. Senator Raphael Warnock and his Democrat dark money allies have been flooding the airways with attacks against me. Fellow American, they've already spent $8 million since I won the Republican nomination, flooding Georgians' homes and screens with misleading attacks. We need to go on the air ASAP to set the record straight and push back against the onslaught of attacks. It costs a whopping $2 million A WEEK in Georgia to make sure all voters see an ad, but we don't have enough in our media fund to put our ads on the air yet. This may seem like a lot of money - and it is - but your support of few bucks can help sponsor an ad and get us on the air! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | | We're going to be making some final decisions on our ad buys this week. If we come up short of our goal, we'll have to cut our TV budget and delay our ads even longer. Please don't let that happen, Fellow American. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Ben, NDRC
subject: just got some more details
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
---

---
Hey – just got some more details about the NDRC’s 2022 Democracy Targets. Here’s the criteria that A.G. Holder and the team used to choose our initial targets: ➞ Races that will be important to redistricting.
➞ Races where we can reelect fair maps champions.
➞ Races where we can hold Republicans accountable for gerrymandering.
➞ Races that are critical to defending democracy. Before I go further, **can you make a quick donation to help us invest in our target races and fair maps efforts?[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndrc-helpwinkey_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47285515/353726404/792749532?amount=20&refcode=20220703.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyM2FiMzA0LTcwZjktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P7zaLp07pS5NXsLRUNjKiQQw9Agn8rUEWiB2mwwr29s=)**

Okay, let’s break it down. ➞ **Races that will be important to redistricting.** This is especially critical now that we know the GOP plans to use elections to jeopardize the independence of state supreme courts.

➞ **Races where we can help reelect fair maps champions.** We need to support officials who have fought against Republican gerrymanders, like the governors of Kansas and Wisconsin.

➞ **Races where we can hold Republicans accountable for gerrymandering.** Texas and Florida are two states where we can do this.

➞ **Races that are critical to defending democracy.** Trump’s allies in the GOP are openly plotting to undermine democracy and even overturn election results. Winning key races in states like Georgia, Pennsylvania, and Arizona will be essential to stopping them! Does this sound like an effort you want to be a part of? Then we need you now, team. The more funds we can raise, the more we can invest in these target races and all our fair maps and democracy-saving work. **Will you rush an immediate donation to help us continue fighting to _end gerrymandering and save democracy_? [_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndrc-helpwinkey_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47285516/353726405/792749532?amount=20&refcode=20220703.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyM2FiMzA0LTcwZjktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P7zaLp07pS5NXsLRUNjKiQQw9Agn8rUEWiB2mwwr29s=)**

– Ben

clean_body: Hey – just got some more details about the NDRC’s 2022 Democracy Targets. Here’s the criteria that A.G. Holder and the team used to choose our initial targets: ➞ Races that will be important to redistricting. ➞ Races where we can reelect fair maps champions. ➞ Races where we can hold Republicans accountable for gerrymandering. ➞ Races that are critical to defending democracy. Before I go further, can you make a quick donation to help us invest in our target races and fair maps efforts?= Okay, let’s break it down. ➞ Races that will be important to redistricting. This is especially critical now that we know the GOP plans to use elections to jeopardize the independence of state supreme courts. ➞ Races where we can help reelect fair maps champions. We need to support officials who have fought against Republican gerrymanders, like the governors of Kansas and Wisconsin. ➞ Races where we can hold Republicans accountable for gerrymandering. Texas and Florida are two states where we can do this. ➞ Races that are critical to defending democracy. Trump’s allies in the GOP are openly plotting to undermine democracy and even overturn election results. Winning key races in states like Georgia, Pennsylvania, and Arizona will be essential to stopping them! Does this sound like an effort you want to be a part of? Then we need you now, team. The more funds we can raise, the more we can invest in these target races and all our fair maps and democracy-saving work. Will you rush an immediate donation to help us continue fighting to end gerrymandering and save democracy? = – Ben | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.
