name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: I wanted you to be the first to know (thank you!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
We officially hit our very first FEC grassroots fundraising goal!
| | |
---
Hi Peter, it's Trudy. I'm reaching out because I wanted you to be the first to know: **We officially hit our very first FEC grassroots fundraising goal!** Thank you so, so much for being on this team with me.
Because of supporters like you, we had the early, strong momentum that we needed to hit this goal. **I know people and pundits are watching these numbers to judge the strength of our campaign, and we've shown them we're a force to be reckoned with.**
Now that we've crossed this first big deadline, we just have one month until the primary. The pressure is really on from now until then, but you know that this campaign isn't about hitting goals and deadlines.**It's about bridging divides and healing a hurting nation. **
And Peter, that's exactly why I'm running for Senate. I want to make life easier for the people of Missouri and for those around the country.
These past few years have been tough for all of us in so many different ways, and there is a lot to heal from. Families have lost loved ones to the devastating pandemic. Parents are struggling to pay the bills and put dinner on the table. Gun violence has left countless families heartbroken with the loss of someone they love. Now, women are watching our reproductive rights be stripped away from us. And all the while, communities and neighbors are being torn apart by the extremism and partisanship in Washington.
I know that tackling big issues like these isn't easy – and maybe some would call me an idealist.**But I truly believe that if we bring compassion, integrity, and honesty back to Washington – if our leaders do more listening and less lecturing – we can make life so much better for American families. **
I am so, so grateful to have your partnership in this work. Thank you for believing in the power of goodness and hope.
With gratitude,

Trudy
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47285730/353727172/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk77-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmQ0M2RiOC03MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fd0tG48m59asSRTko_7rxQ2IyDVhmy20epRICtzUIKY=)

name: Team Chabot
subject: Is your name on our Vote Red Pledge yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chabot for Congress
body:
Are you changing your voter registration from RED to BLUE? I got the notification that you could be changing your party affiliation this November and| | |

Time and time again, I’m amazed by the power of our grassroots team. Whenever we need your help, you step up and exceed every possible expectation.

Thanks to you, we flew past our June fundraising goal and even got a head start on our major July 17 fundraising deadline! But this is going to be a tough fight, and I’m asking everyone to get off the sidelines because we know what’s at stake.

It’s been a hard few weeks, no doubt about it, but your support gives me hope for our future. **When Michiganders come together to fight for change, there is no stopping us. And I’m never going to stop fighting for you.**

Thank you,

Gretchen

**[P.S. We have a major fundraising deadline on July 17, and we need to show the power of our campaign. body:

Peter,

I just quickly wanted to say THANK YOU for the overwhelming support to hit our quarterly fundraising goal.

And that’s exactly why Democrat Annie Kuster is so worried right now...the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is jump-starting their funding efforts to oust her and push for a clean sweep in New Hampshire! $3.5M to be exact.

Congresswoman Kuster is drowning as she’s tied her proverbial anchor to Joe Biden’s reckless, anti-American energy policies that have crippled us with RECORD-HIGH gas prices averaging $4.98/gallon...

The writing is on the wall and THE LEFT knows it – you're making such a monumental impact with every donation. Help me KICK OUT KUSTER in November >> (https://secure.winred.com/burnsfornh/pg_e_thank-you_gdw_20220627_a?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=BurnsB_thank-you_20220701&utm_medium=Static_Graphic&utm_content=thank-you&utm_agency=PG&amount=&utm_source=Burns+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c9f894cf10-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_30_09_40_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7e3d774d02-c9f894cf10-252807809)

DONATE $20.22 TODAY (https://secure.winred.com/burnsfornh/pg_e_thank-you_gdw_20220627_a?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=BurnsB_thank-you_20220701&utm_medium=Static_Graphic&utm_content=thank-you&utm_agency=PG&amount=20.22&utm_source=Burns+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c9f894cf10-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_30_09_40_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7e3d774d02-c9f894cf10-252807809)
Annie can’t escape her 41% unfavorable rating as she hides in D.C. with Biden and her socialist squad – hardworking New Hampshire families deserve better and won’t allow it...

Her and Joe have to go!

Your contribution of $5, $20.22, even $50 is exactly what we need right now to get it done. (https://secure.winred.com/burnsfornh/pg_e_thank-you_gdw_20220627_a?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=BurnsB_thank-you_20220701&utm_medium=Static_Graphic&utm_content=thank-you&utm_agency=PG&amount=&utm_source=Burns+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c9f894cf10-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_06_30_09_40_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7e3d774d02-c9f894cf10-252807809)

The September primary will be here before we know it, and then it’s on to November. I’m doing everything I can to make sure New Hampshire has a real Republican fighter in Congress.

Are you with me?Any amount you can contribute today goes so far. name: Nikki Fried
subject: new video
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
As a lifelong advocate for women’s rights and the ONLY outspoken pro-choice candidate in this race, watching the Supreme Court overturn Roe v. Wade and strip women of our right to choose was absolutely devastating.
But even as we face the worst attack on women’s rights in America in our lifetime, I’ve found hope and solace in looking back at our history.
That’s why I decided to release a video commemorating the centuries’ long fight for women’s rights, and telling everyone loud and clear that our fight isn’t over — that we won’t back down .
Click here to watch our video and join our fight for women’s rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-roe-tp?refcode=701email]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-roe-tp?refcode=701email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-roe-tp?refcode=701email]
Countless women have stood up, spoken out, and fought with everything they had to give us the rights we have today. And we won’t let anti-choice politicians like Ron DeSantis take those rights away from us — not without a fight.
So today, I’m calling on you, Peter.
I’m asking you to help me make history as Florida’s first woman Governor — a Governor who’s been in this fight since day one, and who will NEVER stop fighting until women have the rights we deserve.
We need to stand on the shoulders of the women who came before us. We need to keep fighting and stand our ground. If you’re with me, click here to watch our video and chip in what you can today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-roe-tp?refcode=701email]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-roe-tp?refcode=701email]
With thanks,
Nikki

https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
This is the most competitive seat in Arizona. It's CRUCIAL to protecting the House majority and — as this last week has proven — we need our House majority more than ever .
I will fight tirelessly for reproductive freedom, climate action, and gun safety. But I can't do any of that without your support.
That's why I wanted to take a moment to thank you personally, friend.
We had a really big fundraising deadline at the end of June, and thanks to the generosity of folks like you, we EXCEEDED our goal. This gives us the exact momentum we need before the primary election.

name: Andrew Regalado, Country First
subject: Country First in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
The next PA State Chapter Meeting

| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_072022&n=1)
---
Friend -- Next Wednesday, **July 6th at 7:00pm ET** , the Pennsylvania State Chapter will be holding their next _virtual_ state chapter meeting, led by Pennsylvanians! | [](https://www.country1st.com/pa072022?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_072022&n=2 "RSVP Now!") [RSVP Now!](https://www.country1st.com/pa072022?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_072022&n=2)
---
Here's what you can expect:
* Meet the Pennsylvania State Organizing Committee Leadership and hear how you can join them.
* Engage in discussion with other Country First Members from Pennsylvania.
* Learn about the current status of [Primary 1st](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_072022&n=3) & how to volunteer.
* Provide feedback and ideas on what you would like to see Country First accomplish in Pennsylvania.
* Hear National Updates about what's coming next from Country First.

As of February 2022, Country First launched a state chapter in all 50 states. Since then, State Organizing Committees (SOCs) have undergone training and begun organizing around [Primary 1st](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_072022&n=4). We are excited to get more members engaged and elevate this community to new heights!
For any questions, please respond directly to this email or contact our National Membership Experience chair, dave.rapids@country1st.com.
Look forward to seeing you next week!
All Things Country First,
Andrew Regalado
National Grassroots Director
[](https://www.country1st.com/action?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_072022&n=5 "Wear Your Values") [Wear Your Values](https://www.country1st.com/action?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_072022&n=5)

name: John Kasich
subject: My new podcast
body:
Earlier this year, I launched a new podcast, "Kasich & Klepper" with The Daily Show's Jordan Klepper| | | [](http://links.kasichandklepper.com/u/click?_t=94957ab191d34cf29caf01258313977a&_m=9468263ed4744afaae21d4b95316d614&_e=A5jUaxLG37h7hcrGn1bdeC5pioU169VzMnoI6oIfwq50z9oYkTcsNM87o6MznPJp7KGKUh-7NTZIRx_0ktAQ3x1BQDqTdZ-o9oC90PT1zco6geV91MU9hswgcgNOg0PbRSyieNP9p_iW5VHUgRV9Q0WmWMQwCFw8h1wJDrRIPQpmxe12c5pfPx57JDfk2AUgMx471Th-XgktfQAtfYYQ3cj60-Y2jSTbk5pbRKpyLj6T9CdC1uqHWm0Yn9ZF7RCzk8jaYwRnXCavM7-j0P3fFYQ444zVMyl6ZStvBxax9F8%3D)
---
| |
---
| | Peter, earlier this year, I launched a new podcast, "Kasich & Klepper" with The Daily Show's Jordan Klepper, and we set out to make something that is unique, and I hope both engaging and thought-provoking.
---
[](http://links.kasichandklepper.com/u/click?_t=94957ab191d34cf29caf01258313977a&_m=9468263ed4744afaae21d4b95316d614&_e=A5jUaxLG37h7hcrGn1bdeC5pioU169VzMnoI6oIfwq50z9oYkTcsNM87o6MznPJp7KGKUh-7NTZIRx_0ktAQ3xOjX4yf4is1a4dISgW2eQec0gtaDIzEtSjyt-ftvdtNNOsR-UXo9osKsfLDWNsFr1uD2H_Fn16TtB94jWFeL0en5yC913Ugd1OA0tpJ2EdLUqWJrjDo-cD7_KCdXaOsOxGUrARRC54jq9vCfCjdvRtPkTLkwaHtroaKqY7y_utnNNXppkPIoAEolkUcwsA3T32UVA3avaSrl-59Af8f56Y%3D)
---
While it's somewhat inevitable with how divided our nation is, I didn't want to make this podcast just about politics, but rather a discussion about life and current events with some of the most interesting people out there. To date, we've had some really great guests including Bob Costas, Chris Bosh, Mark Cuban, Stevie Van Zandt, Julie Bowen, Ian Bremmer, Alyssa Milano and many others. [Be sure to check out "Kasich & Klepper" wherever you get your podcasts](http://links.kasichandklepper.com/u/click?_t=94957ab191d34cf29caf01258313977a&_m=9468263ed4744afaae21d4b95316d614&_e=A5jUaxLG37h7hcrGn1bdeC5pioU169VzMnoI6oIfwq50z9oYkTcsNM87o6MznPJp7KGKUh-7NTZIRx_0ktAQ3-cmyGGDaLY9ZMFALXDkDHMWTYaV7qjGGq8NCeGm7KqPklbB8Sd4w0q-AUjEnDKHV7Xqwgv52NVzw54VlnmHm36Ps-zipK65QVF15vsJFHr52rsYDYC3Rz0ugSR0VKISpzbgm5K5AS0kllxrAS2U9ahWkDtjYZ7aQ_3wg7wtUdZ-OyvLSCkB2gJ-ohPAUHYzJsM9sN3aRpOseTKVeNZR9h0%3D). Helpful links are at the bottom of this email.
---
|
---
**FEATURED EPISODE:**
---
[LISTEN NOW](http://links.kasichandklepper.com/u/click?_t=94957ab191d34cf29caf01258313977a&_m=9468263ed4744afaae21d4b95316d614&_e=A5jUaxLG37h7hcrGn1bdeC5pioU169VzMnoI6oIfwq50z9oYkTcsNM87o6MznPJp7KGKUh-7NTZIRx_0ktAQ390dX9eXyHUmSFu7hjGiW4uh0pHDaWcjJ4P2uQYtel2h9LL9IU9e33rIHm18-8UR1bRRLoovcXzGzMkj3Plsir6clMmdSlrcFsV64XB3tFjmIiRTekPadO2vb1yOc2_1XatyVsDKK5iHJ4mPogp7rwGl01XzBaNqYmAIMors7BIiOAgTydzX-rXTAFPsuXTOb2W4TRBdaHAoMPWBaSXzr1w%3D)
---
It’s encouraging to see bipartisan legislation passed in Congress to take steps to reduce gun violence. While there is certainly more that many of us wanted done, this is a good step for our nation. This is something we should all celebrate. In a recent episode, we spoke with Fred Guttenberg, a gun safety advocate whose daughter Jamie was murdered in the 2018 Parkland school shooting. Check it out:
---
[](http://links.kasichandklepper.com/u/click?_t=94957ab191d34cf29caf01258313977a&_m=9468263ed4744afaae21d4b95316d614&_e=A5jUaxLG37h7hcrGn1bdeC5pioU169VzMnoI6oIfwq50z9oYkTcsNM87o6MznPJp7KGKUh-7NTZIRx_0ktAQ3wODPvqQPjFjDlKnIgmcJpBMNK3Kunz0mIN07Ge6w7wAC0PDpbr_tWfTDi4NlklqO7GBVpT4d4r6uyC9opMsLzc0S4zR1biArSnBq5B8srZGu2BikxbGU_fIiPS8aWY-36RpAJlgOoJIUJWQb_1ET7VM_405_xXlCyrdaqsHkkU2jC-cJQhrtBvf2AWpIq1YZ96GaHz9KdErSiDEZNofX4w%3D)
---
[LISTEN NOW](http://links.kasichandklepper.com/u/click?_t=94957ab191d34cf29caf01258313977a&_m=9468263ed4744afaae21d4b95316d614&_e=A5jUaxLG37h7hcrGn1bdeC5pioU169VzMnoI6oIfwq50z9oYkTcsNM87o6MznPJp7KGKUh-7NTZIRx_0ktAQ37rd_vb1edI6siMV6eEfbAE4g8R8HJy0qr7JnzkB4SIaceLyQHmCTdRzG7vAonkpY4zwSQpvqXGb-Na9KVS0Jk3VS7w_R1o1p0ocGPWgROxnN0FotRf28G-eBRciKoK3Jj8trmimE_BDqlFs1TksVOz3hnYToIFef8gVtCbRoiPHwxtC6Dvp1qsya1x6qCk8Hozza_2s1e0NLC9kW_aUJGU%3D)

I hope you'll enjoy listening to the podcast as much as I have enjoyed making it with Jordan and our partners at Treefort Media. Stay tuned for more updates in the near future. Thank you! -John

clean_body: Earlier this year, I launched a new podcast, "Kasich & Klepper" with The Daily Show's Jordan Klepper| | | | | | | Peter, earlier this year, I launched a new podcast, "Kasich & Klepper" with The Daily Show's Jordan Klepper, and we set out to make something that is unique, and I hope both engaging and thought-provoking. While it's somewhat inevitable with how divided our nation is, I didn't want to make this podcast just about politics, but rather a discussion about life and current events with some of the most interesting people out there. To date, we've had some really great guests including Bob Costas, Chris Bosh, Mark Cuban, Stevie Van Zandt, Julie Bowen, Ian Bremmer, Alyssa Milano and many others. . Helpful links are at the bottom of this email. | FEATURED EPISODE: It’s encouraging to see bipartisan legislation passed in Congress to take steps to reduce gun violence. While there is certainly more that many of us wanted done, this is a good step for our nation. This is something we should all celebrate. In a recent episode, we spoke with Fred Guttenberg, a gun safety advocate whose daughter Jamie was murdered in the 2018 Parkland school shooting. Check it out: | I hope you'll enjoy listening to the podcast as much as I have enjoyed making it with Jordan and our partners at Treefort Media. Stay tuned for more updates in the near future. Thank you! -John | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | If you no longer wish to receive these emails, .

name: Charity Barry
subject: Independence Day Parade Walkers Needed
body:
Join Us Across the District to Celebrate the 4th
| | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Greetings, Patriots!

We are looking forward to a festive Fourth of July! Please help us celebrate our country's great independence by spreading the word of a future representative that will fight to keep us free!

We need volunteers for the following parades:

July 3rd:
LaFayette County Wiota Parade - Line up on Walnut near the intersection of Hwy's 78 and M at 11:30

July 4th:
Sauk County Blackhawk Parade - Line up at School Rd in the town of Troy at 10:00am
Dane County DeForest Parade - Line up in the DeForest Area High School Parking Lot at 9:45
Iowa County Mineral Point Parade - Line up near Water Tower Park at 9:30
LaFayette County Shullsburg Parade - Line Up on N Judgement St. by the school at 9:45

BRING THE WHOLE FAMILY AND START OUT YOUR INDEPENDENCE DAY CELEBRATION RIGHT!!!

We will have T-shirts to wear and candy and literature to be handed out.

If you have a unique vehicle that you think would look great with some Charity Barry for Congress magnets on the sides, let me know.

Absentee Ballots have already been sent - Join me in this festive way to let the people know whom to vote for on August 9th and November 8th!

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Add your name to support a Trans Bill of Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I joined many of my colleagues to introduce an important measure for the rights of Trans folks.
#
Peter,
This week, I introduced the Trans Bill of Rights in the House of Representatives. It’s a landmark legal framework to protect the rights of transgender and nonbinary people and ensure they aren’t discriminated against or persecuted for their gender identity and expression.
It meant a great deal to me to introduce this framework, as the parent of a trans kid and as co-chair of the Transgender Equality Task Force. This is an urgently needed set of protections, as Republicans and an extremist Supreme Court attack and roll back the fundamental rights of trans people across our country. Right-wing media and GOP-led state legislatures continue to target our trans community with hateful, bigoted, and transphobic attacks.
[**Will you stand with me today in support of trans rights? Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Trans Bill of Rights, so we can build support for this critical civil rights framework.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220701-1388&t=1&akid=1388%2E420207%2E4h7t-G)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220701-1388&t=2&akid=1388%2E420207%2E4h7t-G)**
My Democratic colleagues and I know that trans people, and trans people of color in particular, face some of the greatest barriers in access to opportunity, services and resources, and face some of the worst discrimination. And we know that the GOP will only continue to ramp up attacks on the trans community. We know we need to pass federal protections for trans and nonbinary folks urgently.
The Trans Bill of Rights would call on the federal government to:
* Ensure that transgender and nonbinary people have equal access to services and public accommodations by making the Civil Rights Act of 1964 and federal education laws inclusive.

* Recognize the right to bodily autonomy and ethical healthcare by expanding access to gender-affirming medical care and other healthcare services for trans and nonbinary people.

* Promote the safety of trans and nonbinary people by investing in community services to prevent violence against trans and nonbinary people and expand services for survivors.

* And much more.

The Trans Bill of Rights says clearly to the trans community that we see you and we will stand with you to ensure you are protected and given the dignity and respect that every person should have.
[**Peter, please stand with us and show your support for the Trans Bill of Rights by adding your name today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220701-1388&t=3&akid=1388%2E420207%2E4h7t-G)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220701-1388&t=4&akid=1388%2E420207%2E4h7t-G)**
Thank you for showing your support for such an important and sweeping framework for the trans community.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220701-1388-footer&t=5&refcode2=1388_420207_4h7t-G&akid=1388%2E420207%2E4h7t-G)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=1388%2E420207%2E4h7t-G)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1388%2E420207%2E4h7t-G)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Demings, Val
subject: I'm sick & tired of politicians like Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Rubio’s grotesque record speaks for itself
| | |
---
**Friend, Marco Rubio just called a bill confirming a woman's right to choose _"barbaric" –_ and he cheered on the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47286540/353730057/232639193?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3631-fr-nd&sustainers=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmQxNTAzNi03NGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A5eKCA3bcx8Mfvm1Xshg0KsY1uLhgauho7KAbaHDihI=&emci=fe04ce1d-39f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=12d15036-74f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
Banning abortions for women and girls who have suffered sexual abuse, sex trafficking, rape, incest and more? _That’s_ barbaric.

Undoing nearly 50 years of precedent and forcing our country back to when women didn’t have autonomy over their own bodies and health care decisions?_T_ _hat’s_ barbaric.
Friend, I am sick and tired of politicians like Marco Rubio telling women what to do with their bodies while turning a blind eye to the gun violence, lack of affordable health care and so much more, affecting the lives of millions of Americans across this country.
**To me, Rubio’s grotesque record speaks for itself (and I know _exactly_ what grade I would give him) – but I want to hear what supporters like you think about Rubio’s record on reproductive rights. So please, let me know: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47286541/353730058/232639193?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3631-fr-nd&sustainers=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmQxNTAzNi03NGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A5eKCA3bcx8Mfvm1Xshg0KsY1uLhgauho7KAbaHDihI=&emci=fe04ce1d-39f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=12d15036-74f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
Thank you,

Val Demings

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. clean_body: Rubio’s grotesque record speaks for itself | | | Friend, Marco Rubio just called a bill confirming a woman's right to choose "barbaric" – and he cheered on the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. Banning abortions for women and girls who have suffered sexual abuse, sex trafficking, rape, incest and more? That’s barbaric. Undoing nearly 50 years of precedent and forcing our country back to when women didn’t have autonomy over their own bodies and health care decisions?T hat’s barbaric. Friend, I am sick and tired of politicians like Marco Rubio telling women what to do with their bodies while turning a blind eye to the gun violence, lack of affordable health care and so much more, affecting the lives of millions of Americans across this country. To me, Rubio’s grotesque record speaks for itself (and I know exactly what grade I would give him) – but I want to hear what supporters like you think about Rubio’s record on reproductive rights. So please, let me know: Thank you, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. clean_body: Peter, Please accept our heartfelt gratitude for your support and involvement. We're proud to be on this team with you and to build the organization to hold Ann Wagner accountable for failing her constituents since she was elected nearly one decade ago. (For up-to-the-minute info on Wagner's lack of accountability with the voters, check out our .) The people have had enough of this absent, partisan, and self-serving leadership. And you are a big part of the reason why we have a chance this year to do something about it, get rid of Ann Wagner once and for all, and replace her with a true public servant: Trish Gunby. Thank you for being such a crucial part of it. Sincerely, -Trish Gunby for Congress Team = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: American Defense News
subject: The might and drama
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5i7819cm7oj66ijg2vp51jsnjogblgebhc3iaf8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq69phickr62ob2e9ie6dtgcdpj6pj2ego75cj5msqr9d3n6pir2t376dhm5c70cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6pj32tpjcorreoj66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clhmeo36c3h64oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3tebes5t07qviphqpa2sugodgbdmo9khklqieig_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6co72c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zro8mm234mql0sq83vkl68n7v0s123qfeik9alko_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6co72c9h2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi2opnrssu93i6e3nb8kt49kesealg2n7kk15ck0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6co72c9h2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs3r84em8cvr3sn9opm05gdrpmuqikbs7s0khiho_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6co72c9h2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Hung Cao
subject: You’re an integral part of this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
I wanted to send you a quick note to personally thank you for all of your hard
work during our end of quarter push.

Peter,

I wanted to send you a quick note to personally thank you for all of your hard
work during our end of quarter push.

I know times are extremely tough on everyone right now, and you’re giving
whatever you can when others simply can't. And I hope you know, Peter, that the
actions and generous donations you make today are helping set our great nation
up for success for generations to come.

And for that my team, my family, myself, and this country are eternally
grateful to you.

Truly none of this would be possible without you, Peter.

So again, thank you.

Now, let’s keep pushing ahead and win this November.

In Liberty,

CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)

Former Navy Special Operations

Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10)

Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply
endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Cao for Congress

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: I showed up at a Pro-Choice rally - here’s how it went
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-wn?refcode=220701-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-wn?refcode=220701-email]Can you believe it Peter? We’re already through two fundraising quarters of the election cycle! And with your help, I once again was able to pass the fundraising goal we set and end the quarter on a high note.
Between winning a primary election and gaining national recognition, our awesome team has been working non-stop to get us the edge we need to win in November. But thanks to you, things run a bit more smoothly. Thank you for being a part of this movement and this team.
The end of this quarter was also an extremely difficult time. The US Supreme Court overturned 50 years of precedent when they reversed the ruling of Roe v Wade just one week ago. I spoke to a crowd of North Carolinians in Cary who were demonstrating and calling for the restoration of their rights. Check it out below:
https://www.tiktok.com/@wileynickel/video/7114039457052937514?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7114742144472073774 [https://www.tiktok.com/@wileynickel/video/7114039457052937514?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7114742144472073774]
We must come together, fight back and help American women regain their bodily autonomy. One way to do that is defeating candidates like Bo Hines in November.
Thanks for your help, and thanks for sticking by me.
– Wiley
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-wn?refcode=220701-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-wn?refcode=220701-email]

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Banned from his own daughter’s graduation
body:
Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgen
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh609qfgrpjtjstk4oenjrvv476ce5mappkhobdg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uer32s9nc4p64tb1e5p69pbiccor8p3mmpi6fcdgmdp3bc34m1qr8o37cjie8tpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shmcoonecr461p32phlc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cdjm0pb5chgm49fg)
| | | Friend,
Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgender propaganda down our throats. Then, they began holding secret “equality clubs” and convinced children that they might be bisexual or transgender without telling their parents. Now, they’re doing everything in their power to completely silence and censor anyone who fights back. **In fact, they’re even BANNING parents from attending their own children’s graduation ceremonies if they disagree with the woke curriculum being taught.** I’m happy to announce that we’re taking legal action to fight back, but we need your help urgently. **[Which is why I’m asking for an emergency donation of $35 or more today to help the Center for American Liberty protect free speech and fight back against the venomous cancel culture that has infiltrated our schools.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2k7cs87p8o9f64on6veincosb50l4vk3qsuh5fo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6apb4c5h2bs)** Shawn McBreairty is the father of a high school senior in Bangor, Maine who was told that he was not allowed to attend his daughter’s graduation ceremony. Why? Because Shawn had the audacity to question the public school’s curriculum and speak out against radical school board members. You see, Shawn filed a series of public record requests (FOAA) and complaints about the conduct of school personnel.** ****However, instead of investigating the issues that Shawn was pointing out, the school district filed a lawsuit against Shawn, seeking to silence him and prevent him from ever filing FOAA requests ever again.** And on top of that, the school district informed him that he was not allowed to attend any of his daughter’s graduation events. But Shawn hasn’t given up – in fact, he’s now working with my team to take the fight to the next level. We’ve filed an Anti-SLAPP motion to dismiss the ridiculous lawsuit against Shawn—because Shawn’s speech is CLEARLY protected by the First Amendment. We’re fighting hard, but we can’t do it without you. **[Will you join the fight for to protect the rights of parents like Shawn today with a gift of $35 or more?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr48om4btahivhdfkk4uag08o3a0849585cr0p48_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6apb4c5h2bs)** Let me take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm the Founder of the Center for American Liberty and I've dedicated my career to preserving Constitutional liberties like the freedom of speech which are constantly under attack by the radical left. The Constitution clearly protects your ability to criticize public officials and government employees. It doesn’t matter if it’s the President of the United States or a school board member in your community – no one is above criticism. You and I cannot allow school districts like the Herman School Department in Bangor, Maine, to get away with censoring parents. **Enough is enough.** It’s time for all of us to stand with parents like Shawn and let these radical schools know that they will no longer be allowed to silence us or corrupt our kids. There’s no time to waste. [**So please, send your urgent gift of $35 or more today and help us defeat this ridiculous lawsuit with our Anti-SLAPP motion today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1g1k0p6n62slligdk3ke8n7fk2e6dquu9icn6i8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6apb4c5h2bs) Thank you in advance for your support. Onward to victory,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
|
---
| | P.S. One of the FOAA requests that Shawn filed asked specifically about controversial training that a teacher provided to various schools in the area – that request was denied. We can’t allow schools to hide their activities from parents! **[Join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or more right now!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjv1ahmqpvo5uc7f5if57n5tqp1gp8ais94gtbm0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6apb4c5h2bs) **
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z80gvrlqv7c7l3ifgvk7ueg4ro7jmde22occq000_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg6apb4c5h2bs)

---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Cuellar is anti-abortion, but Pelosi still supported him
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While Speaker Nancy Pelosi campaigned for conservative anti-abortion
Democrat Henry Cuellar in the TX-28 primary for the House, Justice
Democrats fought in support of Jessica Cisneros — a progressive,
pro-choice woman of color.

Even after the Supreme Court leaked their opinion overturning Roe v. Wade,
corporate Democrats stood with Cuellar. Cuellar is so extreme on abortion,
he accepted an award from a right-wing anti-abortion group called March
for Life. And now after the Court’s Roe decision, the Democratic
establishment isn’t taking the bold action we need in order to protect
abortion access in America.

It’s leaders like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, the first candidate we helped
elect to Congress, who are speaking out for bold, critical action to
ensure people can get abortion care. At Justice Democrats, we know we
can’t just elect Democrats, we have to elect BETTER Democrats.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110965?refcode=em20220701-24096&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=24096%2E1203867%2EiDDM4F ]Peter,
your donation right now will help ensure
we re-elect our JD advocates in Congress who are facing primaries from
corporate Democrats: Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman and Rashida Tlaib. Can you
chip in today to support our work to protect the Squad?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110965?refcode=em20220701-24096&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=24096%2E1203867%2EiDDM4F ]Contribute

Republican mega-donors and corporate Super PACs have spent more money
against Justice Democrats this cycle than ever before — because
corporations and the donor class want to protect the status quo. Justice
Democrats is fighting to upend the status quo — to protect abortion
access, pass Medicare for All, secure a Green New Deal, and so much more.

The Democratic Party is spending resources to STOP our candidates. They
worked hard to protect anti-abortion Cuellar instead of supporting
Jessica, the candidate who supported abortion rights and union organizing.
It’s time for the Democratic Party to support a new generation of leaders,
not incumbents aligned with pro-life extremist groups and fossil fuel
companies. It’s backward.

Will you help us re-elect Justice Democrats — the leaders that will fight
for the people, not billionaire right-wing donors?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110965?refcode=em20220701-24096&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=24096%2E1203867%2EiDDM4F ]We need you to step up today,
Peter. Corporate Democrats have
been massively out-spending us this year and we need your grassroots
support to re-elect the Squad. Can you make a contribution right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110965?refcode=em20220701-24096&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=24096%2E1203867%2EiDDM4F ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=24096%2E1203867%2EiDDM4F ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=24096%2E1203867%2EiDDM4F ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220701-24096-footer&t=1027&refcode2=24096_1203867_iDDM4F&akid=24096%2E1203867%2EiDDM4F

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=24096%2E1203867%2EiDDM4F

name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI -- Police Source: Woman Who Framed Eric Greitens Guilty of Perjury, Bribed With Cash Payment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI -- Police Source: Woman Who Framed Eric Greitens Guilty of Perjury, Bribed With Cash Payment
---
|
---
| As [reported by Alicia Powe of T](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mndqVYx67D7Yb1llFDdk6nleXufss_oFTu8-4fyO0a87NaIeKGOERaTavxGAdIdbRLtBZacaMRIBjM_lvSmn12LQ5d2gwMHd_1fo9vPtH07RWRB7d3PUDUqj_W-o8_eaCbq4Jqw7VWcbyFIkoyWFiUG1lmyzeH7QfBEkHbtvOuekfzE89gEt6BSeLDtNURbg4kwUNulSooekCbHIBL4VHnD1DtFexUTb-caL7AQDAn3ufI3LA4M2hf3_4FVERUNdEwl2EfBSrrD1bgVeGyHE0VL-rqWo91gyzTfrK62SHPwpEKHVChq4MFRy16mJJ72AB0-T8oSiTBwphD66zA7oVLevX0Izoy3IMhmLwYzPuJmXdo5wfikbAdaFDzsU58AklcXHMC_HVJzX8mGkNlTb0IhnPLYpwlX&c=4Pomzoq2Gx79e9YUsPZy0lAnP39t3pDzHWO_-znR6ZGMbN0TAOkOhg==&ch=xJf9LSzBK3OArnta4EPvxqIDC7ecnf761ZQEE6P0p4EJKM8G9pTQYg==)[he Gateway Pundit](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mndqVYx67D7Yb1llFDdk6nleXufss_oFTu8-4fyO0a87NaIeKGOERaTavxGAdIdbRLtBZacaMRIBjM_lvSmn12LQ5d2gwMHd_1fo9vPtH07RWRB7d3PUDUqj_W-o8_eaCbq4Jqw7VWcbyFIkoyWFiUG1lmyzeH7QfBEkHbtvOuekfzE89gEt6BSeLDtNURbg4kwUNulSooekCbHIBL4VHnD1DtFexUTb-caL7AQDAn3ufI3LA4M2hf3_4FVERUNdEwl2EfBSrrD1bgVeGyHE0VL-rqWo91gyzTfrK62SHPwpEKHVChq4MFRy16mJJ72AB0-T8oSiTBwphD66zA7oVLevX0Izoy3IMhmLwYzPuJmXdo5wfikbAdaFDzsU58AklcXHMC_HVJzX8mGkNlTb0IhnPLYpwlX&c=4Pomzoq2Gx79e9YUsPZy0lAnP39t3pDzHWO_-znR6ZGMbN0TAOkOhg==&ch=xJf9LSzBK3OArnta4EPvxqIDC7ecnf761ZQEE6P0p4EJKM8G9pTQYg==)...
Newly obtained evidence indicates the woman who made false allegations against former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens was bribed to willfully lie under oath and engaged in extensive perjury in an effort to oust the rising Republican star from office, according to a police source with knowledge of an investigation into the circuit attorney's misconduct.
Katrina "Kitty" Sneed, testified under oath that she secretly met with St. Louis Circuit Attorney Kim Gardner, a [George Soros funded prosecutor](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mndqVYx67D7Yb1llFDdk6nleXufss_oFTu8-4fyO0a87NaIeKGOERaTavxGAdIdKm2HtivwXqSGWRzR4JiD0IZyA8izmm_ohFb4R12E1mIbeEHcp_BFgru2vz4vOA2C5rkGuu4lV3SVX1iw4glaSCLVk9AZ-LDwfUFhRgqKa4nZUuWmHPx4f4_t9_l2zehaLVcUnRnfJwBs5XdEthr3Y1bUsCB2zwhX9ZncNtNT12vygkhATDBgjeNIUjFEWtqpZLGl4fd696CCn1kkGAsfPHac4lkeoH2mmhLaXM13HMdoLZeUM8hvDIQ3xG8Nsb6H8PBBiy5N5omb8ZEG9qtJOareVQqoNQFUiukWk_oZZx0=&c=4Pomzoq2Gx79e9YUsPZy0lAnP39t3pDzHWO_-znR6ZGMbN0TAOkOhg==&ch=xJf9LSzBK3OArnta4EPvxqIDC7ecnf761ZQEE6P0p4EJKM8G9pTQYg==), in a hotel room in January and February of 2018.
Following the secret meeting, Gardner charged Greitens with felony invasion of privacy in February 2018 for allegedly taking nude a photograph of Sneed without her consent and threatening to use the photo for blackmail. Greitens denied the allegations and Gardner never produced any evidence.
Sneed, a 37-year old hairdresser, claimed during the deposition that the meeting with Gardner prompted her to come forward with a series of allegations against the then-Missouri Governor.
When questioned under oath to corroborate the charges, Sneed [admitted](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mndqVYx67D7Yb1llFDdk6nleXufss_oFTu8-4fyO0a87NaIeKGOERaTavxGAdIdaQKkGTrdZmD4ZwkGE_xWt7F5cRuAfVl5lVGGnc709ADA61mRDqq-jrVjqmw0HB02jJHEyIN7mYOzOEX9AnacU_v2l9Ho8VDHCnmBFrkUJx64rDKMzP6ffX_IgY0hMlOXEFOEuVjMgg_981SFKOH6dh5pbt7mpnZl&c=4Pomzoq2Gx79e9YUsPZy0lAnP39t3pDzHWO_-znR6ZGMbN0TAOkOhg==&ch=xJf9LSzBK3OArnta4EPvxqIDC7ecnf761ZQEE6P0p4EJKM8G9pTQYg==) she was reluctant to testify because she might have been remembering her accusations, the heart of the criminal case, "through a dream."
When subsequently deposed, Sneed claimed she had never seen the photograph Greitens allegedly had taken of her and that at the time she also saw no phone or camera to take the photograph.
During Greitens' felony invasion of privacy trial in May 2018, a forensic examiner extracted data from Greitens' cellphone and email account. The examination revealed no photograph of Sneed was ever taken or deleted by Greitens.
Gardner withdrew her indictment of Greitens when the judge ordered that Gardner herself would have to testify in the case.
Now, damning evidence has surfaced allegedly proving Sneed repeatedly perjured herself in her bid to frame the former governor and Navy SEAL.
While leveling baseless charges against Greitens, Sneed repeatedly lied under oath to corroborate her allegations. She claimed no one else had ever taken nude images of her, she claimed that she never had an extramarital affair with anyone other than with Greitens, and she insisted that she "could not recall" details of the prosecution's alleged misconduct. Each of these claims is now being investigated.
Sneed and her ex-husband Phil Sneed regularly engaged in sending graphic sexual images of themselves to their friends and associates, Special Prosecutor Gerard Carmody's investigation into Gardner's prosecutorial misconduct has revealed.
The forensic evaluation of Sneed's devices reveals she and her ex-husband repeatedly sent text messages accompanied by X-rated photographs, a police source with knowledge of the special prosecutor's investigation told The Gateway Pundit. The messages indicate that the images are of Phil and Katrina Sneed engaged in graphic sexual activity.
The officer, who asked that his name be withheld for security reasons, told The Gateway Pundit the special prosecutor uncovered further evidence on Sneed's devices proving she has engaged in other extramarital affairs.
Additionally, evidence is mounting that Sneed conspired with Gardner to conceal prosecutorial misconduct.
In the course of pursuing charges against Greitens, Gardner hired former FBI agent William Tisaby to interview Sneed. In March 2018, Tisaby falsely claimed during a sworn deposition that he did not take notes during his nearly 2-hour interview with Sneed, that he asked Sneed no questions, and that the video he recorded of Sneed during the interview malfunctioned.
Under oath, Katrina Sneed affirmed that she believed Tisaby's videotape malfunctioned, claimed she could not remember whether Tisaby took notes, that she could not remember if she discussed the subject of notes with Kim Gardner, and she supported Tisaby's false assertion that he asked no questions during the interview.
William Tisaby has been charged with seven felonies for perjury and evidence tampering in the Greitens case. Tisaby's trial is slated to begin June 26, while Circuit Attorney Kim Gardner remains under active criminal investigation for her allegedly illegal efforts to oust the Republican Governor.
Special Prosecutor Gerard Carmody's office did not return The Gateway Pundit's repeated requests for comment. Messages left for Katrina Sneed and her attorney Scott Simpson were not returned.
The associates of Phil and Katrina Sneed, who received the graphic sexual images sent by the couple, declined to comment on how frequently the Sneeds sent such images.
Sneed also allegedly profited from her lies against Greitens.
Scott Faughn, a convicted felon, publisher of The Missouri Times, and associate of former Lieutenant Governor Mike Parson, admittedly [delivered](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016mndqVYx67D7Yb1llFDdk6nleXufss_oFTu8-4fyO0a87NaIeKGOERaTavxGAdIdUaA6uaEd_4fmEIb8xOdEiyL9LBDXZ6v2Il5SJ9WTsB8yRDcHP6Xf-_wNN9n64uaeXU3UvbBorNITexiO8hbWeT5HhL2VLdjsHwT_FluMkP2uh8Xe1HD5HEF5v4p9EpQCTAdc860uPGKR7MmuaiCIpg==&c=4Pomzoq2Gx79e9YUsPZy0lAnP39t3pDzHWO_-znR6ZGMbN0TAOkOhg==&ch=xJf9LSzBK3OArnta4EPvxqIDC7ecnf761ZQEE6P0p4EJKM8G9pTQYg==) $120,000 in cash to Philip Sneed's attorney, Albert Watkins, a cash delivery Watkins corroborated in testimony before the Missouri House Committee.
A portion of the $120,000 was used to benefit Katrina Sneed, sources with knowledge of Carmody's investigation, who are not authorized to publicly discuss the case, told the Gateway Pundit.
In October 2018, Watkins plead guilty to violating court orders in the Greitens case.
After a 20-month investigation, the Missouri Ethics Commission in Feb. 2020 "found no evidence of any wrongdoing by Eric Greitens" and the governor who was forced to resign amid unsubstantiated allegations was fully exonerated.
"It feels great now that the truth has come out," he told The Gateway Pundit. " I'm glad to have been exonerated. The future is very bright and I'm very optimistic and really hopeful.
"One of the things that you learn going through SEAL team training is that great hardship can actually produce great strength. And while this was painful, it certainly led to a lot of wisdom. While there was a lot of suffering it also led to a lot of strength. I am incredibly thankful for the prayers and support of so many people who stood with me through all of this."
After Greitens gained national prominence in law enforcement circles for "defeating Antifa," Gardner, whose campaign received 70 percent of its funding from progressive billionaire George Soros, began targeting Greitens.
"It's clear that a Soros prosecutor and establishment insiders were desperate to overturn the 2016 election and this is just one more alleged example of the kind of perjury, evidence tampering and lies that they engaged in. We knew that national liberals and insiders were coming after us," he said. "Now it's good that the whole world is beginning to see the truth.
"The best thing that I can do and the best thing that conservatives and outsiders can do is to continue to fight, continue to serve, continue to make a difference. Soros, prosecutors like Kim Gardner who he funds, and the establishment - they will be relentless and continue to attack us. No matter the damage that they do - no matter the difficulties that they put in front of us - we have to find ways to continue to fight."
As violence marked by arson, looting, murder, and the shooting of multiple police officers has overtaken Missouri following the death of George Floyd, interest in Greitens' story has peaked and lawmakers across the country have reached out to him for guidance on how to restore order in the districts.
In 2017, after Jason Stockley, a white police officer, was found innocent in the death of Anthony Lamar Smith, an African American man, Antifa radicals and anti-police activists descended on Missouri from around the country. Greitens successfully kept the peace through strong support for law enforcement and the facilitation of peaceful protests.
Conversely, Mike Parson, the Lieutenant Governor who replaced Greitens, has delegated major public safety decisions and taken a hands-off approach to violence and arson.
As a result, rioters have burned down dozens of businesses in Missouri, four St. Louis Police officers were shot, and a retired St. Louis Police Officer protecting a business was killed.

Special Prosecutor Gerard Carmody's office did not return The Gateway Pundit's repeated requests for comment. Messages left for Katrina Sneed and her attorney Scott Simpson were not returned. The associates of Phil and Katrina Sneed, who received the graphic sexual images sent by the couple, declined to comment on how frequently the Sneeds sent such images. Sneed also allegedly profited from her lies against Greitens. Scott Faughn, a convicted felon, publisher of The Missouri Times, and associate of former Lieutenant Governor Mike Parson, admittedly == $120,000 in cash to Philip Sneed's attorney, Albert Watkins, a cash delivery Watkins corroborated in testimony before the Missouri House Committee. A portion of the $120,000 was used to benefit Katrina Sneed, sources with knowledge of Carmody's investigation, who are not authorized to publicly discuss the case, told the Gateway Pundit. In October 2018, Watkins plead guilty to violating court orders in the Greitens case. After a 20-month investigation, the Missouri Ethics Commission in Feb. 2020 "found no evidence of any wrongdoing by Eric Greitens" and the governor who was forced to resign amid unsubstantiated allegations was fully exonerated. "It feels great now that the truth has come out," he told The Gateway Pundit. " I'm glad to have been exonerated. The future is very bright and I'm very optimistic and really hopeful. "One of the things that you learn going through SEAL team training is that great hardship can actually produce great strength. And while this was painful, it certainly led to a lot of wisdom. While there was a lot of suffering it also led to a lot of strength. I am incredibly thankful for the prayers and support of so many people who stood with me through all of this." After Greitens gained national prominence in law enforcement circles for "defeating Antifa," Gardner, whose campaign received 70 percent of its funding from progressive billionaire George Soros, began targeting Greitens. "It's clear that a Soros prosecutor and establishment insiders were desperate to overturn the 2016 election and this is just one more alleged example of the kind of perjury, evidence tampering and lies that they engaged in. We knew that national liberals and insiders were coming after us," he said. "Now it's good that the whole world is beginning to see the truth. "The best thing that I can do and the best thing that conservatives and outsiders can do is to continue to fight, continue to serve, continue to make a difference. Soros, prosecutors like Kim Gardner who he funds, and the establishment - they will be relentless and continue to attack us. No matter the damage that they do - no matter the difficulties that they put in front of us - we have to find ways to continue to fight." As violence marked by arson, looting, murder, and the shooting of multiple police officers has overtaken Missouri following the death of George Floyd, interest in Greitens' story has peaked and lawmakers across the country have reached out to him for guidance on how to restore order in the districts. In 2017, after Jason Stockley, a white police officer, was found innocent in the death of Anthony Lamar Smith, an African American man, Antifa radicals and anti-police activists descended on Missouri from around the country. Greitens successfully kept the peace through strong support for law enforcement and the facilitation of peaceful protests. Conversely, Mike Parson, the Lieutenant Governor who replaced Greitens, has delegated major public safety decisions and taken a hands-off approach to violence and arson. As a result, rioters have burned down dozens of businesses in Missouri, four St. Louis Police officers were shot, and a retired St. Louis Police Officer protecting a business was killed. | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:team@ericgreitens.com powered by

| I’m writing today to say **thank you**.

Because grassroots supporters like you stepped up when we needed it most, we were able to surpass our quarterly fundraising goal and take full advantage of our donor match. This means that we’re headed into the height of the campaign well-equipped with the resources to reach out to every voter across our new district.

What’s more, because we hit our goal, I can spend less time in the coming weeks dialing for dollars and more time connecting with folks across our new district and hearing what issues matter most to them.

But we can’t slow down now. With this district rated a _**“TOSS-UP”**_ by national political experts, you can bet Republicans will be pouring serious cash into keeping this seat red in the November midterms. It’s a long road ahead, and I’m so thankful to have this team by my side.

Gratefully,
Hillary
---
| | _Hillary Scholten is a mom, lawyer, and lifelong West Michigander running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn Third Congressional District. A no-nonsense problem-solver, Hillary is exactly the kind of leader we need to get our country back on track. Help flip this TOSS-UP district with a contribution today._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: A Caucus Added, a Caucus Trained, and the South Carolina Primary
body:
Update from Freedom Caucuses Across the Country | | | |
---
| | | Everyone,

We’ve been busy at the State Freedom Caucus Network so we wanted to highlight a few things that recently happened:
---
|
## **SOUTH DAKOTA**
---
| South Dakota became the 6th freedom caucus to join our network! This past weekend, we traveled to Watertown, SD, to help celebrate the launch. We had over 150 supporters in attendance (standing room only). Even the RINO lieutenant governor crashed our event and was asked to leave after he started an argument with our supporters.

[Here’s](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=c412319f38&e=64ecec6d03) what South Dakota Freedom Caucus Vice-Chairman and State Rep. Tony Randolph had to say:

“ _During an election, there is not a single Republican in the state who will talk against the Republican party principles_,” Randolph explained. “ _The difference between them and us, is that this is part of who we are and what we stand for. What we talk about during a campaign is the same things we talk about after being elected.”_

Check out the [video](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=2793faf1df&e=64ecec6d03) that the House Freedom Caucus put together to help celebrate the event:

[](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=a1ea0648f9&e=64ecec6d03)

We are so proud to stand with South Dakota Freedom Caucus chairman Aaron Aylward and his colleagues as they fight for limited government and freedom in the Mount Rushmore State.

Onward!
---
|
## **MISSISSIPPI**
---
| Our Mississippi Freedom Caucus members were fortuitously in Washington, DC for training when the _Dobbs_ decision was handed down by the Supreme Court (Dobbs is Mississippi’s former state health officer, Thomas Dobbs). Breitbart [quoted](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=b69eeebb5e&e=64ecec6d03) MSFC member Rep. Dan Eubanks, a co- sponsor of the bill to outlaw abortion in the state, saying, “I can’t put into words what I’m feeling right now, 64 million lives later. A whole lot of those I think wouldn’t have suffered the fate that they suffered had this been overturned sooner.”

LifeSiteNews.com [captured](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f8c77932c0&e=64ecec6d03) Eubanks and MSFC Chairman Dana Criswell on video in front of the Supreme Court on the day of the decision. Check it out:

[](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=e223b5380f&e=64ecec6d03)
---
|
## **SOUTH CAROLINA**
---
| In the state legislature, a few RINO Republican incumbents recently lost their primaries to conservatives who have pledged to join the South Carolina Freedom Caucus. Not surprisingly, that has caused some sour grapes. From [a local newspaper](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=68fb071984&e=64ecec6d03):

“ _It seems to me that the Freedom Caucus launched, and their sole mission was to actually take out incumbents and work against incumbents_,” said Rep. Westley Cox, a Piedmont Republican who lost his primary to a more conservative challenger. (Cox got an anemic 55% on the SC Club for Growth’s 2021 scorecard)

South Carolina Freedom Caucus Vice-Chairman RJ May, who helped some of these conservatives win their races, made no apologies. From[ the same newspaper](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f5c18a813e&e=64ecec6d03):

_“For the past 25 years, establishment Republican leadership has been an abject failure_ ,” May said. “ _They’ve failed to deliver a conservative government. And there are a number of liberty- minded legislators who are sick and tired of politics as usual and the way things have been run._ ”

Needless to say, the South Carolina Freedom Caucus is firing on all cylinders right now. They recently voted as a bloc to reject several earmarks in the state budget. These earmarks would spend tax dollars on various wasteful projects like a horse race, a wine and food festival, and a liberal committee to investigate environmental justice.

The Network is going to continue to help these state freedom caucuses fight and win. Please donate to help our effort:
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=9d291c0a74&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=0bad2c3c8c&e=64ecec6d03)
---
| | |
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=47310272b1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=47310272b1).

_“Congratulations to Joe O’Dea... I can’t wait to welcome him to the U.S. Senate.”_
— Rick Scott, National Republican Senate Committee Chairman Michael’s opponent Joe O’Dea bought his way onto the primary ballot and now has the full force of the National GOP behind his campaign. Rick Scott recently praised his victory because O’Dea will be a rubber stamp for his agenda to raise taxes on seniors and low-income workers. O’Dea suggested cutting Medicare and Social Security and supports restricting reproductive rights. He doesn’t reflect our state’s values, and he’s a threat to all that Michael has secured for Colorado’s families. Michael banned surprise emergency medical bills, passed legislation to repair our roads and bridges while creating new jobs nationwide, and kept nearly four million children out of poverty by expanding the Child Tax Credit. clean_body: Michael’s opponent wants to cut these critical programs. | = “Congratulations to Joe O’Dea... I can’t wait to welcome him to the U.S. Senate.” — Rick Scott, National Republican Senate Committee Chairman Michael’s opponent Joe O’Dea bought his way onto the primary ballot and now has the full force of the National GOP behind his campaign. Rick Scott recently praised his victory because O’Dea will be a rubber stamp for his agenda to raise taxes on seniors and low-income workers. O’Dea suggested cutting Medicare and Social Security and supports restricting reproductive rights. He doesn’t reflect our state’s values, and he’s a threat to all that Michael has secured for Colorado’s families. Michael banned surprise emergency medical bills, passed legislation to repair our roads and bridges while creating new jobs nationwide, and kept nearly four million children out of poverty by expanding the Child Tax Credit. His fight was empowered by Colorado’s families and this campaign is fueled by working folks — like you. We don’t take a penny from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists so, if you can, pitch in $10 today to defend Michael’s seat and keep Colorado blue. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Banned from his own daughter’s graduation
body:
Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgen
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbus02hbii6ch79rnlk6aptptnmlmmqg7qj4paco_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg66pb2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tr4eorj1dhkc2rm8chnmlhm4sj5e3i63dphmpir4c9jeqo66t3nmdqrbcpieorrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3cphhespm6o3i69j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | Friend,
Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgender propaganda down our throats. Then, they began holding secret “equality clubs” and convinced children that they might be bisexual or transgender without telling their parents. Now, they’re doing everything in their power to completely silence and censor anyone who fights back. **In fact, they’re even BANNING parents from attending their own children’s graduation ceremonies if they disagree with the woke curriculum being taught.** I’m happy to announce that we’re taking legal action to fight back, but we need your help urgently. **[Which is why I’m asking for an emergency donation of $35 or more today to help the Center for American Liberty protect free speech and fight back against the venomous cancel culture that has infiltrated our schools.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zolsq02br4v580f7tkm85ml1ik2d50har3j74fg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg66pb2cdh2bs)** Shawn McBreairty is the father of a high school senior in Bangor, Maine who was told that he was not allowed to attend his daughter’s graduation ceremony. Why? Because Shawn had the audacity to question the public school’s curriculum and speak out against radical school board members. You see, Shawn filed a series of public record requests (FOAA) and complaints about the conduct of school personnel.** ****However, instead of investigating the issues that Shawn was pointing out, the school district filed a lawsuit against Shawn, seeking to silence him and prevent him from ever filing FOAA requests ever again.** And on top of that, the school district informed him that he was not allowed to attend any of his daughter’s graduation events. But Shawn hasn’t given up – in fact, he’s now working with my team to take the fight to the next level. We’ve filed an Anti-SLAPP motion to dismiss the ridiculous lawsuit against Shawn—because Shawn’s speech is CLEARLY protected by the First Amendment. We’re fighting hard, but we can’t do it without you. **[Will you join the fight for to protect the rights of parents like Shawn today with a gift of $35 or more?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zijgfubb3ci3au1vens3813o0ennpal3oli2i9vo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg66pb2cdh2bs)** Let me take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm the Founder of the Center for American Liberty and I've dedicated my career to preserving Constitutional liberties like the freedom of speech which are constantly under attack by the radical left. The Constitution clearly protects your ability to criticize public officials and government employees. It doesn’t matter if it’s the President of the United States or a school board member in your community – no one is above criticism. You and I cannot allow school districts like the Herman School Department in Bangor, Maine, to get away with censoring parents. **Enough is enough.** It’s time for all of us to stand with parents like Shawn and let these radical schools know that they will no longer be allowed to silence us or corrupt our kids. There’s no time to waste. [**So please, send your urgent gift of $35 or more today and help us defeat this ridiculous lawsuit with our Anti-SLAPP motion today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr20e5g8gore1ght4kmgim24hji8rmvti5bevd30_rp22sh2s8i66pb3ctg66pb2cdh2bs) Thank you in advance for your support. Onward to victory,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---

clean_body: Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgen | | | Friend, Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgender propaganda down our throats. Then, they began holding secret “equality clubs” and convinced children that they might be bisexual or transgender without telling their parents. Now, they’re doing everything in their power to completely silence and censor anyone who fights back. In fact, they’re even BANNING parents from attending their own children’s graduation ceremonies if they disagree with the woke curriculum being taught. I’m happy to announce that we’re taking legal action to fight back, but we need your help urgently. Shawn McBreairty is the father of a high school senior in Bangor, Maine who was told that he was not allowed to attend his daughter’s graduation ceremony. Why? Because Shawn had the audacity to question the public school’s curriculum and speak out against radical school board members. You see, Shawn filed a series of public record requests (FOAA) and complaints about the conduct of school personnel. However, instead of investigating the issues that Shawn was pointing out, the school district filed a lawsuit against Shawn, seeking to silence him and prevent him from ever filing FOAA requests ever again. And on top of that, the school district informed him that he was not allowed to attend any of his daughter’s graduation events. But Shawn hasn’t given up – in fact, he’s now working with my team to take the fight to the next level. We’ve filed an Anti-SLAPP motion to dismiss the ridiculous lawsuit against Shawn—because Shawn’s speech is CLEARLY protected by the First Amendment. We’re fighting hard, but we can’t do it without you. Let me take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm the Founder of the Center for American Liberty and I've dedicated my career to preserving Constitutional liberties like the freedom of speech which are constantly under attack by the radical left. The Constitution clearly protects your ability to criticize public officials and government employees. It doesn’t matter if it’s the President of the United States or a school board member in your community – no one is above criticism. You and I cannot allow school districts like the Herman School Department in Bangor, Maine, to get away with censoring parents. Enough is enough. It’s time for all of us to stand with parents like Shawn and let these radical schools know that they will no longer be allowed to silence us or corrupt our kids. There’s no time to waste. Thank you in advance for your support. Onward to victory, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon | | | P.S. One of the FOAA requests that Shawn filed asked specifically about controversial training that a teacher provided to various schools in the area – that request was denied. | I want to say thank you, Peter. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you recognizing the urgency of this moment, we were able to surpass our quarterly fundraising goal.

Thanks to you, in the coming months, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time working on the issues that matter to families across the greater Lehigh Valley and the United States, like good jobs, affordable health care, and strong infrastructure.

But we can’t stop now. Republicans have already booked millions in ad spots to target me in an effort to flip my seat and replace me with a reliable vote for their extremist agenda in Congress. The fight will only get tougher from here, so we must keep up our grassroots momentum to defend this toss-up seat and keep the House blue in November.

I look forward to continuing to make change with you Peter.

Thank you,
Susan

clean_body: GO! GO! GO! - NO TIME TO WASTE | Friends, It’s the beginning of a new month, and we must make up for lost ground from June. | Ohio deserves a Senator who puts the people first over Left-Wing special interest groups! As your next Senator, I will do just that! Ohio has tried electing career politicians. It just doesn’t work. As a Veteran, Author, Commentator, and successful Businessman, I’ve spent my career solving problems and getting things done, not sitting in committee meetings and kicking it back with Swamp lobbyists. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work, but first, I need your help. My opponent, Tim Ryan, has spent his career in Washington DC while overseeing the demise of his Congressional District. I am the America-First Conservative who can put Ohio back on the right track. I cannot wait to start this month with all of you by my side! Happy days are ahead, but we’ll need your help! God Bless, \- JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Vance Victory, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and comprised of JD Vance for Senate Inc., Working for Ohio and Ohio Republican Party. body:
| | | Team, A huge thank you everyone who contributed over the past two days to our [Get-Out-The-Vote Fund](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wibNoIUvZEm1lbrPl8E8BqNKUZ4Gmumaj5nR8E0JKN66Ae7H6tuy8NdKBtnT7Pc0Oc4dRwWrTqyg23CX-CPmtyICRjXrfmqFxQEv9Rora8B9sFOfIf8YRnsI-aVlMZQPKxwA5EyqiNhNk4lkT5igheUu-cGriZaKAvyxQ6injdv66IR_Pa5D4u7J9dRm0AENAPTt_pJN4-DEisPJLTDmJMtW5s5fMwmI-0mqxYeEXITROhuQUsbr-4gAZJQ-RHg1lcPIcykFdFqrTBXKkRAGr-v-bRFf4SxotsPfuN3xOZk9fs6UlZtWDs0WEByMQfD3Y/3nd/Z7ON-6AaQNuTNg-HXqB76A/h0/yEf1H45LPgH-RjYj9PRn0wZX4PqjOPPKrPkL4iGLNPE). While it's not full yet, we have until Early Voting starts on July 7th to hit the goal in time. We're doing everything we can to reach as many people as we can with Mckayla's message that it's time for some damn change. [**We need your help to do it! Sign up here to volunteer.**](go.mckaylawilkes.com/volunteer?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-almost-halfway-there-3&email_referrer=email_1593699&email_subject=upcoming-volunteer-opportunities) Here are some of the biggest upcoming ways to help: \- Pollworking: during early voting and on Election Day, speak to voters at the polls! This is the final chance to reach everyone before they vote. \- Canvassing: in-person conversations are the most effective form of persuasion. Come by the office, get campaign materials, get trained, and start knocking! \- Phonebanking: we have virtual phonebanks for those who can't make it out to talk to voters in-person, including every day at 6pm starting July 5th until Election Day. Sign-up for a shift! \- Drive voters to the polls! We'll be offering people who don't have transportation a ride on Election Day. Help make sure everyone has a chance to vote. \- Live in the area and have a spare room? We're looking for supporter housing for volunteers coming in from out of state. \- March with Mckayla in the Shady Side Independence Day Parade on July 4th at 10am!
[**You can sign up for any and all of the above at this link.**](go.mckaylawilkes.com/volunteer?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-almost-halfway-there-3&email_referrer=email_1593699&email_subject=upcoming-volunteer-opportunities) Thank you for all of your support – this is a people-powered movement and we couldn't do it without you. In solidarity, Team Mckayla | [DONATE NOW
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wibNoIUvZEm1lbrPl8E8BqNKUZ4Gmumaj5nR8E0JKN681lFuDrXukV49pW1mLwSZst63j2p7ZxtePdfkrNneReY5oskmtIxSLAlcgSGlC4uR-SVYtfhPzf92yJH-s1aRpxHpWoILEDKVj0GPxeXA6VAehG_EhjulFtKrXj-Yp_GQfZtFfK9F2qVLoVtsH7s4q7QVIF7oRcg-XPZ6HaPL4d10ebtmaRzNplzpSTE5q8JF16mZGOO1iKgIbGszygLnouTC4ePclRn7HKeAgpBhi5wAKofQqHpmaadN7b6NdTNoTKEPvggyAXZV68NhmM7zM/3nd/Z7ON-6AaQNuTNg-HXqB76A/h1/5G4fDjZu8D4swX-vj0W69FSXM8DCr11i-i3tfHXCewk)

clean_body: | | | Team, A huge thank you everyone who contributed over the past two days to our . While it's not full yet, we have until Early Voting starts on July 7th to hit the goal in time. We're doing everything we can to reach as many people as we can with Mckayla's message that it's time for some damn change. go.mckaylawilkes.com/volunteer?linkid=1&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-almost-halfway-there-3&emailreferrer=email1593699&emailsubject=upcoming-volunteer-opportunities Here are some of the biggest upcoming ways to help: \- Pollworking: during early voting and on Election Day, speak to voters at the polls! This is the final chance to reach everyone before they vote. \- Canvassing: in-person conversations are the most effective form of persuasion. Come by the office, get campaign materials, get trained, and start knocking! \- Phonebanking: we have virtual phonebanks for those who can't make it out to talk to voters in-person, including every day at 6pm starting July 5th until Election Day. Sign-up for a shift! \- Drive voters to the polls! We'll be offering people who don't have transportation a ride on Election Day. Help make sure everyone has a chance to vote. \- Live in the area and have a spare room? We're looking for supporter housing for volunteers coming in from out of state. \- March with Mckayla in the Shady Side Independence Day Parade on July 4th at 10am! go.mckaylawilkes.com/volunteer?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-almost-halfway-there-3&emailreferrer=email1593699&emailsubject=upcoming-volunteer-opportunities Thank you for all of your support – this is a people-powered movement and we couldn't do it without you. In solidarity, Team Mckayla | PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE mckaylawilkes.com | "Privacy Policy" Mckayla 2022 P.O. Box 670 Riverdale, MD 20738 | | Sent via . body:
| | | **M****eku**(Hello)******🌻** On the heels of the traumatic overturning of Roe vs. Wade, we learned yesterday that the U.S. Supreme Court has stripped the EPA’s authority to limit carbon pollution from power plants, drastically altering our ability to fight climate change. As usual, those hit hardest will be the most vulnerable among us: low-income Black & Brown communities. Meanwhile, the bullies at MVP are rearing their heads again, and have requested yet another extension to construct their unwanted, doomed pipeline. While we are grieving, we pray that you find hope in your breath, in gratitude, and in the collective power of our _small, persistent actions._ Let's stay rising. **_Get involved!_**
