For decades, people of color have been excluded and alienated by the redistricting process. The Republican drawn maps in Louisiana continue this trend -- packing and cracking voters of color in districts to marginalize their political influence.

At All On The Line, we want fair and representative maps. Maps that do not value one political party over the other. Maps that do not isolate and marginalize specific communities. Maps that will lead to competitive elections. The Republican drawn maps in Louisiana do none of these things.

[**We need your continued support -- make a donation to support our fight against gerrymandered maps. What has happened in Louisiana cannot become a norm across the rest of the nation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47292994/353753924/253585351?refcode=20220701_AOTL_F_louisianagerrymander_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5YWVlZmE0LTkzZjktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bzt6J09BVnx2SueOiUr1HTPMrQ9Ti0lAgb2v4lOYZHE=)

\-- All On The Line

clean_body: | Friend, have you seen the news out of Louisiana? The United States Supreme Court has just blocked the implementation of a remedial map that would have allowed Black voters in Louisiana the ability to elect their candidate of choice in two congressional districts. Although nearly a third of the population is Black, Louisiana will only have one out of six majority black districts. As if partisan gerrymandering wasn’t bad enough, conservative legislatures have gerrymandered maps that disenfranchise voters of color. Louisiana is just one example, Republicans are pushing their manipulated maps until they find the ruling they like in states across the country: In Louisiana, a district court judge ruled that these Republican maps violated the VRA and needed a second majority-black district. The U.S. Supreme Court reinstated it. In Alabama, a federal court struck down the Republican Legislature’s congressional map, saying that “black voters have less opportunity than other Alabamians to elect candidates of their choice." The Supreme Court reinstated this one too. In Florida, a circuit court judge ruled that Ron DeSantis’ congressional map violated the constitution because “it diminishes African Americans’ ability to elect candidates of their choice.” It was the Florida State Supreme Court that let this map slip through. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = For decades, people of color have been excluded and alienated by the redistricting process. The Republican drawn maps in Louisiana continue this trend -- packing and cracking voters of color in districts to marginalize their political influence. At All On The Line, we want fair and representative maps. Maps that do not value one political party over the other. Maps that do not isolate and marginalize specific communities. Maps that will lead to competitive elections. The Republican drawn maps in Louisiana do none of these things. = \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Thank you! I’ve never felt more certain that we are going to win.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We blew past our fundraising goal for last night’s official FEC deadline.
#

I am amazed and filled with gratitude today.
We blew past our fundraising goal for last night’s official FEC deadline. It was close at times, but folks like you stepped up to get us across the finish line. We’re still adding up the numbers, but I think you will be very proud of what YOU helped us accomplish when we report them publicly soon.
It has been a whirlwind six weeks since we secured the Democratic nomination, but I’ve never felt more certain that we have what it takes to win this seat.
I’m not saying it will be easy — far from it. The smear attacks are only getting started. But what we have proven is that we are ready to fight for this seat — tirelessly. We won’t ignore the super PAC’s lies or my opponent’s extreme agenda. We’ll take them head-on and make the case to the people of North Carolina that we can win a brighter future where our rights, democracy and planet are protected — and that is what our families deserve.
As the former Chief Justice of North Carolina, I understand just how much higher the stakes have gotten in just the past week. We have seen a politicized court throw into question so many of our rights and freedoms.
And I stand firm in my commitment that, when we win this race together, I will not hesitate to cast the decisive vote to end the filibuster and defend our democracy, planet, voting rights, and reproductive freedom. That is the necessary and just action required to fix Washington’s broken status quo and create a future where all of our kids have an equal chance to thrive.
My team and I are going to take some time to rest and gather with loved ones to celebrate July 4th this weekend, and I hope you are able to do the same. We’ve accomplished so much together, but this is just the beginning.
Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!
\- Cheri (and Stanley)
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220701-1-ma%7D&t=1&akid=1172%2E357359%2ErbIvk9)
---

If you didn’t have a chance to contribute last quarter, will you chip in today to help us kick off this quarter? The summer months can be a difficult time for fundraising, so it’d mean a lot if we can start July strong!
[**Please consider making a contribution to help flip North Carolina and make history. Nonpartisan experts rate this one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country, so every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220701-1-ma&t=3&akid=1172%2E357359%2ErbIvk9)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220701-1-ma&t=4&akid=1172%2E357359%2ErbIvk9)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=1172%2E357359%2ErbIvk9). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1172%2E357359%2ErbIvk9). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1172_357359_rbIvk9&akid=1172%2E357359%2ErbIvk9) today to help us make history.

name: Will Rollins
subject: Thank you, Peter.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47293055/353754092/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNjYjEyZS05NWY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dC-DMhIa62VQj2u-MVbneBeblq0V_Zlb97kIApfhVwU=)
Peter,

I wanted to take a moment and thank you for your incredible support ahead of last night's FEC fundraising deadline. I’m proud to share that we met -- _then exceeded_ \-- our second quarter fundraising goal!

We can’t share our numbers just yet, but know that we’re marching toward the general in _our strongest position yet._ That's credit to your generosity.

**Our work doesn’t stop now.** We’re running to unseat one of Washington’s most entrenched Republicans in Ken Calvert. This movement will depend on your voice and continued activism to carry us to victory.

In the weeks ahead, I look forward to meeting new friends and neighbors across the 41st -- from Corona, Lake Elsinore, and Canyon Lake in the west to the desert communities of Palm Springs, Rancho Mirage, and Palm Desert in the east.

I look forward to meeting you too, Peter. clean_body: | = Peter, I wanted to take a moment and thank you for your incredible support ahead of last night's FEC fundraising deadline. I’m proud to share that we met -- then exceeded \-- our second quarter fundraising goal! We can’t share our numbers just yet, but know that we’re marching toward the general in our strongest position yet. That's credit to your generosity. Our work doesn’t stop now. We’re running to unseat one of Washington’s most entrenched Republicans in Ken Calvert. This movement will depend on your voice and continued activism to carry us to victory. In the weeks ahead, I look forward to meeting new friends and neighbors across the 41st -- from Corona, Lake Elsinore, and Canyon Lake in the west to the desert communities of Palm Springs, Rancho Mirage, and Palm Desert in the east. I look forward to meeting you too, Peter. In the meantime, stay up to date with my campaign by following us on , and I hope you enjoy the long weekend, Will = | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Will Rollins for Congress 31500 Grape Street St 3-452 Lake Elsinore, CA 92531 United States

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
| | | Hi team, We woke up this morning overjoyed that another glass ceiling had been shattered with the swearing-in of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman justice to the Supreme Court.
Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson shattered a glass ceiling in place for 223 years. And in Houston, we are inspired ready to break another glass ceiling here. **With your help, I will be the first Black woman/woman of color elected Mayor in Houston.** I would like to take a moment to say **THANK YOU** for your support of my candidacy. Yesterday was a critical fundraising deadline for our campaign, and I want to thank everyone for your investment in this campaign. We can’t tell you how much we raised yet, but let’s just say we went to bed grateful last night. **Thank you again for your investment in Houston and our campaign.** Sincerely, Amanda K. Edwards
---

name: news@pattymurray.com
subject: BREAKING: WA Senate race downgraded AGAIN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We need your support right now to help fight back against the Republicans targeting WA state.
#
This is urgent, Peter.
**For the second time in recent months, Washington state’s U.S. Senate race has been downgraded from a _solid_ _Democratic_ seat to _likely_ _Democratic_ — that makes our campaign as competitive as the Senate seat in Colorado.**
**[We need your support right now to help fight back against the downpour of money from national Republicans that’s sure to come in with this news. Please, chip in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47293209/353754479/-1063198758?refcode=pm_em_220701_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWRmNmU0Yy05NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MTOPssFh8Eb3zxadCkrSTi562cGgNZzyhZaH-gnikQk=)**
Let’s be clear about where we’re at right now: _Roe v. Wade_ is gone, and we need 52 Democratic Senators and a Democratic House to send Patty Murray’s bill to protect abortion rights to President Biden’s desk.
**The alternative is letting today’s extreme GOP gain more power, take away more fundamental American rights, and weaken our democracy further.**
**[We know Patty Murray will fight with everything she’s got through November 8th to make sure that does happen, but today’s news makes clear that we’ve got a long way to go. Contribute now to help her fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47293210/353754480/-1063198758?refcode=pm_em_220701_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWRmNmU0Yy05NmY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MTOPssFh8Eb3zxadCkrSTi562cGgNZzyhZaH-gnikQk=)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Patty

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: I'm losing by ONE POINT.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Yep - with just 130 days to go until Election Day, we're running neck and neck with my liberal opponent. Now, I need your help to ensure that we're ab We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f488a0ab895b4edeb94ea4b05c2ff359&_e=vLl5lCSDdzBMZCF43MaFidMxYooqbT9G1i_rwdNXV_9o1I2iHq8rCdrkt9fK3XAYuM_yAM-OxJrMx_MxwJsd6UICllRF4LxZVYFzjG3KipTSvOEafx01ycAplA7OzNPnMppL_p-dAQLPlETnuthUEOqzMlSFkLJKk-JozGkrnfYIqxo3C88Cn9pJKKqjPtOrWzo9xuP6bi13OX09mv1mR5dczP-07bUXKuDFiBhPcSBatj0piEWsQJ-aX1Cj8KIi6H0_xAeDIpxiQwu2ickaTrXXmtTR06FOOT3PS6qMja6fThwisKCSMd7Q1Q66h250lShpeuQTIIk6QoklR38U8YFoAEOcjK7Dfz-iccDsiqRpItk5vhmPTCVWnsv7YERRo7Or9vjDMgeHsKxYEDL_5BR0bMWMEOWQ13g0ZPzJb0sZW7sVnpW_qxZknA-SBdTWBVpTXpRyB_Aq5GRSKA7M1Q%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

We received some polling last week that has brought some hope and invigoration into our campaign. **According to a poll that a nationally known outfit conducted in the middle of June, I’m down only one point against far-left activist, Val Hoyle.**

Yes, you read that right. **With 131 one days to go until Election Day, we’re running just behind our Democrat opponent**. Many expected my opponent to run away with this race due to the way Democrats in Oregon drew the new map lines during redistricting. I think it’s safe to assume that this poll will have taken them by surprise.

name: AOTL
subject: Abortion goes back to the states
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
State legislatures are even more important post-Roe
|
---

**_“Supreme Court gives states green light to ban abortion, overturning Roe”_**
\-- POLITICO, 6/24/22
Friend --

The radical conservative majority on the Supreme Court has officially stolen away the right to an abortion. The decision -- made possible by Trump’s three appointees -- now leaves this fundamental right up to state legislatures.

It should come as no surprise that **gerrymandered state maps have led to state legislatures that have criminalized abortion.** The same forces that gave Republicans power to appoint justices who control the Court have given them control of far, far too many states.

[**The right to bodily autonomy is fundamental, and one way to protect that right is by ensuring that state legislatures accurately reflect the will of the people. Our movement can play a role in protecting access to abortion by fighting to have state legislators elected in fair districts -- can you make a contribution and help power our campaign for fair maps and elections?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47293599/353756741/2050588620?refcode=20220703_AOTL_F_roeredistrict_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4N2ZhMGVkLTk5ZjktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DXWrfojK5sd2T4IPqGwdNJlbmNlO8YQr4l8GPHkaZXA=)

More than 60% of Americans believe that abortion should be legal in all or most cases. In 29 of 50 states, a clear majority of people hold this view.

And yet, experts predict that 26 states are likely to criminalize abortion. That shouldn’t happen if state legislatures actually represent the will of the people.

Fairer maps are an important way of ensuring that America’s broad, pro-_Roe_ majority’s voice is heard. But this fight will be long and hard, and we need your help.

clean_body: State legislatures are even more important post-Roe | “Supreme Court gives states green light to ban abortion, overturning Roe” \-- POLITICO, 6/24/22 Friend -- The radical conservative majority on the Supreme Court has officially stolen away the right to an abortion. The decision -- made possible by Trump’s three appointees -- now leaves this fundamental right up to state legislatures. It should come as no surprise that gerrymandered state maps have led to state legislatures that have criminalized abortion. The same forces that gave Republicans power to appoint justices who control the Court have given them control of far, far too many states. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = More than 60% of Americans believe that abortion should be legal in all or most cases. Friend,
---
For years, Democrats have been trying to tarnish America. But even on our worst day, we are still blessed to live in America. I am proud to be an American, and I hope you are, too. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. If you donate $12 or more today, you’ll receive a free set of “Proud to Be an American” stickers.

**_A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. clean_body: | | | Friend, For years, Democrats have been trying to tarnish America. But even on our worst day, we are still blessed to live in America. I am proud to be an American, and I hope you are, too. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. If you donate $12 or more today, you’ll receive a free set of “Proud to Be an American” stickers. My very best, Nikki Haley | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. To pre-order your signed copy of "If You Want Something Done..." chip in $45 or more. | | Copyright © 2021 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. Stand For America PAC does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE #146 Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? . Folks, this is huge news — the latest poll shows that Floridians are tired of Ron DeSantis’ antics and want a new Governor. Thanks to your efforts, this campaign is on track to **_WIN_** in November.

**_But with all the out-of-state billionaires rushing in to save Ron, we can’t take anything for granted._**

Ron DeSantis’ far-right campaign has made him a lot of friends among Washington’s do-nothing partisans. His billionaire buddies are willing to spend anything to bail him out. And as exciting as these new poll numbers are, they will only make these right-wing interest groups double down in their efforts to defeat Charlie.

The far right is now terrified they’re going to lose this race, so we expect them to pour millions of dollars into saving DeSantis.

We need to seize this opportunity to solidify our lead. **That’s why we need your help preparing for an onslaught of attacks from DeSantis and his allies. Will you chip in right now to help us bring this home?**

name: Kati
subject: re: the Roe decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Democrats in Pennsylvania must act!
| | | Team, it’s Kati from the DSCC.

For many of us, it's still sinking in that the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v Wade_. While we knew this decision was more than likely coming, it doesn’t make me any less appalled, devastated and to be frank -- absolutely enraged. And in fact, now that this is _real_ , I feel all of these things now more than ever. But I know I am not alone.

So we cannot stay silent, especially in this moment when this cuts so deep for so many and we’re just plain tired. We must continue to go to the mat to uphold a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, because we know damn well extremist Republicans are not going to stop here.

That’s why we’re calling on Democrats everywhere to sign our urgent petition to stand with _Roe_ , and we need 10,000 signatures from Pennsylvania before 11:59 p.m. Please sign now: **[www.dscc.org/DefendReproductiveRights](https://go.dscc.org/go/8453?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220701-Kati-RoeOverturnedSMSRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220701-Kati-RoeOverturnedSMSRef-Pros-sl1&akid=5052%2E9716520%2ERqvEoJ)**

Thank you for continuing to be in this fight,

Kati
Chief Digital Officer, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
---
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q3?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=5052_9716520_RqvEoJ&akid=5052%2E9716520%2ERqvEoJ)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=5052%2E9716520%2ERqvEoJ)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5052%2E9716520%2ERqvEoJ)** to unsubscribe.

I hate asking for your support again because you’ve already done so much to help me and my campaign combat Nancy Pelosi, the Radical Left, and their Socialist Agenda, but we’ve got more work to do, and WE NEED YOUR HELP. That’s why I’m relieved to tell you that a patriotic supporter offered to help us hit our fundraising goal. They are offering a 500% match for ALL donations made in the next 24 hours. One of my major focuses in the U.S. Senate will be addressing the struggles that our service men and women face once they return home. Wounds that are both visible and invisible stay with our troops long after they finish active duty, and it is past time we stand by these heroes with more than just words. This is a comprehensive problem that is in need of comprehensive solutions. We are failing those who have never failed us, and it’s a national disgrace I intend to take head-on. clean_body: | | | | | OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER | | Remembering Deputy Brad Johnson Our hearts break tonight. Deputy Brad Johnson was a hero. He left the safety of his own home and family every day to protect and serve his community. His loved ones and colleagues continue to be in our prayers. John 15:13 | | Retaking the Senate TOGETHER Enjoyed being with my fellow Republican nominees from across the U.S. today as we discussed retaking the Senate in November. Together, we will save the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children! | | **Religious Liberty Updates Great news! This is a huge win for religious liberty across our country. The Court did the correct thing in standing up for Coach Kennedy’s First Amendment rights to exercise his Christian faith. Coaches and players should be 100% free to personally pray as they choose. In the Senate, I’ll always fight for Alabamians’ religious liberties and our values. | | Holding China Accountable China is our greatest geopolitical threat, and we must hold them accountable. It’s also far past time to onshore manufacturing jobs back to America and secure our domestic supply chains, especially in areas critical to our national security. | | PTSD Awareness One of my major focuses in the U.S. Senate will be addressing the struggles that our service men and women face once they return home. Wounds that are both visible and invisible stay with our troops long after they finish active duty, and it is past time we stand by these heroes with more than just words. This is a comprehensive problem that is in need of comprehensive solutions. We are failing those who have never failed us, and it’s a national disgrace I intend to take head-on. | | | Now you can show your support for our #1 Alabama first candidate without even leaving your home! Grab yourself a 3x5 Katie Britt flag NOW and start flying it with your American flag. Get yours today before they sell out: | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: **TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

| Team, I wanted to reach out real quick to deliver some much-deserved good news.

Thanks to all of the supporters who stepped up this quarter, we were able to reach our fundraising goals. **_I want to sincerely say thank you all._**

Because of your support, our voter contact program and early get out the vote efforts can start very soon, right in time for early voting in the primary. We’ll be able to continue to hold the AZ GOP accountable for their lies and hypocrisies and inform voters of the trouble they have caused for so long.

I know we asked a lot, and I’m grateful our team once again delivered. We wouldn’t have made it without you, so thank you.

-Charlie

We wouldn’t have made it without you, so thank you. -Charlie | The Arizona Democratic Party is working around the clock to ensure Democratic candidates are elected up and down the ballot — candidates who will fight for what YOU value most, like affordable healthcare for every Arizonan, economic stability and job opportunities for working families, and representation for the most marginalized among us. Help us continue to build a party that is fighting for all Arizonans. Become a monthly donor. **** Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Laura Loomer
subject: Big Tech continues to CENSOR Conservative voices!
body:
Facebook is at it again. Just days after the Supreme Court's historic ruling overturning Roe v Wade and we're already seeing them censor and delete posts containing "abortion," simply because they don't want to tolerate pro-life posts.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/V0KpU5eB763G0EwjnHmqKzkg/X977xRdCUfBWyA22wtmFMw) | Dear Friend,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/V0KpU5eB763G0EwjnHmqKzkg/X977xRdCUfBWyA22wtmFMw) Facebook is at it again. It's only been days since the Supreme Court's historic ruling overturning Roe v Wade, and we're already seeing Big Tech censor and delete anti-abortion posts, simply because they don't want to tolerate pro-life posts.

Big Tech just can't help themselves. As we are preparing to go into the holiday weekend to celebrate the FREEDOMS our Founders fought so hard for, it is sadly unsurprising that Big Tech continues to censor our Freedom of Speech.

Here's the good news! Over the last week, the Supreme Court has announced several rulings protecting our rights enshrined in the Constitution. Overturning Roe was just a start! In fact, this week, the Supreme Court ruled on Kennedy v. Bremerton School District, upholding our 1st Amendment Right to Free Speech and Freedom of Religion!

Let's keep the momentum going!

My own federal RICO case is still pending. With your help, I will continue to work to see that Big Tech is held accountable for violating our rights through their criminal racketeering. Censorship from Big Tech and Big Government is a constant threat to our freedoms. I will continue to fight EVERYDAY. Will you join me?

[**YES! I WILL FIGHT FOR FREEDOM TODAY!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/V0KpU5eB763G0EwjnHmqKzkg/X977xRdCUfBWyA22wtmFMw)

Thank you for your support and generosity in helping me fight for what generations of Americans have sacrificed so much for - our Freedom!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/X977xRdCUfBWyA22wtmFMw)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Highlights from KJP's first month as press sec...
body:
Biden at NATO, my podcast and more | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/358a4e5863fe/highlights-from-kjps-first-month-as-press-sec?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
|
---
## KJP just wrapped up her first month as White House press secretary...
Check out this mashup of memorable moments:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ed6b1bbb86&e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Media silent on Hunter Biden’s Russia prostitute counterintelligence scandal ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e308855a44&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Washington Examiner[Voicemail from Joe to Hunter proves they spoke about Chinese business ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8ff62a6b79&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Daily Mail[Vice President Harris creates new doubt about Biden’s plans for reelection](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9a053c32f0&e=f6564bbe3b) — via LA Times[Biden confuses Switzerland for Sweden in touting new NATO members](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=29810d3e02&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Examiner First she says Biden IS running and adds “FULL STOP” — then she went to the back of AF2 to tell the press that he “INTENDS” to run.[Conservative groups urge McCarthy, Scalise to restrict abortion if GOP takes back House ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=991c109367&e=f6564bbe3b)— via The Hill[40,000 Tennessee National Guard to lose jobs at midnight over federal COVID-19 vaccine mandate ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3063c4b04e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Stripes [Harry Reid Prepares to Go “Nuclear” on the Judicial Filibuster](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=00020cd244&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Daily Beast [Court Strikes Down NYC Law Allowing Noncitizens To Vote](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a47c1a5f48&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Daily Caller
|
---
## Beyond the Briefing...
In the lead up to the 2018 elections, I launched a podcast with Katie Pavlich to discuss the midterms, we had a lot of fun talking about issues and discussing them with some guests.As we get close to the 2022 midterms I’m excited to be re-entering the podcast space to have a chance to discuss some of the topics and have conservations in a long form format. We have great conversations on _Spicer & Co_ and you can still catch us every night at 5p, but I’m looking forward to the chance to go more in depth on issues and with guests than you can on TV.My first episode will drop soon — make sure you subscribe below or wherever you listen to podcasts:
| [SUBSCRIBE HERE](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4538cef865&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ed5ba36735&e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
## New time, same great _Spicer & Co_...
_Spicer & Co_ is now at 5p ET on weeknights at Newsmax. Don’t forget to switch your DVRs and tune in! See you tonight.
|
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9a0bee3c06&e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6f9afc9d5c&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
As the midterms get closer and closer, we need to stay focused on what the shortcomings of the current administration are. Arm yourself with the facts and read about some ways to get involved in my latest book, _Radical Nation_.|
---
[Get a copy here](newsmax.com/23)

name: Tom Perez
subject: Join us for our final events before the primary!
body:
RSVP to join me on July 6 and July 12!
#

Dear Peter,
I wanted to reach out and personally invite you to join me for our final events in Montgomery County before the primary on July 19th.
**[A Meet& Greet on Wednesday, July 6th at 6:00 PM ET in Silver Spring](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288941/353741857/-1672982828?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837), **
&
**[A meet and Greet on Tuesday, July 12th at 6:00 PM ET in Kensington](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288942/353741858/-37161890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837).**
With the primary just 18 days away, our campaign is ramping up and getting ready to win on July 19th. Our campaign was recently endorsed by the**[Washington Post](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288944/353741860/611721039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837) **and the**[Baltimore Sun](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288946/353741862/768551496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837). **These endorsements are translating into real momentum with a recent**[poll showing that we are tied for first place](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288948/353741864/-1781489845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837).**
But this same poll still shows 35% of voters are undecided. I am relying on supporters like you to power my campaign. I believe in a vision of jobs, justice, and opportunity for Maryland. I’m excited to share more updates about my campaign, that’s why I hope you’ll join me**[on July 6th](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288951/353741866/-1672982828?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837) **and **[July 12th](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288963/353741876/-37161890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837).**
**[Meet& Greet in support of Tom Perez ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288973/353741887/-1672982828?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**

The Home of Rachel Rauscher Cox & Clayton Cox | Silver Spring, MD
**[RSVP Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47288977/353741895/-1672982828?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDAzNWZjNy04MGY5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqc9KMpb7rt7fBOvbrVAmmAwC5qNz4kKPh-K0MrwD7Q=&emci=5f5bd724-5ff9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=80035fc7-80f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Checking in to see what’s on your mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| We’re just a few months away from Election Day, so I wanted to check in with you to see what’s on your mind.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=434%2E5257348%2EbjbUyy)
Derek,
As the summer weather starts to heat up, so does campaign season. And since we’re just a few months away from Election Day, I wanted to check in with you to see what’s on your mind.
[**Can you spare a minute (or two) to fill out my July priorities survey? Hearing your thoughts helps make this campaign stronger.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20220701-july-priorities-survey.DjynwK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220701_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=434%2E5257348%2EbjbUyy)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20220701-july-priorities-survey.DjynwK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220701_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=434%2E5257348%2EbjbUyy)
---
There’s a lot going on right now, and in order to make sure we’re all on the same page, I wanted to get your thoughts.
Addressing inflation, common-sense gun legislation, reproductive rights, protecting our democracy, and more are all issues that have been making the headlines — for good reason. But there are also the issues like healthcare access, climate change and job growth that are also incredibly important.
It can get pretty daunting to keep up with all of this and organize it in a way that is actionable, which is why I want to hear from you.
[**By getting a clear understanding of what people are most concerned about, we can turn ideas into action. Take this month’s priorities survey today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20220701-july-priorities-survey.DjynwK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220701_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=434%2E5257348%2EbjbUyy)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20220701-july-priorities-survey.DjynwK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220701_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=434%2E5257348%2EbjbUyy)
---
Thank you for taking the time to share what’s on your mind. It means a lot to me and really helps our coalition.
— Adam Schiff
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=434%2E5257348%2EbjbUyy) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=434%2E5257348%2EbjbUyy)**

# Join Team Shedd this weekend!
|
---
Team Shedd will be celebrating the 4th of July in Prescott, Flagstaff, and Williams this weekend and we would love for you to join us! The Schedule: Prescott Frontier Days Parade
Saturday, July 2nd - 9:00 AM Flagstaff 4th of July Parade
Monday, July 4th - 9:00 AM Williams 4th of July Parade
Monday, July 4th - 5:00 PM If you would like to walk in a parade with us, please contact Hattie Stockton at hattie@sheddforaz.com or 580-475-7334 for more information. We will have tshirts, buttons, and signs for you to show your support! We are so blessed to have the freedom we do and I look forward to celebrating the best country in the world with you all!
Cheers, Hattie Stockton

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Our first post-SCOTUS test
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The five-year offshore drilling plan just dropped.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4322?t=2&akid=12994%2E53494%2ExRr2j1) Friend, We're still reeling from corrupt, conservative Supreme Court justices' decision to undermine the Clean Air Act. But we are strengthened by the knowledge that there is still so much our leaders can do to act on climate. In fact, President Biden just got his first post-_West Virginia v. EPA_ opportunity to choose people over polluters. The Bureau of Ocean Energy Management just released their proposed plan for the next five years of offshore oil and gas leasing in U.S. waters. **This is our chance to raise our collective voice to demand that Biden allow no new fossil fuel leasing in public waters.** | [LEARN MORE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4322?t=3&akid=12994%2E53494%2ExRr2j1)
---
This is a prime example of federal climate action that is still possible and effective in the shadow of the stolen Supreme Court's recent ruling. We cannot miss this opportunity.
We'll be in touch with ways to take a stand for our oceans and our clean energy future—and against fossil fuels—soon. [_**For now, learn about this huge chance to fight the climate crisis by reading our blog.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4322?t=4&akid=12994%2E53494%2ExRr2j1)
[READ MORE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4322?t=5&akid=12994%2E53494%2ExRr2j1)
---
Onward,
Team Evergreen

name: Director of Volunteer Operations
subject: Volunteers Needed
body:
[https://lh4.googleusercontent.com/TUwA6ZEr3vIa9MsL-SBz5wwi3QcODgtbAt1DbrNwJa44NafL2jt5UJ17Ft3su5If11Mttmqi0F_S2zKzONS2IsCI6xqkxgVtAjaOC-O65C1jmaaZbeTMMy8K3OchT27x9yHscbQOYLc7NFWtg54]

Everyone Loves a Parade!!

Please join us and celebrate the 4th of July with Karina at the City of Fairfax Independence Day Parade, Monday July 4th. Karina for Congress will be marching alongside the Fairfax GOP float. We need volunteers! This is a fun event, so please come and bring a friend.

We are meeting in the designated Division 6 section in the Massey Building parking lot located at Page Avenue and West Street (see map below). Please arrive no later than 8:30am.

There is no reserved parking for volunteers.

Let us know at volunteer@karinaforcongress.com if you can join us or if you need more information. [https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/7_SithhsF3QAAs1ENxjKMja-xlm9dB2nBzYFgRefk7DAq0UVf9KXEaqGNCW6dkorQQ9jXqZjtqB-dChMiLZlx5qLz7KONj2L29JO0UZuXuOupXVJhXhtqj7vR-pU351_YSElHgn1Bxm49H2z0oM]

TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b0e7ef795b044619bfda425e64eaffdf&_e=nbZBZe4-Lfv75LyMMEq0HiL93FHhd1020dEp1KWEKSEWUTmpF7yZWt9Y6dOB50LQPV57T4qcAD0DEIE43dDikqSa_Jz9319USsN7UJKXIQZcMs473qTRJoJnLh_lekZ4hQXQIhXIyzqaz_bvH3_n_8T4IXtQt-XU4hNYPtOH_XKtgUl2xefCA5OP47MV0uRWS88G6S9b2IteNV3z_XKMx1BPAM1JAhzmkjPTWJhxd7YzrW-qjCN1e8GnMXBtJBdKvkBFkXnjEGw9N3O4a0sS-tsvWo1GdoqDda0dLNaGtU4%3D)

| | **Equality. Liberty. Opportunity.🗽**
---
| |
---
| | This weekend we celebrate the birth of American independence and appreciate what it means to be an American. This is important because it’s not a message a lot of Americans are hearing. For the far Left, denouncing America seems like a requirement. I want to take a moment to offer this reminder: Living in this country is a blessing, and every day I am proud to fight for the principles our founding fathers laid out: Equality. Liberty. Opportunity. It is up to us patriots to defend the United States by [renewing our people's pride](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b0e7ef795b044619bfda425e64eaffdf&_e=nbZBZe4-Lfv75LyMMEq0HgpbG1LqrZiFj0lKnXiTtO8gZFDshj9V6uLej-CzcDZMF7ke6SJIpRXi9rjOwQP6WeW5liz_bOHSYYAteabDKm8xfKo5hBj07_F7WAXAlfdB8TXjVqZlZ6aPKwyDQ1oQkfDc2HIt9BFRn-WpAltxaAgXXJGHsqLJBypnwdQ1KydP0mCtBW0dyrH-mfMMV4iysfYNuPECVg2Q4S7O0AlmaSHYOT_9UugvymGwdlgI2m6LhkfV7hi3F7LIUqVGAO8G1JkyOe6p8CXTUpamBjhIeOaEM4IcrptusttFAMh601_VAilj7ik4s6xMNGnVbHIfrQ%3D%3D) and protecting our patriotic spirit against the woke mob that seeks to tear it down. And that starts with knowing that America is the greatest force for good in human history. Just look at our [track record](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b0e7ef795b044619bfda425e64eaffdf&_e=nbZBZe4-Lfv75LyMMEq0HlU4q_-ga9igIzdj3kgXb1agNaafKxEzDk1lBMeRcU_kcC-VplXAgyeyXVQ8UK1YkchtC2-AsrahX4V0kI9Gs2c-pmV0rBQb2lO_Va7pXUPwzDqzbUDgfEHaG7Dsg5aPkuJ9nCEP-TZ2P1b-nWaen-6pjrztOwE0r-Y2ZicMLuvcXhq8dgDQdqfTD4hD_idLvUrf5XAk6i2udiyspqyXKsM5aVYsEyNph9LrbSOqxvHxMDp-rG2YIRgjIBIXFIcQ8zxRvbdWGQ4Cfr8SbSi6sjA%3D) over the past 245 years. I'm not saying we're perfect, but we sure have done a bang-up job [trying](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b0e7ef795b044619bfda425e64eaffdf&_e=nbZBZe4-Lfv75LyMMEq0HvogGAVFyAPOPo2bGabSIFzaRsjgomzlhNmawGn9k6NhKvo_U6lzDW6f7f1Ay0hq_f6aHYqfCRI3vYiSCiASfnrMeQLYwuoK6OVJnu-yn0xjyp5pILAIeXCXpbPq4TbP9jXNLQ0czOWrT4VaBYNuRVZV-NPvpbT3Lq_Ybo5QWu1-Fwd3C5kOmoCsczR7GfMkVMHXqQeCKEiXZCZcv8xoKBY0YfnklTRwb8jDivZ9ztMSz2YEYRYfXpB4f8Ny5dGH_-VYLF8xQ0RXfxmJ4yK8R0c%3D). America is the freest, greatest nation on Earth, and that's what I'm celebrating this weekend. Thanks for being a supporter, a fellow patriot, and a partner in preserving everything that makes our country great! Happy Fourth of July.
---
| | |
---
| | **Sweet Summertime 🍦

An East Tennessee family is making our neighborhood a bit [sweeter this summer.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b0e7ef795b044619bfda425e64eaffdf&_e=nbZBZe4-Lfv75LyMMEq0Hpo4AP-MIvWaxBtPttzJJjsJbL0G1frhBRJoA5hUqEwKoZ-CcADVBT2pML2-EDH1Cm3pggRje8CGWgxRm7DtLIrNjoH-dTWyigTetuAXbe-oc95d90QmBpjT07RxtQIzZ-NpN2tn75--yUIMjT8Un8ey8LQ5HQ8Wcs-VlysG9Pj2Un6vn5o84Xo0uUcAYbwS0G1PUy7F35F7Q_B_oOGrljZE8b7FpQSPJb_zWkcD_ISEeW_fOEck-kzjGq0gRRckeQoq2TkDUm7BGpSRxG-89zO-FFt7bd4OWKpvat8PXDarRQnYbBWBfX9ORS89I_7ZfbGKSR5gmiu4xzFvE4c7lJLqt29cWkD2el8JW3NGFxMtm5Zpg3hC9h4Q7EA4htrt6ZeDKeWMuNB8bWubwK-ReM9TpExqULrFh0G4671tR9VXfsuFu6tkH6JFwUprsOPOheKwdQz1faNCVtaOuXoQiGo%3D) The Johnson crew, a tight-knit trio similar to my own, has been going to Norris Lake with a variety of frozen treats for others to enjoy. How can this story get any cooler? I’ll tell you— all of the money raised from the ice cream sales goes toward children and adults with disabilities. The Johnson family even helped create the nonprofit [Open Doors Tennessee](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b0e7ef795b044619bfda425e64eaffdf&_e=nbZBZe4-Lfv75LyMMEq0HsY1V3f0sWQfJ5bL1mRdrQ-DsrMvhXtDVEtYrhyaeScn9i_PnqwuT0MrCKvEwAXeolHZI77dPQ9XgVmNOgyAARJR_tfkeO-6TLdd9d2quf-T832bFYFsvmBHcNPgErRquSEuRMWIhxz1G8GfSQFvAmiF0O5DNianJtRJChNY6Eq9-rCuMJQfl_UNAnJZSzv2Zi2ADQ8w81QWIIPQxQUuqOjG2gR8HSX_4-R9kt4IC6eQQc3Mb0v2wIybachRhUMDt0x5so2fOJ0zMw4MrziD4MdwwnYsiw291AGw0wnN7qcb), which supports people with disabilities in a variety of ways. For the inside scoop, you can find their ice cream route each weekend on the [Norris Lake Lovers](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b0e7ef795b044619bfda425e64eaffdf&_e=nbZBZe4-Lfv75LyMMEq0HsY1V3f0sWQfJ5bL1mRdrQ_MFEWQCNwCfa0ONgwW-roHkYMAi51iCWX5zgKArACc62f-bUhlsn3oyu8-51H1Kt1ExdSwGd94og2vuPvxKXsIfNidDVQK7gxPKtvXTfYWS6M6YMMSI1RVIw-gqrjKKPs-Ehfqb1xmG3PbSIPwsLRN7kK1JDeaFy1XG2YoBnCeTE_liZ_DQHvUltdBFSUP11urDjkC24hXZTVYTnReMJIWRx2Nziavu_t_waCCjrEsIHsbZ8-i5mkNj3nB357Mhx8%3D) Facebook page.

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | | | | | | | Equality. Liberty. Opportunity.🗽 | | | | This weekend we celebrate the birth of American independence and appreciate what it means to be an American. This is important because it’s not a message a lot of Americans are hearing. For the far Left, denouncing America seems like a requirement. I want to take a moment to offer this reminder: Living in this country is a blessing, and every day I am proud to fight for the principles our founding fathers laid out: Equality. Liberty. Opportunity. It is up to us patriots to defend the United States by and protecting our patriotic spirit against the woke mob that seeks to tear it down. And that starts with knowing that America is the greatest force for good in human history. Just look at our over the past 245 years. I'm not saying we're perfect, but we sure have done a bang-up job . America is the freest, greatest nation on Earth, and that's what I'm celebrating this weekend. Thanks for being a supporter, a fellow patriot, and a partner in preserving everything that makes our country great! Happy Fourth of July. | | | | | Sweet Summertime 🍦 | | An East Tennessee family is making our neighborhood a bit The Johnson crew, a tight-knit trio similar to my own, has been going to Norris Lake with a variety of frozen treats for others to enjoy. How can this story get any cooler? I’ll tell you— all of the money raised from the ice cream sales goes toward children and adults with disabilities. The Johnson family even helped create the nonprofit , which supports people with disabilities in a variety of ways. For the inside scoop, you can find their ice cream route each weekend on the Facebook page. | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → When duty calls... 🔥🎓 () → Saying goodbye to an old friend 😭😂 () → Blast off! 🦆💦 () | | | | | | | | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

clean_body: This is what’s wrong with Washington. This is why people are fed up. | Peter - A Chuck Schumer-backed Super PAC has released an attack ad that's blatantly misleading. Yet despite knowing the accusations they levied against me were skewed, they decided to launch the ad because they believe in "winning at any cost." This is what is wrong with Washington. This is why so many people are fed up with politicians. Democrats are playing dirtier than we expected. That's why we need your help to fight back. We cannot let the attacks continue unanswered or Georgians might be fooled into believing claims that are inaccurate. We have ads ready to set the record straight, but as of this morning - we don't have enough money in our media fund to air the tv spots. If this election is about the cost of groceries, rising rent, record gas prices, open borders, rising mortgage rates, or crime waves sweeping through our neighborhoods, our opponent will lose. He knows that. That's why he and his allies are doing everything within their power to deflect attention away from what's important to voters while they attempt to drag me through the mud. Since winning the Republican nomination for Senate, Senator Warnock and the Democrat Super PACs have spent $8 million on tv ads that mostly attack me. Our campaign hasn't been able to run any yet. That's $8,000,000 vs. $0. Now you know why we need your help. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: We failed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=36a8380694&e=8a657725d1)
---
|
---
| Peter,

Immediately following my primary victory to take on far-left Progressive Caucus Leader Katie Porter, my team ran the numbers and told me that we absolutely needed to raise $100,000 in August to lay the groundwork to win this race.

That was the absolute bare minimum because Katie Porter had already amassed a nearly $20 million war chest.

But, it’s now July 1st, and as of midnight last night, _**we failed to raise the $100,000 we needed**_.

My team is preparing budget cuts as we speak, but I told them to give me one more chance to reach out to my top supporters and ask for you to help us make up the deficit.

| Thank you! Your support during the most critical month of our campaign so far—in which we found out which MAGA extremist we’re going up against, Roe was overturned, and we had our FEC deadline—made it so my team will be reporting a strong number at the start of the general election season.

It’s no secret that Nancy Mace is out-of-touch with Lowcountry families. She’s for a near-total abortion ban, voted against a biparisan measure to help prevent gun violence, and even voted against ending the baby formula shortage a few weeks back.

Now that Roe is overturned, we have to use all the anger we feel to commit to real change. That starts with kicking Nancy Mace out of Congress.

It’s races like this that have the power to keep the House blue or flip it. We can’t let up now.

name: Reginald Bolding
subject: Progress is possible with your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reginald Bolding
body:
|

|
---
| Hi Peter,

I want to personally reach out and thank you for your support the past week—your contributions don’t go unnoticed.

As House Minority Leader, I’ve watched the far-right’s desperate attempts to remove ALL mail-in voting and propose restrictive voter ID laws — all while planning to overturn any election results they don’t agree with. From day one, I’ve been there to fight back against these attacks and protect our democracy.

As your Secretary of State, I will continue the fight to ensure fair and free elections for all Arizonans.

Thank you again for your continued support. I look forward to making you proud.

In service,

Reginald Bolding

---
---
---
Reginald Bolding is running for Secretary of State to strengthen democracy in Arizona. As the Democratic leader in Arizona’s House of Representatives, Reginald fought for economic relief, criminal justice reform, public education, and led the charge against right-wing voter suppression. **Reginald will continue to defend every Arizonan's right to free, fair, and secure elections as Arizona Secretary of State.**

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, I want to personally reach out and thank you for your support the past week—your contributions don’t go unnoticed. As House Minority Leader, I’ve watched the far-right’s desperate attempts to remove ALL mail-in voting and propose restrictive voter ID laws — all while planning to overturn any election results they don’t agree with. From day one, I’ve been there to fight back against these attacks and protect our democracy. As your Secretary of State, I will continue the fight to ensure fair and free elections for all Arizonans. Thank you again for your continued support. I look forward to making you proud. In service, Reginald Bolding Reginald Bolding is running for Secretary of State to strengthen democracy in Arizona. As the Democratic leader in Arizona’s House of Representatives, Reginald fought for economic relief, criminal justice reform, public education, and led the charge against right-wing voter suppression. Reginald will continue to defend every Arizonan's right to free, fair, and secure elections as Arizona Secretary of State. Paid for by Friends of Reginald Bolding. name: Abrams for Georgia
subject: Derek, this race is tied
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

We just got back the latest polling of Georgia voters,
Derek — and there’s big news:

Stacey Abrams: 48%
Brian Kemp: 48%
(Quinnipiac, 6.29.22)

Despite the odds against us between Kemp flooding the airwaves with
negative ads and him having an unfair fundraising advantage — this race is
TIED. It’s clear that Stacey’s positive vision for One Georgia is
connecting with voters, but with a race this close, we can’t afford to
slow down now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220701_B2_Poll_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=830%2E1862389%2EtnHrSr ]Can we count on you to donate $5 now? With less than
five months until Election Day, we’re relying on grassroots
supporters to keep
our momentum going.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220701_B2_Poll_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=830%2E1862389%2EtnHrSr ]DONATE $5

Derek, the
fact that we’ve closed our polling gap with Kemp is proof that our
grassroots team has the momentum. But if we learned anything from 2020 and
2021, it’s that Georgia elections can come down to the slightest margins —
so we can’t stop fighting for every last vote.

We know that Brian Kemp isn’t afraid to rig the rules to his advantage —
and that he’s willing to spend “whatever it takes” to win.

That’s why Stacey is building the most robust grassroots team in Georgia
history. We’re going to every corner of the state to lift up every voter
who Brian Kemp has left behind. Our strategy is working, but we can’t let
up now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220701_B2_Poll_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=830%2E1862389%2EtnHrSr ]If you can, make your
first
$5 donation now to make sure we can take on Brian Kemp.
Really, any amount will make a major difference.

Thank you,

Abrams for Georgia

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=830%2E1862389%2EtnHrSr ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=830%2E1862389%2EtnHrSr
